| 12/6 vs 2*43 (math) | bare "2" vs "–Ц–∞—Г–∞–±—Л вАФ 86" (inconsistent) | "**–Х—Б–µ–њ—В–µ–і—Ц–Љ: 2**" / "**–Х—Б–µ–њ—В–µ–і—Ц–Љ: 86**" (consistent prefix) |
| All v4.39.7 controls (qty queries / –Р–±–∞–є / –°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ / bug 4) | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Innovations (6)

**(1) Extended list-intent triggers** in both `tool.rs` (`has_list_intent`) and `topic_extraction.rs` (`genitive_topic_hint_for_list`). Original v4.17.5 set was ¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ / –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л / –∞—В–∞–њ —И—Л“Ы / –∞—В–∞–њ ”©—В / –±–∞—А–ї—Л“Ы –∞—В–∞—Г¬ї. Added: ¬Ђ–∞–є—В—Л–њ –±–µ—А¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ї–µ–ї—В—Ц—А¬ї, ¬Ђ–∞—В–∞“£—Л–Ј¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ї”©—А—Б–µ—В¬ї, ¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–њ –±–µ—А¬ї. Real-Kazakh list-request phrasings extend well beyond ¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ¬ї; the narrow trigger set was the proximate cause of the head-noun fallback in turn 1 of the transcript.

**(2) Notable-people list-summary facts** in `data/world_core/notable_kazakhstanis.jsonl` (4 new entries: notable_031вАУ034). Subject `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`, predicate `related_to`, objects `—В–∞–љ—Л–Љ–∞–ї “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы—В–∞—А —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц / –∞“Ы—Л–љ-–ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л–ї–∞—А —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц / “У–∞–ї—Л–Љ–і–∞—А —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц / —Б–њ–Њ—А—В—И—Л–ї–∞—А —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц`. Mirrors the v4.4.10 `geo_kz_104+` list-summary pattern that closed bug 4.

**(3) `LIST_TYPE_SYNONYMS` extension** for notable-people list-routing вАФ pairs —В“±–ї“У–∞вЖФ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы, –∞“Ы—Л–љвЖФ–∞“Ы—Л–љ-–ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л, –ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—ЛвЖФ–∞“Ы—Л–љ-–ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л, “У–∞–ї—Л–ЉвЖФ“У–∞–ї—Л–Љ, —Б–њ–Њ—А—В—И—ЛвЖФ—Б–њ–Њ—А—В—И—Л. Lets `list_intent_rank`'s synonym overlap promote the right curated list when query head-noun matches one of the role names.

**(4) Inflected-multiword match in `multiword_entity_hint`.** Pre-v4.40.5 was exact substring match against MULTIWORD_ENTITIES; missed inflected forms like ¬Ђ–±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Г —В—Ц–ї–і–µ—А—Ц–љ¬ї (Plural+P3+Acc) for the registered ¬Ђ–±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Г —В—Ц–ї—Ц¬ї. Added a second pass: for 2-word entities `X Y`, accept consecutive token pair `X T` where T starts with Y's first 3 chars. Closes turn 12 of the transcript.

**(5) NOT_A_TOPIC adverb additions** вАФ –Ї–µ–є–і–µ, –Ї–µ–є-–Ї–µ–є–і–µ, ”Щ—А–і–∞–є—Л–Љ, —Л–ї“У–Є, “ѓ–љ–µ–Љ—Ц, –±—Ц—А–і–µ–љ, –і–µ—А–µ—Г. Sentential temporal/manner adverbs that the FST occasionally returns as standalone nouns; same misanalysis class as v4.6.0's `”©—В–µ` / `–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л` additions.

**(6) `unknown_answer_mode` extended example-request detection** вАФ `starts_with("–Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї")` (catches plural ¬Ђ–Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї–і–∞—А¬ї, accusative ¬Ђ–Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї—Л–љ¬ї, etc.) and `starts_with("–Ї–µ–ї—В—Ц—А")` (the "cite/produce" verb that strongly implies example-request when paired with a topic).

**(7) Math-answer template вАФ bare-form removed.** Pre-v4.40.5 had `{math_value}` (bare number) plus two prefixed variants; the bare template fired on ~вЕУ of math turns by seed-mod, looking inconsistent against prefixed turns in the same session. Replaced with three uniformly-prefixed variants (¬Ђ–љ”Щ—В–Є–ґ–µ—Б—Ц: X¬ї, ¬Ђ–ґ–∞—Г–∞–±—Л вАФ X¬ї, ¬Ђ–µ—Б–µ–њ—В–µ–і—Ц–Љ: X¬ї). Choice still seed-deterministic.

### Note on innovation count

Bundle has 6 substantive innovations + 1 small template tweak = `.5` per the v4.39.0 reaffirmation rule (¬Ђ5 innovations вЖТ .5; 7 вЖТ .7¬ї). The discourse-anaphora task from the original 7-item plan turned out to need no code change вАФ ¬Ђ—Б–Њ–і–∞–љ¬ї was already in `DISCOURSE_ANAPHORS`; the symptom was upstream (turn 1's wrong topic, fixed by innovation 1).

## [4.39.7] вАФ 2026-05-03 вАФ FST archiphoneme split + lexicon batch + segmenter disambiguation вАФ 7-innovation patch bundle; coverage 83.27 % вЖТ 85.28 %

**Largest patch bundle since v4.6.5.** Closes the v4.39.0 architecture-note carry-forward (FST `realise_d` gap on nasal/vowel-final case suffixes) AND lifts morpheme coverage by another 2.01 pp via a high-frequency lexicon batch. Bundle size justifies `.7` per the patch-bundling rule (`feedback_versioning_post_1_0` v4.39.0 reaffirmation).

### Innovations (7)

**(1) FST `{DN}` / `{DA}` archiphoneme split + ACCUSATIVE migration.** The Apertium catalogue's ¬ЂD-nasalization fires in `:Nasals|Vow _ :Vow :Nasal` context¬ї rule needs forward lookahead вАФ which the forward-walking FST can't provide. Pre-v4.39.7 was a single `{D}` archiphoneme with a stem-only rule, producing wrong forms for Gen / Acc / Abl on nasal/vowel-final stems (¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£¬ї didn't parse because synth produced `*“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і—Л“£`). Migrated:
- New `{DN}` (Genitive D): nasal/vowelвЖТ–љ, voicelessвЖТ—В, defaultвЖТ–і. Surface: –∞–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£ / –±–∞–ї–∞–љ—Л“£ / —В—Ц–ї–і—Ц“£ / –Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ—В—Ц“£. Used by `GENITIVE = -{DN}{I}“£`.
- New `{DA}` (Ablative D): nasalвЖТ–љ, voicelessвЖТ—В, defaultвЖТ–і (incl. vowelвЖТ–і). Surface: –∞–і–∞–Љ–љ–∞–љ / –±–∞–ї–∞–і–∞–љ / —В—Ц–ї–і–µ–љ / –Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ—В–µ–љ. Used by `ABLATIVE = -{DA}{A}–љ`. Distinct from `{DN}` because Abl on vowel stems is `-–і–∞–љ/-–і–µ–љ`, not `-–љ–∞–љ/-–љ–µ–љ` (–±–∞–ї–∞–і–∞–љ, not *–±–∞–љ–∞–љ–∞–љ).
- ACCUSATIVE migrated to `{N}` archiphoneme (which already had the right rule: voicelessвЖТ—В, all-consonantsвЖТ–і, vowelвЖТ–љ). Surface: –Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ—В—Ц / –∞–і–∞–Љ–і—Л / –±–∞–ї–∞–љ—Л.
- Vanilla `{D}` (no right-context nasal) preserved for LOCATIVE / LOCATIVE_ATTRIBUTIVE.

**(2) 7 new synthesis-direction case tests** for the new archiphonemes вАФ `noun_genitive_–∞–і–∞–Љ_nasal_v4_39_5`, `noun_genitive_–±–∞–ї–∞_vowel_v4_39_5`, `noun_genitive_—В—Ц–ї_liquid_v4_39_5`, `noun_genitive_–Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ_voiceless_v4_39_5`, `noun_accusative_–∞–і–∞–Љ_nasal_v4_39_5`, `noun_accusative_–±–∞–ї–∞_vowel_v4_39_5`, `noun_ablative_–∞–і–∞–Љ_nasal_v4_39_5`. Pin the asymmetry between Gen and Abl on vowel-final stems (Gen вЖТ –љ, Abl вЖТ –і) so a future careless archiphoneme rename gets caught immediately.

**(3) `genitive_topic_hint_for_list` вАФ parse-stream version.** Pre-v4.39.7 was string-level (post-hoc suffix-strip on the input string) because the FST didn't derive Genitive on nasal/vowel-final stems. Now that v4.39.7 closes the FST gap, the parses themselves carry `Case::Genitive` directly. The function reads `parses.first()` and checks for a Genitive noun, replacing the v4.39.0 string-level workaround with a lexically-validated parse-stream extraction. Same first-token-genitive gate semantics; same anti-regression on bare-leading + deeper-genitive shapes.

**(4) 11 high-frequency lexicon entries** in `segmentation_roots.json` вАФ closes top-uncovered words from morpheme-coverage report. Nouns: `–±–∞—Б` (head), `–±–µ—В` (page/face), `–Љ–∞–ї` (cattle), `–Њ—А—В–∞` (middle), `–Њ—А—Л—Б` (Russian), `–њ–∞–є–і–∞` (use/profit), `“Ы–Њ–ї` (hand), `—Б”©–Ј` (word). Verbs: `–±–∞—Б—В–∞` (begin), `–Њ—В—Л—А` (sit), `–Њ—А–љ–∞–ї–∞—Б` (be located). Each entry is a top-15-frequency uncovered token; combined coverage delta **+2.01 pp**.

**(5) `deterministic_segment_parse` вАФ fewest-segment preference.** Pre-v4.39.7 the segmenter rejected ambiguity outright (returned `None` on >1 candidate parse), forcing lexicon authors to omit any root that creates a parse-path collision with another lexicalized form (e.g. adding `–±–∞—Б` (head) alongside `–±–∞—Б“Ы–∞` (postposition) made segmentation fail on ¬Ђ–±–∞—Б“Ы–∞¬ї). Real-Kazakh lexicon coverage demands both entries; disambiguating by ¬Ђfewest segments¬ї picks the lexicalized (idiomatic) form over the morphologically-decomposable form. Frozen postpositions (`–±–∞—Б“Ы–∞`, `–±–∞—Б—В–∞–њ`, `—Б”©–Ј–і—Ц–Ї`) win against compositional alternates; truly compositional forms (`“Ы–Њ–ї–і–∞–љ + –∞ + –і—Л`) still segment normally.

**(6) Morpheme coverage milestone:** 83.27 % вЖТ **85.28 %** (+2.01 pp over 3.87M committed words). Cumulative from v1.5.5 baseline: 79.48 % вЖТ 85.28 % (+5.80 pp across v4.39.0 + v4.39.7).

**(7) Bonus discovery: improved query precision on previously-mis-segmented inputs.** ¬Ђ–Р–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£ –Љ–∞“Ы—Б–∞—В—Л –љ–µ?¬ї pre-v4.39.7 picked topic ¬Ђ–Љ–∞“Ы—Б–∞¬ї (truncated ¬Ђ–Љ–∞“Ы—Б–∞—В¬ї via accusative_form_hint, because ¬Ђ–Р–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£¬ї didn't parse). Post-v4.39.7 the FST resolves ¬Ђ–Р–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£¬ї вЖТ ¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ¬ї + Genitive directly, so `first_noun_root` picks ¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ¬ї as topic and the bridge fact ¬Ђ–Р–і–∞–Љ вАФ —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Є–µ—Б—Ц¬ї surfaces. ¬Ђ–°”©–Ј —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л / –С–∞—Б –і–µ–≥–µ–љ –љ–µ?¬ї queries now answer with bridge facts via the new lexicon entries.

- `realise_n` / `realise_l` audit for parallel gaps вАФ current archiphonemes serve the major use cases; widen audit if real-REPL exposes new failures.
- ¬Ђ–Ю—В—Л—А–Љ—Л–љ¬ї (–Њ—В—Л—А + 1sg without aorist) and ¬Ђ–Ю—А—В–∞–ї—Л“Ы¬ї (–Њ—А—В–∞ + –ї—Л“Ы derivational) вАФ verb-conjugation / derivation gaps for individual entries.

## [4.39.0] вАФ 2026-05-03 вАФ Function-word completion + genitive-topic priority вАФ 79.48 % вЖТ 83.27 % morpheme coverage; bug 4 fully closed

**Second minor in v4.38+ arc.** Closes the v4.38.5 deferred bug 4 carry-forward (full list-of-regions answer) AND closes the long-standing morpheme coverage plateau by adding 4 high-frequency function words to the lexicon. Two changes ship together because they're complementary: function-word coverage unlocks parse breadth on real Kazakh text; genitive-topic priority unlocks the discourse-subject side of list / quantity queries.

(bridge fact, missed the list) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –µ“£ ”Щ—Г–µ–ї—Ц –Љ—Л–љ–∞–љ—Л –∞–є—В—Г“У–∞ –±–Њ–ї–∞–і—Л: “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ 17 –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л: –Р–±–∞–є, –Р“Ы–Љ–Њ–ї–∞, –Р“Ы—В”©–±–µ, –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л, –Р—В—Л—А–∞—Г, –С–∞—В—Л—Б “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –Ц–∞–Љ–±—Л–ї, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г, “Ъ–∞—А–∞“У–∞–љ–і—Л, “Ъ–Њ—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–є, “Ъ—Л–Ј—Л–ї–Њ—А–і–∞, –Ь–∞“£“У—Л—Б—В–∞—Г, –Я–∞–≤–ї–Њ–і–∞—А, –°–Њ–ї—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –Ґ“ѓ—А–Ї—Ц—Б—В–∞–љ, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г, –®—Л“У—Л—Б “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ —Е–∞–ї“Ы—Л —И–∞–Љ–∞–Љ–µ–љ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞? | "–•–∞–ї“Ы—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –±—Ц—А –Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї: ..." (corpus citation, missed the count fact) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ —Е–∞–ї“Ы—Л —И–∞–Љ–∞–Љ–µ–љ 20 –Љ–Є–ї–ї–Є–Њ–љ –∞–і–∞–Љ.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А—Ц–љ —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ–і–µ“£—Ц–Ј | (similar miss) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А: –Х—А—В—Ц—Б, –°—Л—А–і–∞—А–Є—П, –Ж–ї–µ, –Ц–∞–є—Л“Ы, –Х—Б—Ц–ї, –Ґ–Њ–±—Л–ї, –®—Г, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞–ї, –Ґ–∞–ї–∞—Б.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ? (anti-regression: bare-first then deeper genitive) | preserved (topic = “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ) | preserved вЬУ (first-token-genitive gate) |
| –Р–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£ –Љ–∞“Ы—Б–∞—В—Л –љ–µ? (no list/qty intent) | head-noun strategy | unchanged вЬУ |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ ”©–Ј–µ–љ –±–∞—А? / –Р–±–∞–є / –°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ (controls) | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Morpheme coverage milestone

| Metric | Pre-v4.39.0 | Post-v4.39.0 | ќФ |
|---|---|---|---|
| Lexicon roots (вЙ• 3 chars) | 14 562 | 14 566 | +4 |
| Prefix-match coverage over 3.87M committed words | **79.48 %** | **83.27 %** | **+3.79 pp** |

Single biggest coverage jump since v3.x lexicon work. Achieved by recognizing 5 high-frequency function words that had been listed in `project_morpheme_coverage_baseline` as gaps for 5+ releases.

### Innovations

**(1) 4 function-word lexicon entries** in `segmentation_roots.json`:
- `part_dep` вАФ ¬Ђ–і–µ–њ¬ї (quotative particle, converb of verb ¬Ђ–і–µ¬ї)
- `adj_degen` вАФ ¬Ђ–і–µ–≥–µ–љ¬ї (attributive participle of ¬Ђ–і–µ¬ї, "called/named")
- `pron_osy` вАФ ¬Ђ–Њ—Б—Л¬ї (demonstrative pronoun "this") вАФ registered as bare entry; wins over the previously-applied ¬Ђ–Њ¬ї + P3 derivation by being a more specific lexicon match.
- `postp_pen` вАФ ¬Ђ–њ–µ–љ¬ї (postposition / instrumental clitic / coordinating particle "and")
- `–Њ–ї + Genitive` already derived correctly by FST вЖТ ¬Ђ–Њ–љ—Л“£¬ї вАФ no entry needed (verified by trace).

**(2) `genitive_topic_hint_for_list`** in `topic_extraction.rs` вАФ string-level genitive-suffix strip that fires when (a) input has list-intent shape (¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ / –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л / –∞—В–∞–њ —И—Л“Ы / –∞—В–∞–њ ”©—В / –±–∞—А–ї—Л“Ы¬ї) OR quantity-intent shape (¬Ђ“Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ / –љ–µ—И–µ¬ї), AND (b) the FIRST content token of the input ends in one of six genitive allomorphs `-–љ—Л“£ / -–љ—Ц“£ / -—В—Л“£ / -—В—Ц“£ / -–і—Л“£ / -–і—Ц“£`. Returns the bare stem as topic. Closes the FST-gap-induced miss on nasal-final and vowel-final genitive stems (see "Architecture" below) without requiring an FST-side change.

**(3) First-token gate** prevents over-firing: in inputs like ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?¬ї (bare leading proper noun, then deeper genitive), the strategy declines so the legacy chain picks the bare leading noun as topic. Required to preserve the v4.4.11 / v4.17.5 anti-regression tests on bare-leading + deeper-genitive shapes.

**(4) Mutual reinforcement** вАФ function-word entries make `—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ–і–µ“£—Ц–Ј`-style commands parseable (closing the ¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ¬ї content morpheme); genitive-topic priority routes the parsed list-intent to the right subject.

### Architecture note: FST genitive gap discovered

The reason genitive-topic priority is implemented at the string level (mirroring the v4.4.12 `locative_attributive_hint`) rather than via parse-stream extraction is a separate FST bug discovered during v4.39.0 development: `realise_d` returns '–і' as default after non-voiceless stems, but Kazakh genitive after **nasal** AND **vowel** finals should produce '–љ' (-–љ—Л“£ / -–љ—Ц“£), not '–і' (-–і—Л“£ / -–і—Ц“£). So `synthesise_noun(“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, Gen)` produces ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і—Л“£¬ї (wrong); the analyse direction never matches the real surface ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£¬ї. Same gap blocks ¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ–љ—Л“£¬ї, ¬Ђ–∞–љ–∞–љ—Л“£¬ї, ¬Ђ–±–∞–їa–љ—Л“£¬ї, etc.

This is a meaningful FST architectural fix for a future release (v4.39.5 or v4.40.0) вАФ touching `realise_d` to add nasalвЖТ–љ and vowelвЖТ–љ cases. Risk: changes synthesis output for ALL `{D}` archiphoneme suffixes (Gen / Acc / Dat / Loc / Abl), which need careful per-case verification because they have different correct realizations on different stem-finals (e.g. Acc after nasal correctly stays '–і' as in ¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ–і—Л¬ї, unlike Gen). Filed as known limitation; v4.39.0 routes around it via the string-level hint.

- **Lexicon function-word completion (continued)** вАФ next batch of high-frequency missing words after coverage re-measurement.

## [4.38.5] вАФ 2026-05-03 вАФ Lexicon pollution purge + FST P3+Acc derivation fix

**First patch in v4.38+ arc.** Closes bug 4 carry-forward from v4.38.0 (lexicon registered ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ / –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л / –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А¬ї as separate noun roots вЖТ FST never normalized inflected surfaces to bare ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї). Two changes ship together because they're inseparable: removing the polluted entries exposed an FST gap (P3+Acc derivation) that was previously masked by the duplicates.

### Real-REPL bug 4 partially closed (2026-05-03 transcript)

| Query | v4.38.0 | v4.38.5 |
|---|---|---|
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –±–∞—А–ї—Л“Ы –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ–і–µ“£—Ц–Ј | "–Р–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л—А–∞“Ы –љ–µ –±—Ц–ї–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј –Ї–µ–ї–µ–і—Ц." (clarify, topic= mis-extracted ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ¬ї) | "**–Р–є–Љ–∞“Ы —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –µ“£ ”Щ—Г–µ–ї—Ц –Љ—Л–љ–∞–љ—Л –∞–є—В—Г“У–∞ –±–Њ–ї–∞–і—Л: –Р–є–Љ–∞“Ы вАФ –∞—Г–Љ–∞“Ы.**" (topic correctly = ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї; bridge fact surfaces) |
| –Ґ“±–ї“У–∞–ї–∞—А—Л–љ / –Ц–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л–ї–∞—А—Л–љ / –Р–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ (bare inflected forms) | clarify (treated as bare nouns) | resolved to root (—В“±–ї“У–∞ / –ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л / –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы) вЬУ |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ / –°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ / qty queries / confident facts | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Innovations

**(1) 85 inflectional-duplicate entries purged from active lexicon** (80 from `segmentation_roots.json`, 5 from `apertium_imported_roots.json`). All entries are surface-forms of bare roots already in the lexicon, generated by Plural / P3 / case suffixes that the FST should derive dynamically. Conservative filter: only entries where stripping a strict suffix (¬Ђ-—В–∞—А—Л–љ / -—В–µ—А—Ц–љ / -–ї–∞—А—Л–љ / -–ї–µ—А—Ц–љ / -–і–∞—А—Л–љ / -–і–µ—А—Ц–љ¬ї plus shorter variants down to ¬Ђ-—В–∞—А / -—В–µ—А / -–ї–∞—А / -–ї–µ—А / -–і–∞—А / -–і–µ—А¬ї) yields a base вЙ• 4 chars that exists as a noun. Drops 14 ambiguous candidates with base < 4 chars (–µ.g. ¬Ђ–Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А¬ї вЖТ ¬Ђ–Ї”©–ї¬ї, ¬Ђ–ґ–µ—А–ї–µ—А—Ц–љ¬ї вЖТ ¬Ђ–ґ–µ—А¬ї, ¬Ђ“Ы–∞“£—В–∞—А—Л¬ї вЖТ ¬Ђ“Ы–∞“£¬ї) to avoid false positives on independent compounds and short-base inflections; those clusters are deferred to a follow-up review release.

**(2) FST gap fix in `synthesise_noun`**: when pronominal-–љ buffer is injected for P3 + Accusative, the regular `ACCUSATIVE` template is now skipped вАФ in Kazakh, the pronominal-–љ IS the accusative marker after P3, so applying both produces wrong forms like ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ–і—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–ґ–∞—Б—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ–і—Л¬ї (which then fail to match real surfaces in the analyse direction). Other case combinations (P3+Dat / P3+Loc / P3+Abl) preserved вАФ pronominal-–љ is a true buffer there, with case suffix following.

**(3) Discovery: lexicon pollution masked FST gap.** Pre-v4.38.5, the polluted entries (e.g. `noun_aymaqtaryn` registered as bare root ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ¬ї) let analyse() match the entire surface as a single unanalysed noun, so the FST's broken P3+Acc derivation was never exercised in production. The purge exposes the gap; the synthesis fix closes it. Going forward, the absence of polluted entries is a forcing function: any future lexicon entry of shape ¬Ђroot + standard-suffix¬ї MUST be derivable by the FST, or analysis fails вАФ making FST coverage a hard, testable gate.

**(4) Recon script in commit message** (Python, 50 lines) вАФ finds inflectional-duplicate candidates programmatically. Not committed as a binary because the cleanup itself is one-shot; the script is preserved in commit history for future similar passes (e.g. cleaning short-base candidates after FST gap fixes).

### Verification

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| Workspace tests | **865 passing** unchanged |
| Inflected-noun normalization | вЬУ ¬Ђ–Р–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ / –Ґ“±–ї“У–∞–ї–∞—А—Л–љ / –Ц–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л–ї–∞—А—Л–љ¬ї resolve to bare roots |
| Bug 4 partial closure | вЬУ Topic now correctly = ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї; bridge fact surfaces |
| Anti-regression вАФ confident-fact controls | unchanged вЬУ |
| Anti-regression вАФ qty queries | unchanged вЬУ |
| `cargo fmt --all --check` | clean |

### Latency / RSS (release-mode probes)

Unchanged from v4.38.0 (within noise; -85 lexicon entries is 0.5 % of total, no measurable impact).

### Deferred to v4.39.0+

- **Genitive-topic priority for list queries**: ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –±–∞—А–ї—Л“Ы –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ–і–µ“£—Ц–Ј¬ї picks topic=–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы (the head noun), but the ideal answer is the –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—В–∞—А list stored under subject=“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ. Closing this requires a topic-marker preference for genitive nouns when query has list-intent вАФ separate scope.
- **Short-base lexicon clusters** (–Ї”©–ї / –ґ–µ—А / –Ї”©–Ј / –≥“ѓ–ї): 14 candidates deferred. Need FST derivation verification for short stems before purging.
- **Lexicon function-word completion** (–і–µ–њ / –Њ—Б—Л / –Њ–љ—Л“£ / –і–µ–≥–µ–љ / –њ–µ–љ) вАФ v4.39.0 milestone (79.48 % вЖТ 90 %+ morpheme coverage).

## [4.38.0] вАФ 2026-05-03 вАФ Quantity-aware ranker + subject-synonym fallback + 53 role-bridge facts

**First minor in v4.38+ arc.** Closes the v4.37.5 deferred bug 1 (HasQuantity ranking) and lays infrastructure groundwork (subject-synonym fallback in SearchGraph, role-bridge fact ladder) for the v4.38.5 lexicon-cleanup arc that will close bug 4.

### Real-REPL bugs closed (2026-05-03 transcript)

| Query | v4.37.5 | v4.38.0 |
|---|---|---|
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ ”©–Ј–µ–љ –±–∞—А? | "“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ 3 —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞ –±–∞—А: –Р—Б—В–∞–љ–∞, –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л, –®—Л–Љ–Ї–µ–љ—В." (cities вАФ wrong) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ –ґ–µ—В—Ц –Љ—Л“£–љ–∞–љ –∞—Б—В–∞–Љ ”©–Ј–µ–љ –±–∞—А.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –Ї”©–ї –±–∞—А? | (same cities fact) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы—Л—А—Л“Ы —Б–µ–≥—Ц–Ј –Љ—Л“£–љ–∞–љ –∞—Б—В–∞–Љ –Ї”©–ї –±–∞—А.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ —В–∞—Г –±–∞—А? | (same cities fact) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “ѓ—И —Ц—А—Ц —В–∞—Г –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц –±–∞—А.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ “±–ї—В—В—Л“Ы —Б–∞—П–±–∞“Ы –±–∞—А? | (same cities fact) | "**“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ –Њ–љ —В”©—А—В –Љ–µ–Љ–ї–µ–Ї–µ—В—В—Ц–Ї “±–ї—В—В—Л“Ы —В–∞–±–Є“У–Є —Б–∞—П–±–∞“Ы –±–∞—А.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ–∞–љ —И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ —В–∞–љ—Л–Љ–∞–ї —В“±–ї“У–∞–ї–∞—А–і—Л –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј? | proverb citation | "**–Ґ“±–ї“У–∞ вАФ –∞–і–∞–Љ.**" (bridge fact, more relevant) |
| –Ц–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –Ї—Ц–Љ? | (no fact) | "**–Ц–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л вАФ ”Щ–і–µ–±–Є–µ—В —Б–∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–љ–і–∞“У—Л —И—Л“У–∞—А–Љ–∞—И—Л–ї—Л“Ы —В“±–ї“У–∞.**" |
| “Т–∞–ї—Л–Љ –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –Ї—Ц–Љ? | (no fact) | "**“Т–∞–ї—Л–Љ вАФ “У—Л–ї—Л–Љ–Є –Ј–µ—А—В—В–µ—Г—И—Ц.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є? (control) | "“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А: –Х—А—В—Ц—Б, –°—Л—А–і–∞—А–Є—П, ..." | unchanged (RelatedTo list still wins; reverse-guard prevents new HasQuantity facts hijacking type-list queries) вЬУ |
| –°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ / “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л / confident-fact controls | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Innovations

**(1) `quantity_object_match_rank` in SearchGraph sort cascade.** New rank tier between `list_intent_rank` and `overlap`. When the user's query contains ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ / –љ–µ—И–µ¬ї, a HasQuantity fact whose `object.root` matches a content token from the query wins the tier вАФ closes the ¬Ђ”©–Ј–µ–љ¬ї case where four HasQuantity facts about Kazakhstan (–Њ–±–ї—Л—Б / “Ы–∞–ї–∞ / —Е–∞–ї—Л“Ы / –љ–Њ–≤—Л–µ ”©–Ј–µ–љ/–Ї”©–ї/...) all matched on subject + raw_text overlap, but only one had the relevant *counted class* in its object root. 3-char floor on token extraction (vs the 4-char floor in `query_content_tokens`) admits short content nouns like ¬Ђ–Ї”©–ї¬ї (lake), ¬Ђ—В–∞—Г¬ї (mountain), ¬Ђ–µ–ї¬ї (country), ¬Ђ–∞—Г—Л–ї¬ї (village).

**(2) Reverse-guard for HasQuantity facts.** When `has_quantity_intent` is false (the user is asking ¬Ђwhat kind / which¬ї вАФ definition or list-style enquiry), HasQuantity facts get demoted to rank 3 (worse than the default 2 for non-HasQuantity candidates). This prevents new quantity facts from hijacking type-list queries that previously surfaced RelatedTo `<X> —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц` facts. Closes the would-be regression on ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?¬ї from leaking the bare count into a list query.

**(3) `SUBJECT_SYNONYMS` lookup fallback in SearchGraph.** New 4-pair synonym table вАФ –∞–є–Љ–∞“ЫвЖФ–Њ–±–ї—Л—Б, –Ї—Ц—Б—ЦвЖФ–∞–і–∞–Љ, —В“±–ї“У–∞вЖФ–∞–і–∞–Љ, –µ–ївЖФ–Љ–µ–Љ–ї–µ–Ї–µ—В. When direct subject lookup returns no matches AND the queried subject is one half of a synonym pair, retry the lookup against the other half. Strictly defensive (preserves all pre-v4.38.0 unique-subject behavior bit-for-bit). Note: this alone doesn't yet close bug 4 (lexicon registers ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ / –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л / –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А¬ї as separate noun roots, so topic extraction never hands SearchGraph a clean ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї subject) вАФ full closure deferred to v4.38.5 lexicon cleanup.

**(4) 53 new world_core facts in `role_bridges.jsonl`** вАФ high-leverage bridges per `project_bridge_fact_leverage` (+47-67 derivations / fact). Coverage: 7 professionвЖТperson bridges (–∞“Ы—Л–љ/–ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л/“У–∞–ї—Л–Љ/—Б–њ–Њ—А—В—И—Л/–Ї–Њ–Љ–њ–Њ–Ј–Є—В–Њ—А/”Щ–љ—И—Ц/—Б—Г—А–µ—В—И—Ц/–Љ“±“У–∞–ї—Ц–Љ/–і”Щ—А—Ц–≥–µ—А/–Є–љ–ґ–µ–љ–µ—А IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ); 4 professionвЖТcreative-figure bridges (–∞“Ы—Л–љ/–ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л/–Ї–Њ–Љ–њ–Њ–Ј–Є—В–Њ—А/—Б—Г—А–µ—В—И—Ц IsA —И—Л“У–∞—А–Љ–∞—И—Л–ї—Л“Ы —В“±–ї“У–∞); classвЖТcategory bridges (–Ї”©–ї/—В–∞—Г/—И”©–ї/–і–∞–ї–∞ IsA –ґ–µ—А –±–µ–і–µ—А—Ц; “Ы–∞–ї–∞/–∞—Г—Л–ї IsA –µ–ї–і—Ц –Љ–µ–Ї–µ–љ; –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б IsA ”Щ–Ї—Ц–Љ—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –±”©–ї—Ц–љ—Ц—Б; –∞–і–∞–Љ IsA —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Є–µ—Б—Ц); 5 HasQuantity facts on natural geography (”©–Ј–µ–љ / –Ї”©–ї / —В–∞—Г –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц / “±–ї—В—В—Л“Ы —Б–∞—П–±–∞“Ы / –∞—Г—Л–ї).

**(5) `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES` extended** with 8 new compound bridge objects (—И—Л“У–∞—А–Љ–∞—И—Л–ї—Л“Ы —В“±–ї“У–∞, ”Щ–Ї—Ц–Љ—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –±”©–ї—Ц–љ—Ц—Б, “Ы–Њ“У–∞–Љ–і—Л“Ы —В“±–ї“У–∞, ”©–љ–µ—А —В“±–ї“У–∞—Б—Л, —Б–њ–Њ—А—В —В“±–ї“У–∞—Б—Л, “±–ї—В—В—Л“Ы —Б–∞—П–±–∞“Ы, –µ“£–±–µ–Ї —Б–∞–ї–∞—Б—Л, —В–∞—Г –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц) вАФ keeps the `world_core_multiword_coverage` invariant test passing.

**(6) `LIST_TYPE_SYNONYMS` expanded** with –±–∞–ї–∞вЖФ“±–ї, “Ы–∞–ї–∞вЖФ–Љ–µ–≥–∞–њ–Њ–ї–Є—Б, –µ–ївЖФ–Љ–µ–Љ–ї–µ–Ї–µ—В, –∞—Г—Л–ївЖФ–µ–ї–і—Ц –Љ–µ–Ї–µ–љ, –Ї—Ц—Б—ЦвЖФ–∞–і–∞–Љ, —В“±–ї“У–∞вЖФ–∞–і–∞–Љ вАФ covers more interchangeable pairs in factoid contexts. Conservative; pairs with register / connotation shifts (–∞—Г—Л–ївЖФ“Ы–∞–ї–∞ etc.) intentionally NOT added.

FST picks the longest match вЖТ topic extraction never normalises to bare ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї. Requires a focused lexicon cleanup pass вАФ separate release for clear scope.
- Subject-synonym table is in place but won't fire on bug 4 cases until lexicon is clean.

## [4.37.5] вАФ 2026-05-03 вАФ Human-like clarification on low-confidence topic extraction вАФ ¬Ђ–°—Ц–Ј X —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л —Б“±—А–∞–њ —В“±—А—Б—Л–Ј “У–Њ–є?¬ї

**First behavioural release in v4.37+ arc.** Closes a real-REPL pattern from the 2026-05-03 transcript: when topic extraction recovered only a fallback candidate (an adjective surfaced as `Analysis::Noun`, or a deverbal participle that registers as `noun` in the lexicon), the response asserted a tangential fact about that candidate confidently. Pre-v4.37.5 the system either echoed the wrong word (¬Ђ–Р—В–∞“Ы—В—Л вАФ ...¬ї) or cited a corpus quote about a modifier the user clearly meant as a qualifier of a deeper noun. v4.37.5 introduces a `TopicConfidence` band on `Intent::Unknown` and routes `Low` confidence to a hedged clarification family that surfaces the inferred subject and INVITES the user to correct it вАФ instead of pretending the modifier was the topic.

### Real-REPL bugs closed (2026-05-03 transcript)

| Query | v4.37.0 | v4.37.5 |
|---|---|---|
| **“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ–∞–љ —И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ —В–∞–љ—Л–Љ–∞–ї —В“±–ї“У–∞–ї–∞—А–і—Л –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?** | "–®—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –±—Ц—А –Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї: ¬Ђ–С—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ–і—Ц–і–µ–љ —И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ —Б”©–Ј...¬ї" (deverbal participle hijacked topic) | "**–Ґ“±–ї“У–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –±—Ц—А –Љ—Л—Б–∞–ї: ...**" (deeper noun wins) |
| **“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞“Ы—В—Л –ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –∞—В–∞“£—Л–Ј** | "–Р—В–∞“Ы—В—Л вАФ –∞—В–∞“Ы-–∞—В–Њ–ї—Г –∞—Д—Д–Є–Ї—Б—Ц..." (confident definition of an adjective) | "**–°—Ц–Ј –∞—В–∞“Ы—В—Л –ґ–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞ —Б“±—А–∞–њ –Њ—В—Л—А—Б—Л–Ј –і–µ–њ “±“Ы—В—Л–Љ. –Ф“±—А—Л—Б —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ –±–µ? –Ґ–Њ–ї—Л“У—Л—А–∞“Ы –∞–є—В—Б–∞“£—Л–Ј –±–Њ–ї–∞–і—Л.**" (clarify) |
| –∞–±–≤–≥–і / –ґ–ґ–ґ–ґ (gibberish) | "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ." | "**–Ь–µ–љ—Ц“£ —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ—Г—Ц–Љ—И–µ —Б“±—А–∞“У—Л“£—Л–Ј –±–∞—А, –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л —В–∞“Ы—Л—А—Л–њ—В—Л –∞–ґ—Л—А–∞—В–∞ –∞–ї–Љ–∞–і—Л–Љ. “Ъ–∞–є—В–∞–ї–∞–њ, –±–∞—Б“Ы–∞—И–∞ —В“±–ґ—Л—А—Л–Љ–і–∞–њ –Ї”©—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј—И—Ц.**" |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–µ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј? (control, High confidence) | confident grounded fact | unchanged вЬУ |
| –°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ! / –°–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л“£ –Ї—Ц–Љ? (controls) | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Innovations

**(1) `TopicConfidence` enum on `Intent::Unknown.noun_hint_confidence`.** Fifth analytical signal on the canonical Intent type (after polarity, modality, evidence, inversion-question). Two bands: `High` вАФ multiword / Latin / topic_marker / locative_attributive / adj+noun-compound / sentence_decomp focus / `first_noun_root` returning a root with lexicon `part_of_speech == "noun"` AND not a deverbal participle. `Low` вАФ `first_noun_root` fell back to `adjective` / `pronoun` / `numeral`, OR returned a deverbal participle (`-“У–∞–љ/-–≥–µ–љ/-“Ы–∞–љ/-–Ї–µ–љ`), OR `accusative_form_hint` stripped a suffix without lexicon validation. Default `High` preserves all pre-v4.37.5 routing exactly.

**(2) Two-pass `first_noun_root_with_confidence`** prefers true content nouns over modifiers and demotes deverbal participles even when the lexicon registers them as `noun` (e.g. ¬Ђ—И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ї–µ–ї–≥–µ–љ¬ї, ¬Ђ”©—В–Ї–µ–љ¬ї). Closes the 2026-05-03 case where ¬Ђ—И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ¬ї beat ¬Ђ—В“±–ї“У–∞¬ї purely on parse-stream order.

**(3) Confidence-aware `best_noun_hint_with_confidence`** threads the band through every extraction strategy вАФ structural strategies (multiword / latin / topic_marker / locative_attributive) report `High`, fallback strategies (`first_noun_root_with_confidence`'s second pass, `accusative_form_hint`) report `Low`.

**(4) Discourse-anaphora promotes confidence to `High`** after substituting a prior topic. Without this, multi-turn anaphor cases like ¬Ђ–Ю–ї–∞—А–і—Л —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ–і–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј –±–∞?¬ї (where the only token left is a pronoun) would clarify instead of listing the previously-established class. Anti-regression: `list_class_context_anaphor_v4_18_0`.

**(5) Planner clarification fork.** `Low` confidence ALWAYS routes to `unknown.clarify_low_confidence`, even when retrieval/curated-graph paths produced "evidence". A corpus citation about an adjective or deverbal participle the user meant as a modifier is noise, not signal вАФ surfacing it confidently misleads. `noun_hint == None` AND no evidence routes to `unknown.clarify_no_topic` (replaces bare ¬Ђ–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ¬ї).

**(6) Two new template families** in `v1.toml` вАФ `unknown.clarify_low_confidence` (5 templates) and `unknown.clarify_no_topic` (5 templates). Phrasing intentionally avoids asserting any new fact: their work is purely meta-conversational вАФ surface the inferred subject (or absence thereof) and hand the next turn back to the user.

### Verification

|---|---|
| Workspace tests | **865 passing** unchanged |
| Live REPL вАФ bug 2 ¬Ђ—И—Л“Ы“Ы–∞–љ вЖТ —В“±–ї“У–∞¬ї | вЬУ deverbal-participle demotion picks deeper noun |
| Live REPL вАФ bug 3 ¬Ђ–∞—В–∞“Ы—В—Л¬ї | вЬУ Low confidence вЖТ clarify_low_confidence |
| Live REPL вАФ gibberish ¬Ђ–∞–±–≤–≥–і¬ї / ¬Ђ–ґ–ґ–ґ–ґ¬ї | вЬУ no_topic + no_evidence вЖТ clarify_no_topic |
| Anti-regression: greetings, name, confident facts | unchanged вЬУ |
| Anti-regression: anaphor list-class continuation | вЬУ promoted to High after resolution |
| `cargo fmt --all --check` | clean |

## [4.37.0] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї inversion-question routing вАФ confirmation-seeking shape recognized

**First minor in v4.37+ semantic-IR arc.** Closes the v4.36.7 carry-forward. The ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї pattern вАФ a tag-question form like ¬Ђ–С“±–ї –і“±—А—Л—Б –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї (¬Ђisn't this correct?¬ї) вАФ is **not** a denial; it's a confirmation-seeking inversion where the speaker EXPECTS X to be true. Pre-v4.37.0 the v4.33.5 negation routing misread these as denials and gave ¬Ђ{noun} –µ–Љ–µ—Б –і–µ–њ –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј вАФ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —Б—Л–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ¬ї (denial acknowledgment). v4.37.0 detects the inversion via ¬Ђ–µ–Љ–µ—Б¬ї + question-particle co-occurrence and routes to a dedicated family that engages with the confirmation-seeking shape.

### What was broken pre-v4.37.0

```
> –С“±–ї –і“±—А—Л—Б –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?
"–Ф“±—А—Л—Б –µ–Љ–µ—Б –і–µ–њ –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј вАФ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —Б—Л–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ."
                       вЖС misreads tag-question as denial; should engage as inversion
```

Linguistically ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї is the opposite of ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б¬ї вАФ the former asks for confirmation that X IS the case (despite the surface-level negation marker), while the latter asserts X is NOT the case.

### Innovations

**(1) `Intent::Unknown.input_is_inversion_question: bool` field.** Fourth SemFrame-derived signal on the canonical Intent type (after polarity, modality, evidence). Default `false` preserves all pre-v4.37.0 routing.

**(2) `Conversation::turn` populates from sem_frames** by detecting co-occurrence of ¬Ђ–µ–Љ–µ—Б¬ї (any inflected form: –µ–Љ–µ—Б, –µ–Љ–µ—Б–њ—Ц–љ, –µ–Љ–µ—Б—Б—Ц“£, –µ–Љ–µ—Б–њ—Ц–Ј, –µ–Љ–µ—Б—Б—Ц–Ј) AND a tag-question particle (–±–µ / –Љ–∞ / –Љ–µ / –њ–∞ / –њ–µ) in the SemFrame stream.

**(3) Planner inversion routing вАФ HIGHEST priority** among Unknown-routing. Runs BEFORE the v4.33.5 polarity check because the question shape needs engagement, not refusal. Polarity is still set by `populate_sentential_negation`, but routing skips the denial family when inversion-question is true.

**(4) Epistemic-override bypass for inversion** mirrors v4.34.0/v4.34.7/v4.36.0 patterns.

**(5) New template family `unknown.with_inversion_question`** in `v1.toml` вАФ 7 templates that engage with confirmation-seeking shape without flat assertion or flat refusal:
- "–Ш”Щ, –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ —Б–Њ–ї–∞–є —И—Л“У–∞—А вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы."
- "{noun} –ґ–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј –Њ—А—Л–љ–і—Л –і–µ–њ –Њ–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ."
- "–Ш”Щ, –Љ–µ–љ –і–µ —Б–Њ–ї–∞–є –Њ–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ вАФ –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л—Б—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є–Љ—Ц–љ."
- "–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Њ–є—Л“£—Л–Ј –і“±—А—Л—Б —И—Л“У–∞—А, –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы —А–∞—Б—В–∞–є –∞–ї–Љ–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ."
- "{noun} —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц –±–∞“У–∞–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ вАФ –±“±–ї —Л“Ы—В–Є–Љ–∞–ї."
- (+2 no-noun variants)

Phrasing avoids both confirmation (¬Ђyes, X IS the case¬ї) and denial (¬Ђno, X ISN'T¬ї) since adam doesn't have ground-truth вАФ uses hedging ¬Ђ–Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ / —И—Л“У–∞—А / —Л“Ы—В–Є–Љ–∞–ї / –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л—Б—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є–Љ—Ц–љ¬ї instead.

### Live verification

| Query | v4.36.7 | v4.37.0 |
|---|---|---|
| **–С“±–ї –і“±—А—Л—Б –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?** | "–Ф“±—А—Л—Б –µ–Љ–µ—Б –і–µ–њ –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј вАФ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —Б—Л–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ." | "**–Ш”Щ, –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ —Б–Њ–ї–∞–є —И—Л“У–∞—А вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы.**" |
| **“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ “ѓ–ї–Ї–µ–љ –µ–ї –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?** | grounded fact about Kazakhstan | "**–Ш”Щ, –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ —Б–Њ–ї–∞–є —И—Л“У–∞—А вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы.**" |
| **–°–µ–љ –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л –µ–Љ–µ—Б—Б—Ц“£ –±–µ?** | denial acknowledgment | "**–Ш”Щ, –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ —Б–Њ–ї–∞–є —И—Л“У–∞—А вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы.**" (now treated as inversion вАФ semantically more accurate) |
| –С“±–ї —И—Л–љ–і—Л“Ы –µ–Љ–µ—Б (control, no question particle) | unchanged denial | unchanged denial вЬУ |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В (control) | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |

### Battery edge case 18 reframed

Battery case 18 ¬Ђ–°–µ–љ –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л –µ–Љ–µ—Б—Б—Ц“£ –±–µ?¬ї previously closed in v4.34.0 as denial acknowledgment. v4.37.0 reroutes to inversion-question (semantically closer to user's intent). The battery `neg-consumed` metric drops from 5/5 to 4/5 reflecting this routing change вАФ but it's NOT a regression, it's a refinement. The battery script needs an `inv-consumed` metric tracking the new family; deferred to next battery refresh.

## [4.36.7] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ EvidenceKind consumption on extraction side (Hearsay refuse) вАФ Evidence cycle closed both sides

**Patch in v4.36+ semantic-IR arc.** Closes the substrate-then-consume cycle for **Evidence on the extraction side** (mirroring v4.36.0's dialog-side consumption). Adds the third guard вАФ Hearsay refusal вАФ to all three migrated extract_facts matchers, completing the **triple-guard pattern**: negation + modality + evidentiality.

### Principle

The user's evidential framing matters for graph integrity. If the source sentence reports hearsay (¬Ђ–Р–±–∞–є –∞“Ы—Л–љ –±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї вАФ "apparently Abai was a poet, they say"), promoting it to the graph as `(–∞–±–∞–є, IsA, –∞“Ы—Л–љ)` would lose the evidential context and recompose hearsay as confirmed knowledge. Adam shouldn't fabricate certainty from reportative source. Refuse extraction.

### Innovations

**(1) Triple-guard pattern in `copula_is_a`, `nominal_conjunction`, `locative_lives_in`.** Each matcher now has three sequential guards before extraction:
```rust
let any_negated_noun = sem_frames.iter().any(...);     // v4.34.5/v4.35.0/v4.36.0
if any_negated_noun { return; }
let any_modal = sem_frames.iter().any(...);            // v4.35.0/v4.35.0/v4.36.0
if any_modal { return; }
let any_hearsay = sem_frames.iter().any(...);          // v4.36.7 NEW
if any_hearsay { return; }
```

All three guards conservative вАФ skip whole matcher when ANY frame in the stream carries the signal. Zero cross-coupling between guards.

**(2) Substrate-then-consume cycle for Evidence now closed both sides:**

| Field | Population | Consumption (dialog) | Consumption (extraction) |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Polarity** | v4.33.0 | v4.33.5 | v4.34.5 |
| **Modality** | v4.32.0 / v4.32.5 | v4.34.7 | v4.35.0 |
| **Evidence** | v4.31.0 + v4.36.5 | v4.36.0 | **v4.36.7** |
| Relation | placeholder | n/a | n/a |

Three of four SemFrame fields now have **fully closed cycles** (population + dialog consumption + extraction consumption). RelationKind remains placeholder вАФ populated by future pattern-matcher migration when matchers start emitting SemFrame outputs (v4.37+).

### Corpus impact

| Predicate | v4.36.6 | v4.36.7 | ќФ |
|---|---|---|---|
| IsA (Grammar) | 1472 | 1472 | unchanged (no IsA Grammar facts had Hearsay-marked source) |
| RelatedTo (Grammar) | 62 | **56** | **-6** (nominal_conjunction Hearsay guard rejected 6 sentences with PastEvidential / PastReportative tense in source) |
| LivesIn (Grammar) | 8 | 8 | unchanged |
| Other predicates | unchanged | unchanged | вАФ |

The 6 rejected RelatedTo facts came from sentences where the speaker reports hearsay about the relation between two nouns. Conservative refusal is the safe move вАФ extracting these would imply adam asserts the relation while the source explicitly framed it as reported hearsay.

### Verification

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| Workspace tests | **865 passing** unchanged |
| Real-world 26-query battery | **26/26 = 100 % coherent** |
| facts.json | 1934 вЖТ **1928** (-6 RelatedTo from Hearsay guards; IsA 1472 unchanged) |
| live_holdout_2026_05_02 | **5/5 вЬУ** unchanged |
| live_holdout_2026_05_01 | **32/32 вЬУ** unchanged |
| rust_holdout | **41/41 вЬУ** unchanged |
| Foundation validation | **passes, no drifts** |
| Mean latency | **191.5 ms** (-25 ms vs v4.36.6 вАФ likely OS file-cache warmth, the additional guard adds minor cost on the hot path) |
| Mean RSS | **176.1 MB** (-1.0 MB, within noise) |

### v4.36.x arc fully complete

Five releases (v4.36.0 вЖТ v4.36.5 вЖТ v4.36.6 вЖТ v4.36.7) closed:
- v4.36.0: third matcher migration + first EvidenceKind dialog consumption (Hearsay hedging)
- v4.36.5: PastReportative tense + ConverbPerfect parser enumeration
- v4.36.6: vowel-alternation for ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї, short-form 1sg for ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї
- **v4.36.7**: Evidence guard on extraction (triple-guard pattern in all migrated matchers)

The Evidence story is now architecturally complete: detection (v4.31.0/v4.36.5), dialog consumption (v4.36.0), extraction refusal (v4.36.7).

### Pipeline impact

- 3 new guard blocks (~10 lines each) added to `copula_is_a`, `nominal_conjunction`, `locative_lives_in` вАФ same-shape guard mirroring negation/modality patterns
- facts/derived_facts regeneration

Cadence: patch вАФ closes Evidence extraction-side cycle; small uniform change across three matchers.

### Carry-forwards

- **v4.37.0** вАФ fourth extract_facts matcher migration (likely `dative_goes_to` or `possessive_has`); remaining 6 missing parser tenses (ParticiplePast, ParticipleHabitual, ParticipleFuture, FutureIntentional, FuturePossible, Conditional, Imperative); battery edge case for ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї question form.
- **v4.38+** вАФ RelationKind population (when extract_facts patterns start emitting SemFrame outputs); consumption (when downstream consumers read the `relation` field).

## [4.36.6] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ FST coverage: ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї short-form 1sg + ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї back-vowel converb (final v4.36.x FST gaps closed)

**Patch in v4.36+ semantic-IR arc.** Closes the two FST coverage gaps re-scoped from v4.36.5 to v4.36.6+. Both required separate FST architecture work:

1. **¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї back-vowel converb** вАФ vowel-final back-vowel verbs change shape during converb derivation (–Њ“Ы—Л вЖТ –Њ“Ы–Є), breaking the prefix-match in `surface_could_contain_root`. Pre-v4.36.6, surfaces beginning with ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є*¬ї / ¬Ђ–ґ–∞—Б—Л*¬ї / ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л*¬ї couldn't be analysed.
2. **¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї short-form 1sg** вАФ colloquial Kazakh 1sg present-style verbs drop the `-—Л–љ/-—Ц–љ` tail of the personal ending (-–Љ—Л–љ/-–Љ—Ц–љ вЖТ -–Љ). The synth path produced only the long form, so user-typed ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ / –±–∞—А–∞–Љ / –Њ“Ы–Є–Љ¬ї didn't parse.

### What was broken pre-v4.36.6

```
> –Ю“Ы–Є
sem_frames: (none)               вЖР –Њ“Ы—ЛвЖТ–Њ“Ы–Є vowel alternation broke prefix-match

> –Р–ї–∞–Љ
sem_frames: (none)               вЖР short-form 1sg not enumerated by synth

> –Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ
sem_frames: (none)               вЖР combined: ConverbImperfect short-form ability
response: "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ."
```

### Innovations

**(1) `surface_could_contain_root` extended with —Л/—Ц вЖТ –Є vowel alternation.** Mirrors the existing intervocalic-voicing branch (–њвЖФ–±, –ЇвЖФ–≥, “ЫвЖФ“У): when root ends in —Л/—Ц, also accept `<root[..-1]>–Є` as prefix candidate. Synth side already produces ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї from `synthesise_verb(–Њ“Ы—Л, ConverbImperfect)` via `apply_aorist_after_vowel`; the gap was purely on the parser-prefix-match side.

**(2) Short-form 1sg synth path in `try_verb_analyses`.** New conditional inside the existing nested loop: when feature combo is (Present|PastEvidential) + First + (Sg|None) + polite=false, ALSO try the short-form variant. Implementation strips the trailing `-—Л–љ/-—Ц–љ` from the long-form synth output. If short matches surface, emit Analysis with same features. Limited to 1sg because other persons (`-—Б—Л“£`, `-—Б—Л–Ј`, `-–Љ—Ц–Ј`, etc.) don't have a similar contraction in standard Kazakh.

### Live verification

| Query | sem_frame trace | Response |
|---|---|---|
| **–Ю“Ы–Є** | `–Њ“Ы—Л/Verb tense=ConverbImperfect` | parses вЬУ (was: no parse) |
| **–Ю“Ы–Є–і—Л** | `–Њ“Ы—Л/Verb tense=Present` | parses вЬУ |
| **–Р–ї–∞–Љ** | `–∞–ї/Verb tense=Present person=First` | parses вЬУ (was: no parse) |
| **–С–∞—А–∞–Љ** | `–±–∞—А/Verb tense=Present person=First` | parses вЬУ |
| **–Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ** | full ability detection | "–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ." вЬУ |
| –Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ (control, long form) | unchanged | "–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ." вЬУ |
| –Р–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ (control) | unchanged | unchanged |

### Real-world battery (v4.36.6)

| Aggregate | v4.36.6 | ќФ vs v4.36.5 |
|---|---|---|
| Mean latency | **216.1 ms** | +21 ms (real cost: vowel-alternation prefix-match check + short-form 1sg synth+compare per matching feature combo) |
| Mean max RSS | **177.1 MB** | unchanged |
| Coherent responses | **26/26 = 100 %** | matched |
| Neg-consumed | **5/5** | matched |
| Mod-consumed | **2/4** | matched |

The +21 ms is honest perf cost from the new code paths. Acceptable trade for closing two architectural gaps. The substrate-then-consume cycle for Modality (Ability sub-flavor) now reaches all standard surface forms вАФ long ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї, short ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї, back-vowel ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї.

### Verification

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| Workspace tests | **865 passing** unchanged |
| Real-world 26-query battery | **26/26 = 100 %** coherent |
| facts.json | 1934 вЖТ 1934 (unchanged вАФ vowel-alternation didn't open new IsA/RelatedTo extractions in current corpus; IsA 1472 unchanged) |
| live_holdout_2026_05_02 | **5/5 вЬУ** unchanged |
| live_holdout_2026_05_01 | **32/32 вЬУ** unchanged |
| rust_holdout | **41/41 вЬУ** unchanged |
| Foundation validation | **passes, no drifts** |

### v4.36.x arc complete

Three releases (v4.36.0 вЖТ v4.36.5 вЖТ v4.36.6) closed all v4.36+ FST coverage and consumption work:
- v4.36.0: third matcher migration + first EvidenceKind consumption (Hearsay hedging)
- v4.36.5: PastReportative ¬Ђ-{Y}–њ(—В—Л)¬ї + ConverbPerfect parse
- v4.36.6: vowel-alternation for ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї, short-form 1sg for ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї

The Hearsay-detection chain is now end-to-end functional on natural Kazakh forms across all relevant tense/person variants.

### Pipeline impact

- 1 extension to `surface_could_contain_root` (~10 lines, mirrors existing voicing branch)
- 1 new conditional in `try_verb_analyses` short-form path (~20 lines)
- facts/derived_facts version sync to 4.36.6

Cadence: patch вАФ closes two specific FST gaps deferred from v4.36.5; honest performance trade-off (+21 ms).

### Carry-forwards

- **v4.36.7** вАФ EvidenceKind consumption on extraction side (refuse extraction when sentence has Hearsay evidential вАФ adam shouldn't promote hearsay to graph facts).
- **v4.37.0** вАФ fourth extract_facts matcher migration (likely `dative_goes_to` or `possessive_has`); remaining 6 missing parser tenses (ParticiplePast, ParticipleHabitual, ParticipleFuture, FutureIntentional, FuturePossible, Conditional, Imperative); battery edge case for ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї question form.

## [4.36.5] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ FST coverage: ConverbPerfect + PastReportative (¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї now route to Hearsay)

**Patch in v4.36+ semantic-IR arc.** Closes the v4.36.0 honest-gap carry-forward вАФ the ¬Ђ-{Y}–њ(—В—Л)¬ї reportative form (¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–±–∞—А—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї), which is the natural Kazakh hearsay form most commonly produced in user dialog, previously didn't parse at all. The FST treated only `Tense::PastEvidential` (¬Ђ-“У–∞–љ/-–≥–µ–љ¬ї вЖТ –ґ–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ–Љ—Л–љ) as reportative; ¬Ђ-—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї fell through to no parse, blocking v4.36.0's Hearsay routing.

### What was broken pre-v4.36.5

```
> –Ц–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л
sem_frames: (none)               вЖР didn't parse
intent: input_evidence: None     вЖР Hearsay not detected
response: "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ."
```

The synth side already supported the perfect-converb base `-{Y}–њ` (line 421 `VERB_CONV_PERFECT`), but the parser tense enumeration didn't include `ConverbPerfect`, AND there was no tense variant for the ¬Ђ-—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї reportative (perfect-converb base + literal `-—В—Л` particle).

### Innovations

**(1) New `Tense::PastReportative` variant.** Distinct from `PastEvidential` вАФ both encode hearsay/reportative semantics, but the surface forms differ structurally:
- `PastEvidential` = ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ–Љ—Л–љ / –±–µ—А–≥–µ–љ¬ї (`-“У–∞–љ/-–≥–µ–љ` participle base + person-style endings)
- `PastReportative` = ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л / –±–µ—А—Ц–њ—В—Ц / –±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї (`-{Y}–њ` perfect-converb base + invariant `-—В—Л` particle, no person ending)

**(2) New synth template `VERB_REPORTATIVE_PAST`** (~10 lines):
```rust
const VERB_REPORTATIVE_PAST: SuffixTemplate = &[
    SuffixAtom::Arch(Archiphoneme::Y),  // —Л / —Ц buffer
    SuffixAtom::Literal('–њ'),            // perfect converb
    SuffixAtom::Literal('—В'),            // -—В—Л particle (invariant)
    SuffixAtom::Literal('—Л'),
];
```

`synthesise_verb` match arm dispatches `Tense::PastReportative` to this template; no personal-ending slot follows because `-—В—Л` is invariant.

**(3) `SemFrame::from_analysis` maps `PastReportative вЖТ Some(EvidenceKind::Hearsay)`** alongside the existing `PastEvidential вЖТ Hearsay` mapping. Both forms now feed the same v4.36.0 Hearsay routing.

**(4) Parser tenses += `ConverbPerfect, PastReportative`** (alongside v4.32.5's `ConverbImperfect`). Two new enumeration entries, ~30 % more parse-time cost per verb token (from 5 to 7 tenses).

### Live verification

| Query | sem_frame trace | Response |
|---|---|---|
| **–Ц–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л** | `–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastReportative evid=Hearsay` | "–°—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ —Б–Є—П“Ы—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы." вЬУ |
| **–С–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л** | `–±–Њ–ї/Verb tense=PastReportative evid=Hearsay` | hearsay-aware вЬУ |
| **–Р–±–∞–є –ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л** | `–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastReportative evid=Hearsay` | hearsay-aware вЬУ |
| **–Ц–∞–Ј—Л–њ** (ConverbPerfect bare) | `–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=ConverbPerfect` | now parses (was: no parse) вЬУ |
| –Ц–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ–Љ—Л–љ (control, PastEvidential) | unchanged | unchanged вЬУ |
| –Р–±–∞–є –ґ–∞–Ј–і—Л (control, PastDefinite) | unchanged | unchanged grounded fact вЬУ |

### Real-world battery (v4.36.5)

| Aggregate | v4.36.5 | ќФ vs v4.36.0 |
|---|---|---|
| Mean latency | **194.6 ms** | -127 ms (mostly OS file-cache warmth between immediate-back-to-back runs; not a true performance improvement вАФ adding 2 tenses to enumeration costs ~30 % more parse work per verb token) |
| Mean max RSS | **177.1 MB** | +1.3 MB (within noise) |
| Coherent responses | **26/26 = 100 %** | matched |
| Neg-consumed | **5/5** | matched |
| Mod-consumed | **2/4** | matched (3/4 with cases 19/20/21 visibly modal-aware in v4.35.5; battery script case-sensitivity bug undercounts) |

The latency drop is suspicious вАФ adding tenses should slow parsing, not speed it. Most likely OS file-cache effect after immediate `extract_facts` + `run_reasoner` runs. Honest framing: not claiming a perf improvement; the architectural cost is +2 tenses in enumeration.

### Known FST gaps still present (carry-forward to v4.36.6+)

- **¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї short-form 1sg**: ¬Ђ–∞–ї + Present + 1sg¬ї synth produces ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї (long form), not the contracted ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї. Adding short-form personal-ending alternates is invasive (touches the personal-ending synthesis match). Defer.
- **¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї back-vowel converb**: `surface_could_contain_root` requires root prefix-match, but vowel-final back-vowel verbs change shape during converb derivation (–Њ“Ы—Л вЖТ –Њ“Ы–Є), breaking prefix-match. Closing this requires either pre-stripping final —Л/—Ц before lookup, or stem-alternation paradigm matcher (mirroring `pronoun_paradigm`).

Both were originally promised for v4.36.5 but turn out to need separate FST architecture work. Honest re-scope: v4.36.5 is **¬Ђ-—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї reportative + ConverbPerfect parsing**; ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї / ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї вЖТ v4.36.6+.

### Verification

|---|---|
| Workspace tests | **865 passing** unchanged |
| Real-world battery | **26/26 = 100 %** coherent |
| facts.json | 1935 вЖТ 1934 (-1 RelatedTo from new ConverbPerfect parse path triggering a guard on a previously-unparseable sentence; IsA 1472 unchanged) |
| live_holdout_2026_05_02 | **5/5 вЬУ** unchanged |
| live_holdout_2026_05_01 | **32/32 вЬУ** unchanged |
| rust_holdout | **41/41 вЬУ** unchanged |
| Foundation validation | **passes, no drifts** |

### Pipeline impact

- 1 new `Tense::PastReportative` enum variant
- 1 new synth template `VERB_REPORTATIVE_PAST` (~12 lines)
- 1 new match arm in `synthesise_verb`
- 1 line in SemFrame evidence mapping (PastReportative вЖТ Hearsay)
- 2 new entries in parser tense enumeration (ConverbPerfect, PastReportative)
- facts/derived_facts regeneration

Cadence: patch вАФ closes one specific architectural gap (Reportative path); two related gaps (¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї / ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї) defer due to separate FST architecture cost.

### Carry-forwards

- **v4.36.6** вАФ short-form 1sg ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї variant + back-vowel converb ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї synthesis fix.
- **v4.36.7** вАФ EvidenceKind consumption on extraction side (refuse extraction when sentence has Hearsay evidential).
- **v4.37.0** вАФ fourth extract_facts matcher migration (likely `dative_goes_to` or `possessive_has`); remaining 6 missing parser tenses (ParticiplePast, ParticipleHabitual, ParticipleFuture, FutureIntentional, FuturePossible, Conditional, Imperative); battery edge case for ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї question form.

## [4.36.0] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ Third matcher migration + first EvidenceKind consumption (Hearsay hedging)

**First minor in v4.36+ semantic-IR arc.** Two architectural completions in one release:
1. Third extract_facts matcher migration вАФ `locative_lives_in` joins `copula_is_a` (v4.34.5) and `nominal_conjunction` (v4.35.0) on the SemFrame stream, with the same dual-guard pattern (negation + modality refusal).
2. **First EvidenceKind consumption** вАФ Hearsay-marked utterances now route to a respectful hedging template family instead of asserting flat facts about the topic. This is the third SemFrame field to influence user-facing answer text after Polarity (v4.33.5) and Modality (v4.34.7).

### Innovations

**(1) `locative_lives_in` signature migration**: `+ sem_frames: &[SemFrame]`. Mirrors v4.34.5's `copula_is_a` and v4.35.0's `nominal_conjunction`. Same dual guards: refuse extraction when sentence has either Polarity::Negated on a noun-class frame OR any Modality on any frame. For LivesIn this protects against modal claims like ¬ЂX Y-–і–∞ —В“±—А—Г –Ї–µ—А–µ–Ї¬ї ("X needs to live in Y") being mistakenly extracted as factual residency.

**(2) `Intent::Unknown.input_evidence: Option<EvidenceKind>` field.** Third SemFrame-derived field on the canonical Intent type (after `noun_hint_polarity` v4.33.5 and `input_modality` v4.34.7). Default `None` preserves all pre-v4.36.0 routing exactly. Propagated through `semantics`, `verifier`, and 8 test sites.

**(3) `Conversation::turn` populates `input_evidence`** by walking the SemFrame stream for any non-None evidence вАФ independent of noun_hint, like modality. Auto-derivation flows: FST `Tense::PastEvidential` вЖТ `SemFrame.evidence: Some(EvidenceKind::Hearsay)` вЖТ `Intent.input_evidence: Some(Hearsay)`.

**(4) Planner Hearsay routing.** New short-circuit AFTER polarity and modality checks (those have higher priority вАФ when they fire on the same input, the more salient signal wins):
```rust
if matches!(input_evidence, Some(EvidenceKind::Hearsay)) {
    return "unknown.with_hearsay_hedge";
}
```

**(5) Epistemic-override bypass for Hearsay.** Mirrors v4.34.0's polarity bypass and v4.34.7's modality bypass. Hearsay-marked Unknowns skip `unknown.tentative` override вАФ the hedging template family is already a tentative-shape response.

**(6) New template family `unknown.with_hearsay_hedge`** in `v1.toml` вАФ 7 templates that hedge the response by echoing the user's evidential framing back:
- "–°—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ —Б–Є—П“Ы—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы."
- "{noun} –ґ–∞–є–ї—Л —Б—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А –±–Њ–ї—Г—Л –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ, –і–µ–≥–µ–љ–Љ–µ–љ –Љ–µ–љ —А–∞—Б—В–∞–є –∞–ї–Љ–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ."
- "–°—Ц–Ј –µ—Б—В—Ц–≥–µ–љ —Б”©–Ј –±–Њ–ї—Б–∞ –Ї–µ—А–µ–Ї, –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы –Љ–µ–љ —В–µ–Ї—Б–µ—А–µ –∞–ї–Љ–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ."

Templates use ¬Ђ—Б—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ / –µ—Б—В—Ц–і—Ц“£—Ц–Ј / –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ ”Щ“£–≥—Ц–Љ–µ¬ї to mark the source as the user's hearsay, not adam's first-hand knowledge.

### Live verification

| Query | sem_frame trace | Response |
|---|---|---|
| **–Ц–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ–Љ—Л–љ** | `–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastEvidential evid=Hearsay` | "–°—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ —Б–Є—П“Ы—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы." вЬУ |
| **–Р–±–∞–є –ґ–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ** | `[1] –ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastEvidential evid=Hearsay` | "–°—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ —Б–Є—П“Ы—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы." вЬУ |
| **–Ю–ї –ґ–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ –µ–Ї–µ–љ** | `[2] –ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastEvidential evid=Hearsay` | "–°—Ц–Ј–≥–µ –∞–є—В—Л–ї“У–∞–љ —Б–Є—П“Ы—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ вАФ –љ–∞“Ы—В—Л –і–µ—А–µ–≥—Ц–Љ –ґ–Њ“Ы." вЬУ |
| –Р–±–∞–є –ґ–∞–Ј–і—Л (control, PastDefinite) | `–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=PastDefinite` (no evid) | unchanged grounded fact вЬУ |
| –Р–±–∞–є –Ї—Ц–Љ? (control, no verb) | no evidence | unchanged вЬУ |

Note: ¬Ђ-{Y}–њ(—В—Л)¬ї reportative forms like ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї do NOT currently parse вАФ the FST treats `Tense::PastEvidential` as the `–ґ–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ–Љ—Л–љ`-style construction. Closing the ¬Ђ-—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї path is **v4.36.5+** FST coverage work.

|---|---|---|---|
| **Polarity** | v4.33.0 | v4.33.5 | v4.34.5 |
| **Modality** | v4.32.0 / v4.32.5 | v4.34.7 | v4.35.0 |
| **Evidence** | v4.31.0 (PastEvidentialвЖТHearsay) | **v4.36.0** | not yet |
| Relation | placeholder | n/a | n/a |

### Pipeline impact

- 1 signature change to `locative_lives_in` (+ `sem_frames` parameter)
- 2 guards (negation + modality) added to `locative_lives_in` (~30 lines)
- 1 dispatch update in `extract_facts`
- 4 test-site call updates for `locative_lives_in`

- 1 propagation in `semantics::interpret_text_with_lexicon`
- 1 propagation in `verifier::strip_evidence`
- 8 test-site Intent::Unknown patches
- 1 wiring in `Conversation::turn` (find_map for evidence)
- 1 short-circuit in planner Unknown-branch routing
- 1 epistemic-override bypass for Hearsay
- 1 new template family with 7 templates in v1.toml
- facts/derived_facts version sync to 4.36.0

Cadence: minor вАФ third matcher migration + first EvidenceKind consumption + closes 3rd substrate-then-consume cycle.

### Carry-forwards

- **v4.36.5** вАФ FST coverage: ¬Ђ-{Y}–њ(—В—Л)¬ї reportative path (¬Ђ–ґ–∞–Ј—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–±–Њ–ї—Л–њ—В—Л¬ї); short-form 1sg ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї variant + back-vowel converb ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї.
- **v4.36.7** вАФ EvidenceKind consumption on extraction side (refuse extraction when sentence has Hearsay evidential вАФ adam shouldn't promote hearsay to graph facts).
- **v4.37.0** вАФ fourth extract_facts matcher migration (likely `dative_goes_to` or `possessive_has`); remaining 8 missing parser tenses; battery edge case for ¬ЂX –µ–Љ–µ—Б –њ–µ?¬ї question form.

## [4.35.5] вАФ 2026-05-02 вАФ Modal-without-noun: battery case 21 ¬Ђ–Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї closes

**Patch in v4.35+ semantic-IR arc.** Closes battery case 21 вАФ declarative ability claim ¬Ђ–Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї ("I can write") that has been falling to "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ" since v4.32.5 because no `noun_hint` was extracted (verb-only sentence) and v4.34.7's modality routing required both modality AND noun_hint. v4.35.5 relaxes the requirement at three coupling points: planner routing, epistemic-override bypass, and Conversation::turn population.

### What was broken pre-v4.35.5

```
> –Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ
–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ.
                  ^ no noun_hint вЖТ modality routing skipped вЖТ tentative fallback
```

Modality was correctly detected at SemFrame layer (`–ґ–∞–Ј/Verb tense=ConverbImperfect mod=Ability` in `--trace`), but three coupling points blocked end-to-end consumption:
1. `Conversation::turn` populated `input_modality` only inside the `noun_hint: Some(_)` arm
2. Planner routing required `input_modality.is_some() && noun_hint.is_some()`
3. Epistemic-override bypass required `noun_hint: Some(_), input_modality: Some(_)`

### Innovations

**(1) `Conversation::turn` modality population moved out of `noun_hint`-Some guard.** Polarity is per-noun (no noun вЖТ no polarity to copy), but modality is on the lexical verb frame and independent of `noun_hint`. The pre-v4.35.5 nesting silently skipped population for verb-only modal claims.

**(2) Planner modality routing relaxed.** Drop the `noun_hint.is_some()` requirement; modality alone routes to the appropriate `unknown.with_modal_*` family.

**(3) Epistemic-override bypass relaxed.** Same relaxation in the override block вАФ when `input_modality: Some(_)`, base_key wins regardless of `noun_hint`.

**(4) +3 no-noun template variants per modal family** (9 templates total added). For verb-only modal claims, `template_is_fillable` filters to bare-modality templates that don't reference `{noun}`. Examples:
- Necessity bare: ¬Ђ–Ш”Щ, —И—Л–љ—Л–Љ–µ–љ “Ы–∞–ґ–µ—В –љ”Щ—А—Б–µ –µ–Ї–µ–љ.¬ї, ¬Ђ–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Њ–є—Л“£—Л–Ј –Њ—А—Л–љ–і—Л вАФ –±“±–ї –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј–і—Л.¬ї
- Possibility bare: ¬Ђ–Ш”Щ, –Љ“±–љ–і–∞–є –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Ї –±–Њ–ї—Г—Л —Л“Ы—В–Є–Љ–∞–ї.¬ї
- Ability bare: ¬Ђ–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ, –Њ–љ–і–∞–є “Ы–∞–±—Ц–ї–µ—В—Ц“£—Ц–Ј –±–∞—А.¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ш”Щ, —Б—Ц–Ј–і–µ –Њ–љ–і–∞–є –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Ї –±–∞—А –µ–Ї–µ–љ.¬ї

### Live verification вАФ case 21 closes

| Query | v4.35.0 | v4.35.5 |
|---|---|---|
| **–Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ** | "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ." | "**–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ.**" |
| –Ъ—Ц—В–∞–њ –Њ“Ы—Г –Ї–µ—А–µ–Ї (control, with noun) | "–Ш”Щ, –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј–і—Л –Љ”Щ—Б–µ–ї–µ –µ–Ї–µ–љ." | unchanged вЬУ |
| –С“±–ї —И—Л–љ–і—Л“Ы –µ–Љ–µ—Б (control, polarity precedence) | "–®—Л–љ–і—Л“Ы –µ–Љ–µ—Б –і–µ–њ –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј вАФ –њ—Ц–Ї—Ц—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —Б—Л–є–ї–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ." | unchanged вЬУ |
| “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В (control, no modality) | grounded fact | unchanged вЬУ |

### Known FST gaps still present (carry-forward)

Two ability variants do NOT close in v4.35.5:
- ¬Ђ–°”©–є–ї–µ–є –∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї вАФ `—Б”©–є–ї–µ` parses as ConverbImperfect вЬУ, but `–∞–ї–∞–Љ` (short 1sg form without -—Л–љ) doesn't parse вЖТ only one frame in stream вЖТ ability detector can't fire (needs both lexical-verb + –∞–ї frames).
- ¬Ђ–Ю“Ы–Є –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ¬ї вАФ `–Њ“Ы–Є` (converb of back-vowel verb ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы—Л¬ї) doesn't parse вЖТ same.

These are FST coverage gaps in the v4.32.5 ConverbImperfect enumeration вАФ short-form-1sg ¬Ђ–∞–ї–∞–Љ¬ї variant isn't enumerated, and back-vowel verb converb ¬Ђ–Њ“Ы–Є¬ї isn't synthesised correctly. Documented as **v4.36+ FST coverage** alongside the remaining 8 missing parser tenses.

### Real-world battery (v4.35.5)

Same 26-query battery; case 21 row moved to PASS:

| # | Query | v4.35.0 | v4.35.5 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 21 | –Ц–∞–Ј–∞ –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ | "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ." | "–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ." вЬУ |

| Aggregate | v4.35.5 | ќФ vs v4.35.0 |
|---|---|---|
| Mean latency | **320.3 ms** | matched |
| Mean max RSS | **175.9 MB** | -0.9 MB (within noise) |
| Coherent responses | **26/26 = 100 %** | matched |
| Mod-consumed (visible) | **3/4** (cases 19, 20, **21**) | **+1** vs v4.35.0's 2/4 |
| Neg-consumed | **5/5** | matched |

Case 22 still uses AskAboutSystem path (not modality-routing) and gives the existing smart honest refusal вАФ no regression.
