## [4.7.1] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Rust Book Chapter 1 (–С–∞—Б—В–∞—Г) translated, ingested into morpheme_index (phase 2 begins)

First chapter under the ¬Ђ–≥–ї–∞–≤–∞ = –њ–∞—В—З¬ї cadence. Full Kazakh translation of the Rust Book Chapter 1 вАФ Getting Started вАФ covering installation (rustup, Linux/macOS, Windows, troubleshooting, updating, local docs), Hello World (project directory, writing/running the first program, anatomy of a Rust program, compile-vs-run as separate steps), and Hello Cargo (Cargo project creation, build/run/check, release build, Cargo as convention).

### Translation

- New `data/raw/rust_book_kk/chapter_01.md` вАФ full Kazakh translation, ~3 000 words, code blocks preserved verbatim, all v4.7.0 terminology decisions applied (–Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї / “Ы–∞—А—Л–Ј“У–∞ –∞–ї—Г / —Б–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы / —В—А–µ–є—В / –µ–љ–∞–Љ / —Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В).
- New `data/raw/rust_book_kk/LICENSE.md` вАФ MIT/Apache-2.0 attribution to the original Rust Book.
- New `data/raw/rust_book_kk/README.md` вАФ phase-2 status, pipeline diagram, chapter status table.

### Pipeline integration

- New `crates/adam-corpus/src/bin/process_rust_book_kk.rs` вАФ Rust binary that reads `data/raw/rust_book_kk/chapter_*.md`, strips fenced code blocks and markdown decoration, splits Kazakh prose into sentences (preserving backtick-quoted technical spans so the dot in `Cargo.toml` is not a sentence boundary), and emits the standard adam corpus-pack format. Replaces an initial Python prototype (rejected by the Rust-only contract test). Carries 4 unit tests covering fenced-block stripping, Cyrillic-uppercase sentence splitting, backtick-span preservation, and short-fragment rejection.
- Generated `data/curated/rust_book_kk_pack.json`: 60 sentence-level samples from chapter 1, in the standard adam corpus-pack format with full attribution metadata.
- Pack registered in `SOURCE_PACKS` of `build_morpheme_index.rs`, `morpheme_coverage.rs`, and `mine_lexicon_gaps.rs`.

### Morpheme index impact

- Indexed samples: 3 117 вЖТ **3 251** (+134 incl. 60 from rust_book_kk; remainder from per-pack indexing-limit interactions).
- Distinct morphemes: 3 082 вЖТ **3 213** (+131).
- Total postings: 16 262 вЖТ **17 637** (+1 375).
- 60 chapter-1 sentences are present in `sample_texts`; 247 morphemes now reference rust_book samples.

### Tests + counters

- 1 new e2e test (`rust_book_chapter_01_indexed_in_morpheme_index`) вАФ verifies вЙ•50 rust_book samples in the index and that chapter-1-specific morphemes (`—В”Щ—Г–µ–ї–і—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї`, `–Њ—А–љ–∞—В—Г`) have postings.
- 4 new unit tests inside `process_rust_book_kk.rs`.
- Workspace tests: 740 вЖТ **745** passing.
- Cognitive eval / REPL replay unchanged.

### Retrieval behaviour notes

The retrieval ranker prefers `world_core` definitions over corpus citations вАФ that is the correct priority. Chapter-1 sentences surface when (a) the query hits a Rust-specific morpheme that has no `world_core` definition AND (b) the chapter sentence outranks competing samples. As more chapters land, this ratio shifts in the chapter content's favour. No ranker tuning was done in this patch вАФ observed behaviour is the existing ranker working as designed.

### Known limitation carried from v4.7.0

Direct Latin-name queries (¬ЂRust –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї, ¬ЂCargo –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї, ¬Ђrustc –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї) still don't tokenize through the Cyrillic-only FST. The v4.7.1 chapter has these terms in backticks (e.g. ``` `Rust` ```, ``` `Cargo` ```) which keeps them in the index but doesn't fix tokenization on the input side. ASCII-identifier passthrough remains deferred.

## [4.7.0] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ `programming_rust.jsonl` glossary + corpus-purity carve-out for technical text (phase 1 of Rust knowledge ingestion)

Fifth v4.x minor. Strategic ask from user: ¬Ђ–Њ–±—Г—З–Є—В—М –љ–∞—И—Г –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М —П–Ј—Л–Ї—Г –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є—П Rust¬ї. Honest scope: adam can't generate code (retrieval-only architecture, `project_retrieval_not_neural_v2`), but it CAN serve as a deterministic Kazakh-language Rust glossary вАФ and Kazakh-language Rust documentation virtually doesn't exist outside this domain. v4.7.0 = phase 1 (curated glossary). Phases 2+ = Rust Book chapter translations as patch releases (v4.7.1, v4.7.2, вА¶).

### `data/world_core/programming_rust.jsonl` (110 entries / 110 facts)

110 curated entries covering: Rust core (Rust, Cargo, rustc, —Б–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы/crate, –Љ–Њ–і—Г–ї—М, —В”Щ—Г–µ–ї–і—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї), ownership / borrowing / lifetimes (–Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї, –Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—Ц, —Б—Ц–ї—В–µ–Љ–µ, “Ы–∞—А—Л–Ј“У–∞ –∞–ї—Г, “Ы–∞—А—Л–Ј —В–µ–Ї—Б–µ—А–≥—Ц—И, —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Љ–µ—А–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц, ”©–Ј–≥–µ—А–Љ–µ–ї—Ц/—В“±—А–∞“Ы—В—Л —Б—Ц–ї—В–µ–Љ–µ, –Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї—В—Ц –∞—Г—Л—Б—В—Л—А—Г, –Ї”©—И—Ц—А—Г —Б–µ–Љ–∞–љ—В–Є–Ї–∞—Б—Л, —Б—В–µ–Ї, “ѓ–є–Љ–µ), variables and functions (–∞–є–љ—Л–Љ–∞–ї—Л, —В“±—А–∞“Ы—В—Л, –Ї”©–ї–µ“£–Ї–µ–ї–µ—Г, —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П, main —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П—Б—Л, –њ–∞—А–∞–Љ–µ—В—А, “Ы–∞–є—В–∞—А—Г –Љ”Щ–љ—Ц, ”©—А–љ–µ–Ї, —Б”©–є–ї–µ–Љ), primitive types (i32, i64, u32, u64, usize, f32, f64, bool, char, str, String, –Ї–Њ—А—В–µ–ґ, –ґ–Є—Л–Љ, —В—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ), collections (Vec, HashMap, BTreeMap, HashSet, VecDeque), structs and enums (—Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В, ”©—А—Ц—Б, –Ї–Њ—А—В–µ–ґ-—Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В, –±—Ц—А–ї—Ц–Ї —Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В, ”Щ–і—Ц—Б, –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П, impl –±–ї–Њ–≥—Л, –µ–љ–∞–Љ, –µ–љ–∞–Љ –љ“±—Б“Ы–∞—Б—Л, Option/Some/None, Result/Ok/Err), control flow (if ”©—А–љ–µ–≥—Ц, match ”©—А–љ–µ–≥—Ц, loop, while, for, break, continue, “ѓ–ї–≥—Ц), traits and generics (—В—А–µ–є—В, —В—А–µ–є—В-–љ—Л—Б–∞–љ, derive –Љ–∞–Ї—А–Њ—Б—Л, –ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л–ї–∞–Љ–∞ —В–Є–њ, —В–Є–њ –њ–∞—А–∞–Љ–µ—В—А—Ц, —И–µ–Ї—В–µ—Г), error handling (“Ы–∞—В–µ ”©“£–і–µ—Г, panic, unwrap, expect, ? –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А—Л, Drop —В—А–µ–є—В—Ц), smart pointers and concurrency (Box, Rc, Arc, RefCell, Mutex, –∞“У—Л–љ, –Ї–∞–љ–∞–ї, async —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П, await, Future), iterators (–Є—В–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А, map, filter, collect, –ґ–∞–±—Г), unsafe blocks, modules / visibility (use, pub, mod, crates.io), and Cargo workflow (cargo build / run / test / check, clippy, rustfmt).

Terminology decisions (locked at start of phase 1; will guide all chapter translations in phase 2):
- `ownership` вЖТ **–Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї**, `borrow / borrowing` вЖТ **“Ы–∞—А—Л–Ј“У–∞ –∞–ї—Г**, `borrow checker` вЖТ **“Ы–∞—А—Л–Ј —В–µ–Ї—Б–µ—А–≥—Ц—И**.
- `reference` вЖТ **—Б—Ц–ї—В–µ–Љ–µ**, `lifetime` вЖТ **—В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Љ–µ—А–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц**, `mutable` / `immutable` вЖТ **”©–Ј–≥–µ—А–Љ–µ–ї—Ц** / **—В“±—А–∞“Ы—В—Л**.
- `crate` вЖТ **—Б–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы** (preserves the wooden-crate metaphor of the original).
- `trait` вЖТ **—В—А–µ–є—В** (transliteration; native `“Ы–∞—Б–Є–µ—В` already saturated in general use).
- `enum` / `struct` вЖТ **–µ–љ–∞–Љ** / **—Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В** (transliterations).
- Code identifiers (`Vec<T>`, `Option::Some`, `match`, `let`, `fn`) вАФ **never translated**, kept verbatim in backticks.

### Corpus-purity carve-out for technical text

`validate_world_core::non_kazakh_reason` now skips characters inside paired backticks. The carve-out applies ONLY inside backtick spans; bare Latin prose outside backticks is still flagged. This lets the `programming_rust.jsonl` domain (and future technical domains) embed Rust keywords / type names / commands verbatim while keeping the Kazakh-only directive intact for free prose. Documented in `data/world_core/README.md` as the v4.7.0 schema rule.

### Pipeline impact

- `data/retrieval/facts.json`: 15 721 вЖТ **15 831** (+110 from the new domain).
- `data/retrieval/derived_facts.json`: 22 962 вЖТ **23 418** (+456 derived facts via R1/R2/R5/R8 inheritance through new IsA hubs `–±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Г —В—Ц–ї—Ц / –Љ”Щ–ї—Ц–Љ–µ—В —В“ѓ—А—Ц / “±–ґ—Л–Љ–і—Л“Ы —В–Є–њ / –±–∞—Б“Ы–∞—А—Г “Ы“±—А—Л–ї—Л–Љ—Л / –ґ–∞–і –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—Ц / —В—А–µ–є—В`).
- world_core total: **1142 entries / 1305 facts across 33 domains**.
- 52 new compounds added to `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES`.
- 24 new noun roots added to `data/tokenizer/segmentation_roots.json` (—Б–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы, –Љ–Њ–і—Г–ї—М, —В—А–µ–є—В, –µ–љ–∞–Љ, —Б—В—А—Г–Ї—В, –Ї–Њ—А—В–µ–ґ, —В—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ, –Є—В–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А, –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—В–Њ—А, –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є—П, –њ–∞—А–∞–Љ–µ—В—А, —А–µ—Б—Г—А—Б, –Ї–∞–љ–∞–ї, –ґ–∞–±—Г, —И–µ–Ї—В–µ—Г, ”©—А—Ц—Б, –Ї”©—И—Ц—А—Г, ”Щ–і—Ц—Б, –±–∞–њ—В–∞—Г, —В–∞—А–Љ–∞“Ы, —И–∞–Љ–∞, –±–ї–Њ–Ї, –Ї—Ц–ї—В—Б”©–Ј, –ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л–ї–∞–Љ–∞).

### Known limitations (resolved in later phases)

- **Direct Latin-name queries** (¬ЂRust –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї, ¬ЂCargo –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї, ¬Ђrustc –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї) don't tokenize through the Cyrillic-only FST and fall through to the Unknown path. Kazakh-paraphrased queries (–Ш–µ–ї—Ц–Ї / –Ґ—А–µ–є—В / –°—Ц–ї—В–µ–Љ–µ / –Ґ—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Љ–µ—А–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц / –°–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы) work correctly. Resolution: ASCII-identifier passthrough in the parser, deferred to a later patch once Rust Book chapter content surfaces enough Latin-prose context to justify it.
- **No code generation.** adam will not write Rust code on demand вАФ that remains outside the retrieval-only architecture. The glossary supports definitional and conceptual queries, not ¬Ђwrite me an HTTP server¬ї asks.

### Tests + counters

- 1 new e2e test (`programming_rust_kazakh_paraphrased_facts_surface`).
- 1 new REPL replay dialog (`programming_rust_kazakh_paraphrased_v4_7_0`).
- REPL replay: 68/68 вЖТ **69/69 canonical**.
- Workspace: 739 вЖТ **740 tests passing**.

Why minor: new world_core domain (most domains have shipped as patches, but this one ships with the corpus-purity rule which is an architectural carve-out) + 24-root lexicon expansion + 52-compound MULTIWORD_ENTITIES growth + 110-fact knowledge base вАФ qualifies as a minor by the post-1.0 cadence rule.

## [4.6.20] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Bundle of 5 more innovations (20 total on the v4.6.x minor): reflexive identity question + adj+noun compound noun-hint + SelfComparison aspect + preamble stripper + UserAcknowledgement intent

Real-REPL 2026-04-29 (fifth transcript) surfaced 5 distinct defects all sharing a theme: adam couldn't make sense of long, multi-clause Kazakh sentences. Greedy first-noun-hint extraction grabbed closed-class adverbs (`”Щ–ї—Ц`) or modifier-stripped head nouns (`–Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г` from ¬Ђ–Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г`), then surfaced random poetry/contract quotes. v4.6.20 attacks the defect class with five targeted fixes вАФ no architectural rewrite, no synthetic-grammar parser, just better pre-classification. Per the cumulative-counter cadence: 15 (v4.6.15) + 5 = **v4.6.20**.

### Innovation 1 вАФ Reflexive identity question detector

¬Ђ”®–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –і–µ–њ —Б–∞–љ–∞–є—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї / ¬Ђ”®–Ј—Ц“£–і—Ц “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є —В–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л—А–∞—Б—Л“£?¬ї / ¬Ђ”®–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є –Ї”©—А–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?¬ї. The marker is `”©–Ј—Ц“£–і—Ц / ”©–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–і—Ц` (reflexive accusative) plus a 2nd-person verb. Extends `detect_ask_about_system` to route these to `SystemAspect::General`. Pre-v4.6.20 fell through to ¬Ђ–С”Щ–ї–Ї—Ц–Љ, ”©–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј –±–∞¬ї (misclassified as a request that the user describe themselves).

### Innovation 2 вАФ Adj+noun compound noun-hint

`discourse::find_adj_noun_compound` returns the longest matching closed-list compound (`–Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г`, `–ґ–∞—Б–∞–љ–і—Л –Є–љ—В–µ–ї–ї–µ–Ї—В`, `—В–∞–±–Є“У–Є —В—Ц–ї`, `—В–µ—А–µ“£ –Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г`, `–љ–µ–є—А–Њ–љ–і—Л“Ы –ґ–µ–ї—Ц`, вА¶) found in the input. Wired as the FIRST strategy in `best_noun_hint`, ahead of topic-marker / locative-attributive / multiword / first-noun. Pre-v4.6.20 reduced ¬Ђ–Ь–∞—И–Є–љ–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л вА¶¬ї to noun_hint=`–Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г` (head only), losing the modifier and retrieving generic education quotes.

### Innovation 3 вАФ `SystemAspect::SelfComparison`

Ninth `SystemAspect` variant + `system_self_comparison` slot + `ask_about_system.self_comparison` template family. Detector lives in `discourse::input_is_self_comparison_question` as a pair (comparison marker `–∞—А—В—Л“Ы/–ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л—А–∞“Ы/–Њ–Ј–∞—Б—Л“£` + addressee marker including the `-—Б—Л“£/-—Б—Л–Ј` ability suffix). Honest framing вАФ adam articulates the *trade-off* (narrow Kazakh-only competence with strong invariants vs. broad LLM coverage) rather than claiming superiority. Closes from real-REPL: ¬Ђ–С–∞—Б“Ы–∞ –ґ–∞—Б–∞–љ–і—Л –Є–љ—В–µ–ї–ї–µ–Ї—В –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М–і–µ—А—Ц–љ–µ–љ –љ–µ—Б—Ц–Љ–µ–љ –∞—А—В—Л“Ы—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї, ¬Ђ“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞–љ—Л—Б—В–∞“У—Л –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М–і–µ—А–і–µ–љ “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є –ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л—А–∞“Ы –±–Њ–ї–∞ –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї.

### Innovation 4 вАФ Discourse preamble stripper

`discourse::strip_preamble` runs at the top of `Conversation::turn_with_trace` BEFORE FST parsing. Closed list of 24 leading preambles (`–∞–є—В–∞–є—Л–љ –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ`, `“Ы—Л—Б“Ы–∞—И–∞ –∞–є—В“Ы–∞–љ–і–∞`, `—И—Л–љ—Л–љ–і–∞`, `—Б“±—А–∞“У—Л–Љ –Љ—Л–љ–∞—Г`, `–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л –∞–ї“У–∞–љ–і–∞`, `–∞–є—В–њ–∞“Ы—И—Л`, вА¶); when matched at input start with a clause separator after, the preamble is removed and the residual goes to the parser. Russian/math/anaphor detection still see the raw input (those operate on surface signals where preambles never interfere). Closes from real-REPL: ¬Ђ–Р–є—В–∞–є—Л–љ –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ, “Ы–Њ–ї–і–∞–љ—Л—Б—В–∞“У—Л –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М–і–µ—А–і–µ–љ “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є –ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л—А–∞“Ы –±–Њ–ї–∞ –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї вАФ preamble stripped, residual routes to SelfComparison.

### Innovation 5 вАФ `UserAcknowledgement` intent + template family

New `Intent::UserAcknowledgement` variant + `user_acknowledgement` template family. Detector: addressee marker (`—Б–µ–љ—Ц“£ / —Б–µ–љ—Ц / —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ / —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц`) + 1sg perfective realisation verb (`—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ / –±—Ц–ї–і—Ц–Љ / –Ї”©—А–і—Ц–Љ / –±–∞–є“Ы–∞–і—Л–Љ / “±“Ы—В—Л–Љ / –∞“£“У–∞—А–і—Л–Љ / —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ`) + not-a-question. Polite acknowledgement reply (¬Ђ—А–∞—Е–Љ–µ—В, —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–≥–µ–љ—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–≥–µ “Ы—Г–∞–љ—Л—И—В—Л–Љ—Л–љ. –Ь–µ–љ ”Щ–ї—Ц –і–∞–Љ—Л–њ –Ї–µ–ї–µ–Љ—Ц–љ вА¶¬ї). Pre-v4.6.20 grabbed the closed-class adverb `”Щ–ї—Ц` from ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ —Б–µ–љ—Ц“£ ”Щ–ї—Ц –±”Щ—А—Ц–љ –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є—В—Ц–љ—Ц“£–і—Ц вА¶ —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ¬ї and surfaced a random poetry quote about feelings.

### Tests + counters

- 5 new e2e tests (`reflexive_self_question_routes_to_ask_about_system_general`, `adj_noun_compound_noun_hint_preserves_modifier`, `self_comparison_question_routes_to_self_comparison_aspect`, `preamble_stripper_unmasks_underlying_question`, `user_acknowledgement_routes_to_dedicated_template`).
- 5 new REPL replay dialogs.
- `discourse.rs` helpers: 3 вЖТ **7** (`strip_preamble`, `input_is_user_acknowledgement`, `input_is_self_comparison_question`, `find_adj_noun_compound` added).
- `SystemAspect` variants: 8 вЖТ **9** (+ `SelfComparison`).
- `Intent` variants: 26 вЖТ **27** (+ `UserAcknowledgement`).
- Template families: 57 вЖТ **59** (+ `ask_about_system.self_comparison`, `user_acknowledgement`).
- REPL replay: 63/63 вЖТ **68/68 canonical**.
- Workspace: 734 вЖТ **739 tests passing**.

## [4.6.15] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Bundle of 3 more innovations (15 total on the v4.6.x minor): integer arithmetic calculator + `mathematics_basic` world_core domain + `informatics_basic` world_core domain

User strategic ask: ¬Ђ–љ–µ–Њ–±—Е–Њ–і–Є–Љ–Њ –і–∞—В—М –µ–Љ—Г –Ј–љ–∞–љ–Є—П —И–Ї–Њ–ї—М–љ–Њ–є –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ—Л –њ–Њ –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–µ –Є –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–µ вА¶ –Ю–љ –і–Њ–ї–ґ–µ–љ –њ–Њ–љ–Є–Љ–∞—В—М –і–Є–∞–ї–Њ–≥, —В–Њ–≥–Њ, —З—В–Њ –Њ—В –љ–µ–≥–Њ —Е–Њ—В—П—В¬ї. v4.6.12 detected math expressions and refused; v4.6.15 evaluates them deterministically and adds two new world_core domains so adam knows what the school terms *mean*. Per the v4.6.5-clarified cadence, patch sub-counter is **cumulative on the minor**: v4.6.12 + 3 = **v4.6.15**.

### Innovation 1 вАФ `Tool::Calculate` integer arithmetic

New `discourse::try_evaluate_arithmetic`: deterministic two-pass tokeniser/evaluator over `+ - * / :` (`:` normalised to `/`), respects `*//` precedence over `+/-`, rejects non-integer results, division-by-zero, and overflow. When the v4.6.12 math detector fires, the conversation layer first attempts evaluation; on success the planner routes to a new `math_answer` template family with the computed `{math_value}` slot. On failure (Kazakh math verbs without parseable digits) the existing `math_refusal` route still fires.

Closes from real-REPL: ¬Ђ5+5 вЖТ 10¬ї, ¬Ђ7 + 3 = вЖТ 10¬ї, ¬Ђ6:2= вЖТ 3¬ї, ¬Ђ12*4 вЖТ 48¬ї, ¬Ђ100-37 вЖТ 63¬ї, ¬Ђ2+3*4 вЖТ 14¬ї. No external numeric library вАФ pure stdlib `i64` arithmetic.

### Innovation 2 вАФ `mathematics_basic.jsonl` world_core domain (37 entries / 37 facts)

New domain: –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞, —Б–∞–љ, –∞–Љ–∞–ї, “Ы–Њ—Б—Г/–∞–Ј–∞–є—В—Г/–Ї”©–±–µ–є—В—Г/–±”©–ї—Г, —В–µ“£–і—Ц–Ї, —В–µ“£–і–µ—Г, –±”©–ї—И–µ–Ї, –њ–∞–є—Л–Ј, –∞–ї–≥–µ–±—А–∞/–≥–µ–Њ–Љ–µ—В—А–Є—П/—В—А–Є–≥–Њ–љ–Њ–Љ–µ—В—А–Є—П, —Д–Є–≥—Г—А–∞, –љ“ѓ–Ї—В–µ, —В“ѓ–Ј—Г, –±“±—А—Л—И, —И–µ“£–±–µ—А, –і”©“£–≥–µ–ї–µ–Ї, “ѓ—И–±“±—А—Л—И/—В”©—А—В–±“±—А—Л—И/—И–∞—А—И—Л/—В—Ц–Ї—В”©—А—В–±“±—А—Л—И/–Ї”©–њ–±“±—А—Л—И, –ґ“±–њ/—В–∞“Ы/–ґ–∞–є/–±“ѓ—В—Ц–љ/–љ–∞—В—Г—А–∞–ї —Б–∞–љ, –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В—Г –Ї–µ—Б—В–µ—Б—Ц, –∞—Г–і–∞–љ/–Ї”©–ї–µ–Љ/–њ–µ—А–Є–Љ–µ—В—А, —И–∞–Љ–∞, —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П. All curated, `approved` by `shaman`, `confidence: high`.

### Innovation 3 вАФ `informatics_basic.jsonl` world_core domain (40 entries / 40 facts)

New domain: –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞, –∞“Ы–њ–∞—А–∞—В, –і–µ—А–µ–Ї, –∞–ї–≥–Њ—А–Є—В–Љ, –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞, –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Г, –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї–∞—Г —В—Ц–ї—Ц, –Ї–Њ–Љ–њ—М—О—В–µ—А, –њ—А–Њ—Ж–µ—Б—Б–Њ—А, –ґ–∞–і, –і–Є—Б–Ї—Ц, —Д–∞–є–ї, “Ы–∞–ї—В–∞, –±–Є—В/–±–∞–є—В, –∞–є–љ—Л–Љ–∞–ї—Л, —В“±—А–∞“Ы—В—Л, —Ж–Є–Ї–ї, —И–∞—А—В, —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П, –ґ–Є—Л–Љ, –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А –±–∞–Ј–∞—Б—Л, –ґ–µ–ї—Ц, –Є–љ—В–µ—А–љ–µ—В, —Б–∞–є—В, —И–Њ–ї“У—Л—И, —Б–µ—А–≤–µ—А, –Ї–Њ–і—В–∞—Г, —И–Є—Д—А–ї–∞—Г, –њ–∞—А–Њ–ї—М, –≤–Є—А—Г—Б/–∞–љ—В–Є–≤–Є—А—Г—Б, –Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є—П–ї—Л“Ы –ґ“ѓ–є–µ, –і—А–∞–є–≤–µ—А, “Ы–Њ–ї–і–∞–љ–±–∞, –њ–µ—А–љ–µ—В–∞“Ы—В–∞/—В—Ц–љ—В—Г—Ц—А/–Љ–Њ–љ–Є—В–Њ—А/–њ—А–Є–љ—В–µ—А/—Б–Ї–∞–љ–µ—А. All curated, `approved` by `shaman`, `confidence: high`.

### Pipeline impact

- `data/retrieval/facts.json`: 15 644 вЖТ **15 721** (+77 from the two new domains).
- `data/retrieval/derived_facts.json`: 22 387 вЖТ **22 962** (+575 derived facts via R1/R2/R5/R8 inheritance through the new IsA hubs `“У—Л–ї—Л–Љ / –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞ / “Ы“±—А—Л–ї“У—Л / –∞—А–Є—Д–Љ–µ—В–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –∞–Љ–∞–ї / –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы “±“У—Л–Љ / –≥–µ–Њ–Љ–µ—В—А–Є—П–ї—Л“Ы —Д–Є–≥—Г—А–∞`).
- world_core total: **1 032 entries / 1 195 facts across 32 domains**.
- 41 new compounds added to `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES` (e.g. `–∞—А–Є—Д–Љ–µ—В–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –∞–Љ–∞–ї`, `–≥–µ–Њ–Љ–µ—В—А–Є—П–ї—Л“Ы —Д–Є–≥—Г—А–∞`, `–±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞–ї—Л“Ы —И–∞–Љ–∞`, `–Њ–њ–µ—А–∞—Ж–Є—П–ї—Л“Ы –ґ“ѓ–є–µ`) so the longest-match scan picks the compound before any contained simpler form.
- 3 loanword roots added to `data/tokenizer/segmentation_roots.json` (–Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞, –Ї–Њ–Љ–њ—М—О—В–µ—А, —Д—Г–љ–Ї—Ж–Є—П) вАФ math-side loanwords like `–∞–ї–≥–Њ—А–Є—В–Љ`, `–±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞`, `—Д–∞–є–ї`, `—Ж–Є–Ї–ї`, `—И–∞—А—В` were already present.

### Tests

- New e2e: `calculator_evaluates_pure_arithmetic` (6 inputs / 6 expected integer results).
- New e2e: `mathematics_and_informatics_world_core_facts_surface` (5 ¬ЂX –і–µ–≥–µ–љ—Ц–Љ—Ц–Ј –љ–µ?¬ї queries through the retrieval-aware `Conversation`).
- Updated e2e: `math_input_routes_to_math_refusal` now restricted to inputs that contain math vocabulary but no parseable digit expression (Kazakh-numeral-word forms) вАФ pure-arithmetic strings now exercise the calculator path.
- New REPL replay dialog: `math_calculator_pure_arithmetic_v4_6_15` (4 turns).
- New REPL replay dialog: `world_core_math_informatics_definitions_v4_6_15` (3 turns).
- All 155 dialog lib tests pass; full workspace `cargo test --release` green.

## [4.6.12] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Bundle of 7 more innovations (12 total on the v4.6.x minor): polite-plural greeting / template grammar fix / Russian-input refusal / Birthdate verbs / self-age form / math refusal / case-suffix hygiene

Real-REPL 2026-04-29 (third transcript) surfaced 7 distinct issues. All landed in one bundle. Per the v4.6.5-clarified cadence: patch sub-counter is **cumulative on the minor**, so v4.6.5 + 7 = **v4.6.12**.

### Innovation 1 вАФ AskHowAreYou polite-plural ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–ї—Л“£—Л–Ј “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є?¬ї

`detect_ask_how_are_you` extended with the polite-plural surface form. Pre-v4.6.12 ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–ї—Л“£—Л–Ј “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є?¬ї fell through to refusal.

### Innovation 2 вАФ `greeting.intro_proposal` template grammar fix

Pre-v4.6.12 the 4th variant said ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л–Љ –∞–і–∞–Љ вАФ —Б—Ц–Ј “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є —В–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–Љ—Л–Ј?¬ї вАФ grammatically incoherent (2sg-polite pronoun ¬Ђ—Б—Ц–Ј¬ї + 1pl-future verb ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–Љ—Л–Ј¬ї). Replaced with ¬Ђ—Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є –∞—В–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ?¬ї (¬Ђwhat shall I call you?¬ї) вАФ same conversational function, grammatically correct.

### Innovation 3 вАФ Russian-input refusal

New `discourse::input_is_likely_russian` detector. Two-signal logic: (a) any high-frequency Russian function word appears (`—Н—В–Њ / —З—В–Њ / –Ї—В–Њ / –Ї–∞–Ї / –≥–і–µ / –њ–Њ—З–µ–Љ—Г / —В–µ–±—П / –Љ–µ–љ—П / –Њ—З–µ–љ—М / —Б–њ–∞—Б–Є–±–Њ / –њ—А–Є–≤–µ—В / –њ–Њ–Ї–∞ / ...`); (b) input contains zero Kazakh-specific letters (`”Щ / “£ / “У / ”© / “ѓ / “± / “Ы / —Ц / “ї`). When both fire, conversation layer sets `__non_kazakh__` marker, planner routes to new `unknown.non_kazakh` template family which politely refuses in Kazakh and asks for Kazakh-language input.

Conservative вАФ mixed code-switching inputs (Kazakh sentence with one Russian word) still flow through the standard pipeline; only obviously-Russian inputs short-circuit.

### Innovation 4 вАФ Birthdate detector +verb forms

Mirrors the v4.6.5 Creator extension. Real-REPL: ¬Ђ–Р–ї –Њ–ї —Б–µ–љ—Ц “Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л?¬ї fell through pre-v4.6.12. Added: `“Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л / “Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –і–∞–Љ—Л—В—В—Л / “Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –і–∞–Љ—Л—В“Ы–∞–љ / “Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –і–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞–і—Л`.

### Innovation 5 вАФ AskAge +¬Ђ–љ–µ—И–µ –ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л“£/–ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј¬ї surface forms

Pre-v4.6.12 only matched `“Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л“£/–ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј`. Real-REPL: ¬Ђ–°—Ц–Ј –љ–µ—И–µ –ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї fell through. With no `session.age`, AskAge correctly falls through to the bare `ask_age` family (¬Ђ–Љ–µ–љ—Ц“£ –ґ–∞—Б—Л–Љ –∞–і–∞–Љ–Ј–∞—В –ґ–∞—Б—Л–љ–і–∞–є¬ї, ¬Ђ–Љ–µ–љ ”Щ–ї—Ц –ґ–∞—Б–њ—Л–љ¬ї) вАФ the right system-self response for adam.

### Innovation 6 вАФ Math-expression refusal

New `discourse::input_is_math_expression` detector. Two-signal logic:
1. Arithmetic operators (`+`, `-`, `*`, `/`, `:`, `=`) appearing within 3 bytes of digits.
2. Kazakh math verbs (`–Ї”©–±–µ–є—В—Г / –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В—Б–µ–Љ / –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В–Ї–µ–љ–і–µ / –±”©–ї—Г / –±”©–ї—Б–µ–Љ / –±”©–ї—Ц“£—Ц–Ј / “Ы–Њ—Б—Г / “Ы–Њ—Б—Б–∞–Љ / –∞–ї—Г / –∞–ї—Б–∞–Љ / –µ—Б–µ–њ—В–µ / ...`) alongside digits OR Kazakh numeral words (`–±—Ц—А / –µ–Ї—Ц / ... / –∞–ї—В—Л / –ґ–µ—В—Ц / ... / –ґ“ѓ–Ј / –Љ—Л“£`). The numeral-word check uses prefix-match (вЙ§+3 chars) to handle case-inflected forms like `–∞–ї—В—Л–љ—Л` (six-acc) and `–µ–Ї—Ц–≥–µ` (two-dat).

When fired, conversation layer sets `__math_input__` marker, planner routes to new `math_refusal` template family. Closes:
- ¬Ђ5+5¬ї / ¬Ђ7 + 3 =¬ї / ¬Ђ6:2=¬ї (pure arithmetic)
- ¬Ђ5-—В—Ц 7-–≥–µ –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В–Ї–µ–љ–і–µ –љ–µ—И–µ –±–Њ–ї–∞–і—Л?¬ї (Kazakh math verb + numerals)
- ¬Ђ–Р–ї—В—Л–љ—Л –µ–Ї—Ц–≥–µ –±”©–ї—Ц“£—Ц–Ј, –љ”Щ—В–Є–ґ–µ—Б—Ц “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?¬ї (also resolves the –∞–ї—В—Л/–∞–ї—В—Л–љ homonym ambiguity by short-circuiting BEFORE topic extraction вАФ pre-v4.6.12 surfaced ¬Ђ–Р–ї—В—Л–љ вАФ —Б–∞—А—Л —В“ѓ—Б¬ї)

### Innovation 7 вАФ Closed-class case-suffix hygiene

Bare case suffixes (`–≥–µ / –Ї–µ / –і–µ / —В–µ / –і–∞ / —В–∞ / –±–µ / –Љ–∞`) added to `NOT_A_TOPIC`. Real-REPL: ¬Ђ5-—В—Ц 7-–≥–µ –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В–Ї–µ–љ–і–µ¬ї pre-v4.6.12 extracted bare `–≥–µ` as topic вАФ now suppressed.

| `–Ґ–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–є—Л“Ы.` (template seed-3) | ¬Ђ...—Б—Ц–Ј “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є —В–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–Љ—Л–Ј?¬ї (ungrammatical) | ¬Ђ...—Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є –∞—В–∞–є–Љ—Л–љ?¬ї |
| `–≠—В–Њ –Њ—З–µ–љ—М –Ї—А—Г—В–Њ, –∞ –Ї—В–Њ —В–µ–±—П —Б–Њ–Ј–і–∞–ї?` | half-RU half-KZ hybrid | ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—И–∞ “У–∞–љ–∞ –±—Ц–ї–µ–Љ—Ц–љ; –Њ—А—Л—Б—И–∞ –љ–µ–Љ–µ—Б–µ –∞“У—Л–ї—И—Л–љ—И–∞ —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–є–Љ—Ц–љ.¬ї |
| `–Р–ї –Њ–ї —Б–µ–љ—Ц “Ы–∞—И–∞–љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л?` | "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ." | ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ—Ц“£ —В—Г“У–∞–љ –Ї“ѓ–љ—Ц–Љ вАФ 2026-04-07.¬ї |
| `–°—Ц–Ј –љ–µ—И–µ –ґ–∞—Б—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј?` | tangential proverb | ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ—Ц“£ –ґ–∞—Б—Л–Љ –∞–і–∞–Љ–Ј–∞—В –ґ–∞—Б—Л–љ–і–∞–є.¬ї |
| `5+5` / `7+3=` / `6:2=` | "–Ґ“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ" / "–С–∞—Б“Ы–∞ —Б“±—А–∞“Ы “Ы–Њ–є—Б–∞“£—Л–Ј" | math refusal |
| `5-—В—Ц 7-–≥–µ –Ї”©–±–µ–є—В–Ї–µ–љ–і–µ –љ–µ—И–µ –±–Њ–ї–∞–і—Л?` | proverb + bare-suffix `–≥–µ` topic | math refusal |
| `–Р–ї—В—Л–љ—Л –µ–Ї—Ц–≥–µ –±”©–ї—Ц“£—Ц–Ј, –љ”Щ—В–Є–ґ–µ—Б—Ц “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | ¬Ђ–Р–ї—В—Л–љ вАФ —Б–∞—А—Л —В“ѓ—Б¬ї (gold) | math refusal |

### Tests

- 5 new e2e regressions covering all 7 innovations.
- 4 new lib tests in `discourse::math_tests` (positive math forms + non-math discrimination).
- 4 new lib tests in `discourse::russian_tests` (positive Russian + Kazakh + mixed + empty).
- 7 new REPL replay dialogs from the actual transcript.
- 0 new cognitive scenarios (the affected behaviour is surface-text-level; locks at REPL replay layer).

Workspace **715 вЖТ 727** (+12). REPL replay **55/55 вЖТ 62/62 canonical** (+7). Cognitive eval **65/65** (unchanged вАФ locks at REPL replay).

### Out of scope, deferred to a future release

The user also asked for **school math + informatics curriculum knowledge** and **graph-based dialogue logic understanding**. Push back: adam already has graphs (lexical / fact / reasoning) and a finite-state dialogue model (`task::TaskState` / `task::TaskVariant`); what's missing is broader intent coverage + curated math/informatics knowledge as world_core data. Concrete plan for a future bundle:
- New world_core domains `mathematics_basic.jsonl` + `informatics_basic.jsonl` (definitions / concepts / multiplication tables as facts).
- Optional: deterministic `Tool::Calculate` dispatch for integer arithmetic вАФ patch-tier, no novel-generation guarantee broken.
- Goal-tracking enhancement in `task.rs` to track conversational goals across multiple turns.

These would be cumulative innovations on top of v4.6.12, bundled as v4.6.13+ in the next bundle.

## [4.6.5] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Bundle of 5 innovations: Creator detector +3 verbs / capitalization / period gate / Principles aspect / forbidden-pattern filter

First release under the new patch-bundling cadence (memory `feedback_versioning_post_1_0` updated 2026-04-29): patches bundle, version reflects the count of innovations. Five innovations bundled here вЖТ **v4.6.0 вЖТ v4.6.5** (skipping 1вАУ4 by user-confirmed convention).

### Innovation 1 вАФ Creator detector +3 verb forms

Real-REPL 2026-04-29 (second transcript) carried ¬Ђ–Р–ї —Б–µ–љ—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л?¬ї / ¬Ђ–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –і–∞–Љ—Л—В“Ы–∞–љ?¬ї / ¬Ђ–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц “Ы–∞–є –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л –і–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞–і—Л?¬ї вАФ all 3 fell through to refusal. v4.6.5 extends the Creator branch in `detect_ask_about_system` with `–ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л` (created), `–і–∞–Љ—Л—В“Ы–∞–љ / –і–∞–Љ—Л—В—В—Л` (developed), `–і–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞–і—Л` (prepared), `–ґ–∞—А–∞—В—Г—И—Л“£` (creator-as-noun), `“Ы–∞–є –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л` (which programmer). Routes to `AskAboutSystem(Creator)`.

### Innovation 2 вАФ Capitalization filter

Every reply now starts with an uppercase letter (sentence-case). New `capitalise_first_letter` orthographic pass in `realiser::realise`:
- Steps past leading whitespace + punctuation (so quote-led replies ¬Ђ...¬ї capitalise the first letter of the actual word, not the quote).
- Cyrillic-Kazakh-aware: `“Ы`/`“£`/`“У`/`”©`/`“ѓ`/`“±`/`“ї` вЖТ `“Ъ`/`“Ґ`/`“Т`/`”®`/`“Ѓ`/`“∞`/`“Ї` via `char::to_uppercase`.
- No-op on empty or all-non-alphabetic strings.

Test helpers `assert_response_in_set` / `assert_response_with_toml` updated to apply the same orthographic transform to the `allowed` list, so test expectations stay readable in their lowercase template form. ~40 e2e tests updated to expect the capitalised + periodised forms.

### Innovation 3 вАФ Sentence-final period gate

Declarative replies вЙ•10 codepoints ending in an alphabetic character now get `.` appended. New `ensure_sentence_final` pass in the realiser. Short interjections (¬Ђ–°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ш”Щ¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ц–∞“Ы—Б—Л¬ї) stay as-is. Replies already ending in `.`/`!`/`?`/`вА¶`/`¬ї`/`"`/`)`/`]` are left alone.

### Innovation 4 вАФ `SystemAspect::Principles`

New 8th `SystemAspect` variant + `principles_summary` field on `SystemIdentity` (substantial Kazakh prose listing operational values adam upholds: respect humans, no fabrication, no incitement, privacy, no illegal-act assistance, audit trail, Kazakh-cultural respect, scope discipline). New `ask_about_system.principles` template family. Detector matches `–њ—А–Є–љ—Ж–Є–њ—В–µ—А—Ц“£ / “±—Б—В–∞–љ—Л–Љ–і–∞—А—Л“£ / –Ј–∞“£–і–∞—А—Л“£ / –µ—А–µ–ґ–µ–ї–µ—А—Ц“£ / “Ы“±–љ–і—Л–ї—Л“Ы—В–∞—А—Л“£`.

**Why an articulation layer matters even when the guarantees are safe-by-construction.** adam's deterministic retrieval-only design already prevents fabrication, novel-text generation, and out-of-envelope output. But a user asking ¬Ђ–њ—А–Є–љ—Ж–Є–њ—В–µ—А—Ц“£ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?¬ї can't see those guarantees from the outside. The Principles aspect makes the value contract **discoverable** without changing what the system can actually do.

### Innovation 5 вАФ Forbidden-pattern filter

New `ResponseQualityIssue::ForbiddenPatternLeak` variant + `contains_forbidden_pattern` check in `audit_response`. Defensive backstop catching outputs that bypass curation (slurs / hate-speech markers / incitement verbs). Pattern list intentionally minimal вАФ the real safety surface is at the curation layer; this filter just catches a regression. Match is case-insensitive substring.

### Verified end-to-end on the 2026-04-29 transcript

|---|---|---|
| `–Р–ї —Б–µ–љ—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л?` | "—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ" refusal | ¬Ђ–С–∞–є–Љ—Г—А–Ј–Є–љ –Ф–∞—Г–ї–µ—В –Р–±—Г–Ј–∞—А–Њ–≤–Є—З –Љ–µ–љ—Ц 2026-04-07 –Ї“ѓ–љ—Ц –ґ–∞—Б–∞–њ —И—Л“У–∞—А–і—Л.¬ї |
| `–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –і–∞–Љ—Л—В“Ы–∞–љ?` | "–±–∞—Б“Ы–∞ —Б“±—А–∞“Ы “Ы–Њ–є—Б–∞“£—Л–Ј" refusal | ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ—Ц –С–∞–є–Љ—Г—А–Ј–Є–љ –Ф–∞—Г–ї–µ—В –Р–±—Г–Ј–∞—А–Њ–≤–Є—З “Ы“±—А–і—Л; –Њ–ї –Љ–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞–≤—В–Њ—А—Л–Љ.¬ї |
| `–°—Ц–Ј–і—Ц “Ы–∞–є –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л –і–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞–і—Л?` | "–С”Щ–ї–Ї—Ц–Љ, –±–∞“У–і–∞—А–ї–∞–Љ–∞—И—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—ЛвА¶" tangential | ¬Ђ–Ь–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞–≤—В–Њ—А—Л–Љ вАФ –С–∞–є–Љ—Г—А–Ј–Є–љ –Ф–∞—Г–ї–µ—В –Р–±—Г–Ј–∞—А–Њ–≤–Є—З.¬ї |
| `–Я—А–Є–љ—Ж–Є–њ—В–µ—А—Ц“£ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | (no detector) | full principles list |
| `–°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ` | `—Б”Щ–ї–µ–Љ` (lowercase) | `–°”Щ–ї–µ–Љ` (sentence-case) |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–µ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?` | `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—ЛвА¶ –µ–ї` (no period) | `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—ЛвА¶ –µ–ї.` (period) |

## [4.6.0] вАФ 2026-04-29 вАФ Self-awareness layer + discourse anaphora + closed-class hygiene

The fourth v4.x minor. Real-REPL 2026-04-29 transcript surfaced 6 distinct defects + a strategic ask: "make adam understand that he's an entity with a name, knowledge, and abilities вАФ and that he should know what he can and cannot do yet". All landed in one release.

### Self-awareness layer вАФ three new SystemAspect variants

`SystemIdentity` extended with three new fields rendered as substantial Kazakh prose:
- `capabilities_summary` вАФ what adam can do (KZ morphology, slot recall, KZ geography knowledge, contradiction handling, refuse-out-of-scope, audit trail).
- `knowledge_summary` вАФ world_core domain inventory digest.
- `limitations_summary` вАФ what adam doesn't do yet (Kazakh-only; no novel generation; no online learning; no internet; no multimedia; no math; admits ignorance instead of fabricating).

`SystemAspect` enum gained three new variants:
- `Capabilities` вАФ surface forms `–љ–µ —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л“£?` / `–Љ“ѓ–Љ–Ї—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Ї—В–µ—А—Ц“£ –љ–µ?` / `“Ы–Њ–ї—Л“£–љ–∞–љ –љ–µ –Ї–µ–ї–µ–і—Ц?`.
- `Knowledge` вАФ surface forms `–љ–µ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц“£?` (standalone, no `—В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л`) / `“Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є —В–∞“Ы—Л—А—Л–њ—В–∞—А –ґ–∞–є–ї—Л –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц“£?`.
- `Limitations` вАФ surface forms `–љ–µ–љ—Ц —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–Љ–∞–є—Б—Л“£?` / `—И–µ–Ї—В–µ—Г–ї–µ—А—Ц“£ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` / `–љ–µ—Б—Ц“£ ”Щ–ї—Б—Ц–Ј?`.

The Limitations detector requires an explicit interrogative marker (`?` / `–љ–µ` / `–љ–µ–љ—Ц` / `“Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є` / `“Ы–∞–ї–∞–є` / `–±–µ` / `–Љ–∞`) so declarative criticism ¬Ђ—Б–µ–љ –µ—И—В–µ“£–µ –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є—Б—Ц“£¬ї (= "you know nothing") does NOT route here. That preserves the v4.4.10 `qysqasy_discourse_particle_does_not_capture_topic` cognitive scenario's Tentative floor.

Three new template families: `ask_about_system.capabilities` / `.knowledge` / `.limitations` вАФ each renders the corresponding SystemIdentity slot directly. Total template family count **50 вЖТ 53**.

### Discourse anaphora resolution

New module `crates/adam-dialog/src/discourse.rs` + new session slot `last_query_topic`. When the user's input contains a discourse anaphor (¬Ђ–Њ–љ–і–∞ / —Б–Њ–љ–і–∞ / –Њ—Б—Л–љ–і–∞ / –Љ“±–љ–і–∞ / –±“±–љ–і–∞ / –Њ–і–∞–љ / —Б–Њ–і–∞–љ / –±“±–і–∞–љ / –Њ—Б—Л–і–∞–љ¬ї), the conversation layer **overrides** the current turn's `noun_hint` with the previous turn's topic. Implementation is intentionally simple вАФ single-slot LRU; no coreference chains, no discourse stacks. The 80%-case observed in real REPL traces.

Pre-v4.6.0 trace:
```
T1: ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –љ–µ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?¬ї  вЖТ topic = “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, surfaced as basic IsA fact
T2: ¬Ђ–Р–ї –Њ–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы –±–∞—А?¬ї     вЖТ noun_hint = "–Њ–љ" (FST misanalysis of –Њ–љ–і–∞)
                                     вЖТ output: ¬Ђ–Ю–љ вАФ —Б–∞–љ¬ї (tangential)
```

Post-v4.6.0:
```
T1: same вЖТ session["last_query_topic"] = "“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ"
T2: ¬Ђ–Р–ї –Њ–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы –±–∞—А?¬ї     вЖТ discourse anaphor detected вЖТ noun_hint
                                     overridden to "“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ"; v4.4.11
                                     reranker scores ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї content overlap
                                     вЖТ surfaces ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л вАФ 17
                                     –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –њ–µ–љ 3 —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞¬ї
```

### Closed-class hygiene

Added to NOT_A_TOPIC:
- `”©—В–µ` (intensifier "very") вАФ pre-v4.6.0 leaked as topic on ¬Ђ–С“±–ї ”©—В–µ “Ы—Л–Ј—Л“Ы—В—Л, –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы –ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л –љ–µ —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї, surfaced a tangential proverb about borders.
- `–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л` (in-general adverb) вАФ same defect class.
- `–Њ–љ` / `—Б–Њ–љ` вАФ bare numeral roots that the FST misanalyses as `Locative(–Њ–љ/—Б–Њ–љ)` for surface forms `–Њ–љ–і–∞ / —Б–Њ–љ–і–∞`. v4.3.5 added the SURFACE forms but `first_noun_root` filters on the **root**, so the Locative analysis still surfaced `–Њ–љ` as a topic. The discourse-anaphora module above also leans on this filter вАФ without it, `first_noun_root` would return `–Њ–љ` and pre-empt the anaphora resolver.

### Compound self-introduction request

Extended `detect_ask_about_system` to fire on `”©–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В` opener pattern. Real-REPL: ¬Ђ”®–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—Л–њ –±–µ—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј—И—Ц, —Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц –Ї—Ц–Љ –ґ–∞—А–∞—В—В—Л, –љ–µ —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј?¬ї (compound self-intro + creator + capabilities) вАФ pre-v4.6.0 fell through to a generic clarification refusal. Post-v4.6.0 routes to AskAboutSystem(General); the user can drill into specific aspects in follow-up turns.

### World Core landmarks list-summary

New entry `geo_kz_110`: ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л –Ї”©—А—Ц–Ї—В—Ц –ґ–µ—А–ї–µ—А –Љ–µ–љ —В–∞–±–Є“У–Є –Њ—А—Л–љ–і–∞—А: –С—Г—А–∞–±–∞–є, –®–∞—А—Л–љ –Ї–∞–љ—М–Њ–љ—Л, –•–∞–љ –Ґ”Щ“£—Ц—А—Ц, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г—Л, вА¶¬ї. New entry `geo_kz_111` with country-area quantity. World Core **947 вЖТ 949 entries / 1116 вЖТ 1120 facts**.

### Verified end-to-end on the 2026-04-29 transcript

| User turn | Pre-v4.6.0 | Post-v4.6.0 |
|---|---|---|
| `–С“±–ї ”©—В–µ “Ы—Л–Ј—Л“Ы—В—Л, –±—Ц—А–∞“Ы –ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л –љ–µ —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л–Ј?` | tangential proverb keyed on `”©—В–µ` | capabilities list (Capabilities aspect fires; `”©—В–µ/–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л` filtered) |
| `–Э–µ —Ц—Б—В–µ–є –∞–ї–∞—Б—Л“£?` | ¬Ђ–±–∞—Б“Ы–∞ —Б“±—А–∞“Ы “Ы–Њ–є—Б–∞“£—Л–Ј¬ї refusal | full capabilities list |
| `“Ъ–∞–љ–і–∞–є —Б–∞–ї–∞–ї–∞—А–і—Л –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?` | tangential proverb | (still TBD вАФ see carry-forward below) |
| `–Р–ї –Њ–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы –±–∞—А?` | ¬Ђ–Ю–љ вАФ —Б–∞–љ¬ї | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л вАФ 17 –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –њ–µ–љ 3 —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є –Ї”©—А—Ц–Ї—В—Ц –ґ–µ—А–ї–µ—А –±–∞—А?` | basic IsA fact | landmarks list |
| `”®–Ј—Ц“£—Ц–Ј —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—Л–њ –±–µ—А—Ц“£—Ц–Ј—И—Ц, вА¶` | refusal | self-introduction (General aspect) |

### Tests

- 6 new e2e regressions: `discourse_intensifiers_and_demonstrative_locatives_not_topics`, `ask_capabilities_routes_to_capabilities_aspect`, `ask_knowledge_routes_to_knowledge_aspect_only_when_standalone`, `ask_limitations_requires_interrogative`, `discourse_anaphora_resolves_to_previous_query_topic`, `self_intro_request_routes_to_ask_about_system`.
- 3 new lib tests in `discourse.rs` covering positive/negative/punctuation cases.
- 1 new lib test `canonical_identity_has_substantial_self_awareness_summaries` locking the new SystemIdentity field shape + content.
- 4 new cognitive scenarios: `ask_capabilities_routes_вА¶`, `ask_knowledge_routes_вА¶`, `ask_limitations_routes_вА¶`, `discourse_anaphora_onda_resolves_вА¶`.
- 7 new REPL replay dialogs: capabilities/knowledge/limitations/self-intro/discourse-anaphora/√ґ—В–µ-–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л/landmarks.

Cognitive eval **59/59 вЖТ 63/63 canonical**. REPL replay **43/43 вЖТ 50/50 canonical**. Workspace **693 вЖТ 703**. Template families **50 вЖТ 53**.

### Carry-forward to v4.6.1+

¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–љ–і–∞–є —Б–∞–ї–∞–ї–∞—А–і—Л –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј?¬ї вАФ user is asking what knowledge domains adam covers. Currently routes to Unknown/topic-query (because `—Б–∞–ї–∞` is a content noun without `—В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л` modifier and without explicit Knowledge marker pattern). Adding a Knowledge-aspect detector for `—Б–∞–ї–∞ / —В–∞“Ы—Л—А—Л–њ + –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц“£ / –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј` would close it.

¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–ї–і–∞—А—Л“£—Л–Ј “Ы–∞–ї–∞–є?¬ї (plural addressee form of ¬Ђ–Ї–∞–Ї –≤–∞—И–Є –і–µ–ї–∞¬ї) вАФ currently misclassifies. Pre-existing minor issue, not regression.

## [4.5.0] вАФ 2026-04-28 вАФ `Case::LocativeAttributive` FST morphotactics rule

The third v4.x minor. Replaces the v4.4.12 string-side `locative_attributive_hint` fallback with a proper morphotactics rule, providing native FST round-trip support for the Kazakh locative-attributive derivation `-–і–∞“У—Л / -–і–µ–≥—Ц / -—В–∞“У—Л / -—В–µ–≥—Ц`.

### What landed

**New `Case::LocativeAttributive` variant** in `crates/adam-kernel-fst/src/morphotactics.rs::Case`. Treated as a Case for pragmatic reasons вАФ `try_noun_analyses` enumerates Cases when reverse-parsing, and exposing the locative-attributive there is the cleanest way to make `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` round-trip through synth + analyse. Strictly speaking it's a derivational rather than inflectional case (it stacks the attributive `-“У—Л/-–≥—Ц` morpheme on top of the locative `-–і–∞/-—В–µ`), but the type-level distinction wasn't worth a separate `Derivation` enum field for one variant.

**New `LOCATIVE_ATTRIBUTIVE` suffix template** `-{D}{A}{G}{I}` using the existing archiphoneme machinery:
- `D` realises as –і (after voiced or vowel) or —В (after voiceless)
- `A` realises as –∞ (back) or –µ (front) вАФ harmonic with stem
- `G` realises as “У (back, voiced) or –≥ (front, voiced) вАФ voiced because preceding `A` vowel
- `I` realises as —Л (back) or —Ц (front) вАФ harmonic with stem

This produces all four allomorphs automatically without per-allomorph branching:

| Stem | Class | Surface |
|---|---|---|
| `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ` | back, voiced consonant | `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` |
| `–∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л` | back, vowel-final | `–∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л–і–∞“У—Л` |
| `–Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ` | front, voiceless | `–Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ—В–µ–≥—Ц` |
| `–µ–ї` | front, voiced consonant | `–µ–ї–і–µ–≥—Ц` |

**Pronominal-–љ buffer rule** extended to fire on P3 + LocativeAttributive (mirrors the existing rule for accusative / dative / ablative / locative / instrumental).

**Parser wiring** вАФ `try_noun_analyses` enumerates `Some(Case::LocativeAttributive)` so `analyse()` reverse-parses surface forms back to their base noun:
```
analyse("“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л") вЖТ Noun(root: “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, case: LocativeAttributive)
analyse("–Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ—В–µ–≥—Ц")    вЖТ Noun(root: –Љ–µ–Ї—В–µ–њ,    case: LocativeAttributive)
```

**CLI** gained `--case locattr` for `adam_fst synthesise`.

### Backstop kept in place

The v4.4.12 string-side `locative_attributive_hint` in `crates/adam-dialog/src/semantics.rs` **stays in place** as a backstop for inputs whose stem isn't yet in the lexicon (the FST returns no analysis when the base noun is unknown). It now runs as a third-tier fallback after `topic_marker_hint` + `multiword_entity_hint` + `first_noun_root` вАФ the FST's native LocativeAttributive analysis is what the dialog layer sees first via `first_noun_root`. Removing the string-side helper would lose graceful degradation; keeping it is harmless (only fires when earlier strategies recovered nothing).

### Why minor

Per the post-1.0 versioning cadence (`feedback_versioning_post_1_0` memory): "Minor x.y.0 вАФ significant: new code-level architectural addition (new module, new Action variant, new predicate, new module layer)". A new `Case` enum variant is an architectural type-system change, even though the implementation footprint is small (~30 lines). The bump magnitude reflects contribution, not effort.

### Tests

- 1 new FST unit test `noun_locative_attributive_round_trip_all_allomorphs` in `morphotactics.rs::tests` verifying synthesis across all 4 vowel/voicing combinations.
- Existing v4.4.12 string-side fallback tests (`locative_attributive_suffix_recovers_topic_noun_for_kazakhstan`, `..._for_almaty`) still pass вАФ confirming the backstop continues to work alongside the new FST native path.
- Existing v4.4.12/13 REPL replay dialogs (`kazakhstan_mountains_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_12`, `kazakhstan_rivers_..._v4_4_13`, `..._lakes_...`, `..._deserts_...`) all continue to pass вАФ the FST native path produces the same surface results as the string-side fallback did.

Workspace **692 вЖТ 693** (+1 FST round-trip test). Cognitive eval **59/59 canonical**. REPL replay **43/43 canonical**.

### State

| | v4.4.13 | v4.5.0 |
|---|---|---|
| Workspace tests | 692 | **693** (+1 FST round-trip) |
| Cognitive eval | 59/59 canonical | 59/59 canonical (unchanged) |
| REPL replay | 43/43 canonical | 43/43 canonical (unchanged) |
| FST cases | 7 inflectional | **7 inflectional + 1 derivational** (`LocativeAttributive`) |
| FST round-trip | All 7 cases | **All 8 forms** including `-–і–∞“У—Л / -–і–µ–≥—Ц / -—В–∞“У—Л / -—В–µ–≥—Ц` |
| Why minor | вАФ | new code-level Case variant + morphotactics rule + round-trip synthesis support; architectural addition |

## [4.4.13] вАФ 2026-04-28 вАФ Lexicon hygiene patch: multi-POS homonym dedup + missing core nouns + `best_noun_hint` reorder

Closes the two carry-forward FST/lexicon defects flagged at v4.4.12.

### Defect #1 вАФ multi-POS homonym dedup in `Lexicon::load`

Pre-v4.4.13 `Lexicon::load` deduplicated by surface root via a `HashMap<String, RootEntry>`:

```rust
for e in &curated.roots { by_surface.insert(e.root.clone(), e.clone()); }
for e in &apertium.roots { by_surface.entry(e.root.clone()).or_insert_with(...); }
let entries_ordered: Vec<RootEntry> = by_surface.values().cloned().collect();
```

For `—В–∞—Г`, `pure_kazakh_roots.json` carried both `verb_tau` (verb) and `noun_apt_tau` (noun) entries, both keyed on `"—В–∞—Г"`. `HashMap::insert` returned the previous value but kept only the last write вАФ so only ONE reading survived in `entries_ordered`, the source of truth the FST analyser iterates. Result: `—В–∞—Г` parsed only as a verb root, the noun "mountain" reading was inaccessible.

This silently affected ~2 000 multi-POS homonyms (lexicon_stats: 14 528 entries kept out of 16 621 input rows; the gap was largely homonym dedup, not exact duplicates).

**Fix.** Separate `entries_ordered` (full union of curated + apertium files, deduplicated only by `id` + `part_of_speech` to handle exact-copy entries that appear in both files) from `by_surface` (intentionally lossy single-POS lookup table preserved unchanged for downstream code that uses it for spelling/morphology lookups). The FST analyser iterates `entries_ordered` and tries each entry in turn, so multi-POS homonyms now produce multi-POS analyses as expected.

### Defect #2 вАФ three core nouns absent from the lexicon entirely

Audit during the v4.4.13 trace found:
- `—Б—Г` (water) вАФ missing
- `–Њ—В` (fire) вАФ missing
- `–µ—А` (saddle / man-as-hero) вАФ missing

These are foundational Kazakh nouns appearing in everyday speech and the `world_core/geography_kz.jsonl` IsA-bridge facts. Added to `data/tokenizer/segmentation_roots.json` with the standard schema (`vowel_harmony`, `final_sound_class`).

### Knock-on fix #3 вАФ `best_noun_hint` chain reorder

v4.4.12 added `locative_attributive_hint` as a fallback AFTER `first_noun_root` вАФ correct at the time, when the FST recognised neither the locative-attributive `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` nor the surrounding content nouns like `—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А`. v4.4.13's lexicon-dedup fix unblocked content-noun parsing (`—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А вЖТ —В–∞—Г +Plural`), which made `first_noun_root` start returning `—В–∞—Г` and silently masking the locative-attributive signal. The v4.4.12 dialog `kazakhstan_mountains_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_12` regressed accordingly.

**Fix.** Reordered `best_noun_hint` to run `locative_attributive_hint` immediately after `topic_marker_hint`, before `multiword_entity_hint` and `first_noun_root`. The `-–і–∞“У—Л / -–і–µ–≥—Ц / -—В–∞“У—Л / -—В–µ–≥—Ц` morpheme is a strong "specifically located in X" topic-narrowing signal, semantically equivalent to a `—В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л` marker for the word it attaches to. When present, the recovered stem (`“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ` from `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л`) is the most specific topic in the question and should win over any generic content noun (`—В–∞—Г` from `—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А`) found elsewhere.

### Verified end-to-end (M2 8 GB release REPL)

All 5 listing-style questions answer correctly with **both** locative and locative-attributive phrasings:

| Question | Answer post-v4.4.13 |
|---|---|
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц —В–∞—Г –ґ–Њ—В–∞–ї–∞—А—Л: –Р–ї—В–∞–є, –Ґ—П–љ—М-–®–∞–љ—М, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г—Л, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞—Г, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г; –±–Є—Ц–Ї —И—Л“£—Л вАФ –•–∞–љ –Ґ”Щ“£—Ц—А—Ц.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А: –Х—А—В—Ц—Б, –°—Л—А–і–∞—А–Є—П, –Ж–ї–µ, –Ц–∞–є—Л“Ы, –Х—Б—Ц–ї, –Ґ–Њ–±—Л–ї, –®—Г, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞–ї, –Ґ–∞–ї–∞—Б.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А –Љ–µ–љ —В–µ“£—Ц–Ј–і–µ—А: –С–∞–ї“Ы–∞—И, –Ъ–∞—Б–њ–Є–є, –Р—А–∞–ї, –Ч–∞–є—Б–∞–љ, –Р–ї–∞–Ї”©–ї, –Ґ–µ–љ–≥—Ц–Ј, –Ь–∞—А–Ї–∞–Ї”©–ї.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —И”©–ї–і–µ—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —И”©–ї–і–µ—А: –С–µ—В–њ–∞“Ы–і–∞–ї–∞, “Ъ—Л–Ј—Л–ї“Ы“±–Љ, “Ѓ—Б—В—Ц—А—В, –Ь–Њ–є—Л–љ“Ы“±–Љ.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –±–∞—А?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ 17 –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –±–∞—А.¬ї |

### Tests

- 2 new e2e regressions: `lexicon_preserves_multi_pos_homonyms_for_tau` (locks the verb + noun reading invariant), `lexicon_includes_core_nouns_su_ot_er` (locks the `—Б—Г`/`–Њ—В`/`–µ—А` additions).
- 3 new REPL replay dialogs: `kazakhstan_rivers_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_13`, `kazakhstan_lakes_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_13`, `kazakhstan_deserts_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_13`.

Cognitive eval **59/59 canonical** (unchanged вАФ the locking is at the REPL replay layer, since the affected behaviour is surface-text, not trace-signal). REPL replay **40/40 вЖТ 43/43 canonical**. Workspace **690 вЖТ 692**.

### Deferred to a future minor

A proper `Case::LocativeAttributive` variant in FST morphotactics (mentioned in v4.4.12) remains the right long-term fix; v4.4.13's string-side `locative_attributive_hint` is still in place as a fallback. Rolling them up together with full `-“У—Л / -–≥—Ц / -“Ы—Л / -–Ї—Ц` round-trip support is minor-tier work.

| Cognitive eval | 59/59 canonical | 59/59 canonical (unchanged) |
| REPL replay | 40/40 canonical | **43/43 canonical** (+3 locative-attributive listing dialogs) |
| FST analysis (`—В–∞—Г`) | verb only | **noun + verb** |
| FST analysis (`—Б—Г`) | no analysis | **noun** |

## [4.4.12] вАФ 2026-04-28 вАФ Locative-attributive `-–і–∞“У—Л / -–і–µ–≥—Ц / -—В–∞“У—Л / -—В–µ–≥—Ц` suffix recovery

Closes the v4.4.11 carry-forward: `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` now answers with the literal mountains list.

### The bug

Kazakh forms ¬Ђlocated in X¬ї attributives by attaching the derivational suffix `-“У—Л / -–≥—Ц / -“Ы—Л / -–Ї—Ц` to a locative-cased stem, yielding four surface allomorphs `-–і–∞“У—Л / -–і–µ–≥—Ц / -—В–∞“У—Л / -—В–µ–≥—Ц` (back-vowel + voiced, front-vowel + voiced, back-vowel + voiceless, front-vowel + voiceless). The current FST morphotactics encodes the seven canonical cases (Nominative вА¶ Instrumental) but not this locative-attributive derivation. Result: `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` returns no FST analysis at all, so `best_noun_hint` falls through to None and the dialog layer routes to `unknown` with the safe-fallback refusal ¬Ђ–±“±–ї —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є–Љ—Ц–љ¬ї.

Trace pre-v4.4.12:
```
input:    “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?
parses:   [ qandai ]                     вЖР only “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є parsed; “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л skipped
intent:   Unknown { noun_hint: None }
action:   AskClarification вЖТ ClarifyingQuestion
output:   –±“±–ї —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –±—Ц–ї–Љ–µ–є–Љ—Ц–љ
```

### Fix вАФ `locative_attributive_hint` string-level fallback

New helper in `crates/adam-dialog/src/semantics.rs`. Scans whitespace-separated input tokens, finds those ending in any of the four allomorphs, strips the 4-char tail, and returns the first stem that is вЙ• 3 codepoints and not in `NOT_A_TOPIC`. Wired into `best_noun_hint` after `first_noun_root` so it only fires when FST + earlier strategies recovered nothing.

This is **conservative by design** вАФ pure string-level, no lexicon lookup. The 3-codepoint minimum filters obvious noise, and any random word ending in `-–і–∞“У—Л` that isn't actually a locative-attributive is rare enough that downstream retrieval/refusal absorbs it. The proper fix is a `Case::LocativeAttributive` variant in the FST morphotactics, queued for a future minor; v4.4.12 unblocks the user-facing flow without that depth of change.

Post-v4.4.12 trace:
```
input:    “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?
locative_attributive_hint("“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л") вЖТ Some("“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ")
intent:   Unknown { noun_hint: Some("“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ") }
SearchGraph(subject=“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ) + v4.4.11 input-overlap reranker + list-summary renderer
output:   “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц —В–∞—Г –ґ–Њ—В–∞–ї–∞—А—Л: –Р–ї—В–∞–є, –Ґ—П–љ—М-–®–∞–љ—М, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г—Л, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞—Г, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г; –±–Є—Ц–Ї —И—Л“£—Л вАФ –•–∞–љ –Ґ”Щ“£—Ц—А—Ц.
```

### Tests

- 2 new e2e regressions: `locative_attributive_suffix_recovers_topic_noun_for_kazakhstan` (locks `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л вЖТ “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`), `locative_attributive_suffix_recovers_topic_noun_for_almaty` (locks `–∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л–і–∞“У—Л вЖТ –∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л`).
- 1 new cognitive scenario `locative_attributive_suffix_recovers_topic_noun` (parse_failure category).
- 1 new REPL replay dialog `kazakhstan_mountains_via_locative_attributive_v4_4_12` running through the full retrieval path.

Cognitive eval **58/58 вЖТ 59/59 canonical**. REPL replay **39/39 вЖТ 40/40 canonical**. Workspace **688 вЖТ 690**.

### Carry-forward to a future minor

A proper `Case::LocativeAttributive` variant in `crates/adam-kernel-fst/src/morphotactics.rs` would: (a) parse `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` natively as a noun analysis with the new case, (b) make the v4.4.12 string-side fallback redundant, (c) enable round-trip synthesis. Out of patch scope; tracked.

Side-issue surfaced during the v4.4.12 trace: `—В–∞—Г` (mountain) parses ONLY as a verb root in the current FST output, even though the `noun_apt_tau` lexicon entry exists. Looks like a noun-vs-verb POS arbitration filter excluding the apertium-import noun reading. Same with `—Б—Г` (water) вАФ apparently absent from the lexicon entirely. Both queued for an FST/lexicon-level patch.

### State

|---|---|---|
| Workspace tests | 688 | **690** (+2 e2e) |
| Cognitive eval | 58/58 canonical | **59/59 canonical** (+1 scenario) |
| REPL replay | 39/39 canonical | **40/40 canonical** (+1 dialog) |
| `best_noun_hint` chain | 3 strategies | **4 strategies** (+ `locative_attributive_hint`) |
| Why patch | вАФ | string-level fallback in dialog semantics; no FST/morphotactics change, no new module / Action variant / predicate; backward-compatible (only fires when earlier strategies returned None) |

## [4.4.11] вАФ 2026-04-28 вАФ Input-overlap retrieval reranker + list-summary renderer fix

Closes the v4.4.10 carry-forward: listing-style questions now answer with literal lists.

### The bug

v4.4.10 authored 76 new geography world_core entries (17 oblasts, 6 rivers, 4 lakes, 5 mountains, 4 deserts, вА¶) plus 6 list-summary entries whose `raw_text` carried the actual answer to listing-style questions like ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?¬ї. The data was in place вАФ the answer wasn't. Two reasons:

1. **Predicate-rank picked IsA over RelatedTo.** `Tool::dispatch(SearchGraph)` sorted candidate facts by `user_facing_fact_priority`, which encodes a static predicate hierarchy (IsA=0, LivesIn=1, HasQuantity=2, вА¶, RelatedTo=6). Among facts about `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`, the bare ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ вАФ –Ю—А—В–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Р–Ј–Є—П–і–∞“У—Л –µ–ї¬ї (IsA, rank 0) always beat ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ-related-to-–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А-—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц¬ї (RelatedTo, rank 6) regardless of what the user asked.
2. **`RelatedTo` rendering hid the informative `raw_text`.** Even if a list-summary fact got picked, `render_grounded_fact` emitted the canned ¬Ђ{subject} –Љ–µ–љ {object} ”©–Ј–∞—А–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л¬ї template вАФ ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –Љ–µ–љ –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А —В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ—Ц ”©–Ј–∞—А–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л¬ї вАФ which is grammatical but unhelpful (the fact's `raw_text` ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А –Љ–µ–љ —В–µ“£—Ц–Ј–і–µ—А: –С–∞–ї“Ы–∞—И, –Ъ–∞—Б–њ–Є–є, –Р—А–∞–ї, –Ч–∞–є—Б–∞–љ, –Р–ї–∞–Ї”©–ї, –Ґ–µ–љ–≥—Ц–Ј, –Ь–∞—А–Ї–∞–Ї”©–ї.¬ї was the actual answer).

### Fix #1 вАФ input-morpheme-overlap reranker

`ToolContext` gained a `query_input: Option<&'a str>` field (default `None`, preserving pre-v4.4.11 behaviour bit-for-bit). `Conversation::turn_with_trace` populates it with the raw user input. `Tool::dispatch(SearchGraph)` now computes a content-token overlap score per candidate fact:

- `query_content_tokens(input, subject)` вАФ splits the input on non-alphanumeric chars, lowercases, drops tokens shorter than 4 codepoints (Kazakh case suffixes / pronouns), drops the noun_hint itself (zero discriminative signal вАФ every fact about “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ contains it).
- `fact_overlap_score(fact, query_tokens)` вАФ counts how many query tokens appear as substring matches in the fact's `raw_text` (case-folded). Uses a 4-char prefix fallback so agglutinative inflection (¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£¬ї vs ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л¬ї) still matches.

Higher overlap wins; the v4.0.x `user_facing_fact_priority` predicate-rank tier becomes the **tie-breaker**, not the primary signal. For ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?¬ї the ¬Ђ–∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы¬ї token now matches the list-summary fact's `raw_text` while missing the IsA fact, so the list-summary wins.

### Fix #2 вАФ list-summary RelatedTo renderer

`render_grounded_fact` gained a special-case for `RelatedTo` facts whose object root contains ¬Ђ—В—Ц–Ј—Ц–Љ¬ї (= "list"). In that case the renderer surfaces `fact.raw_text` directly, mirroring the existing ¬Ђ—И–µ–Ї—В–µ—Б¬ї (border) special-case. Avoids the awkward ¬ЂX –Љ–µ–љ Y ”©–Ј–∞—А–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л¬ї phrasing for structured-collection objects.

### Verified end-to-end

All 5 listing-style questions from the v4.4.10 carry-forward now answer with literal lists (M2 8 GB release REPL):

| Question | Pre-v4.4.11 | Post-v4.4.11 |
|---|---|---|
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ вАФ –Ю—А—В–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Р–Ј–Є—П–і–∞“У—Л –µ–ї.¬ї | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–љ—Л“£ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л вАФ 17 –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –њ–µ–љ 3 —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А –±–∞—А?` | (same generic) | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А –Љ–µ–љ —В–µ“£—Ц–Ј–і–µ—А: –С–∞–ї“Ы–∞—И, –Ъ–∞—Б–њ–Є–є, –Р—А–∞–ї, –Ч–∞–є—Б–∞–љ, –Р–ї–∞–Ї”©–ї, –Ґ–µ–љ–≥—Ц–Ј, –Ь–∞—А–Ї–∞–Ї”©–ї.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А –±–∞—А?` | (same generic) | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —Ц—А—Ц —В–∞—Г –ґ–Њ—В–∞–ї–∞—А—Л: –Р–ї—В–∞–є, –Ґ—П–љ—М-–®–∞–љ—М, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г—Л, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞—Г, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г; –±–Є—Ц–Ї —И—Л“£—Л вАФ –•–∞–љ –Ґ”Щ“£—Ц—А—Ц.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є —И”©–ї–і–µ—А –±–∞—А?` | (same generic) | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —И”©–ї–і–µ—А: –С–µ—В–њ–∞“Ы–і–∞–ї–∞, “Ъ—Л–Ј—Л–ї“Ы“±–Љ, “Ѓ—Б—В—Ц—А—В, –Ь–Њ–є—Л–љ“Ы“±–Љ.¬ї |
| `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ—И–∞ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –±–∞—А?` | ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ 17 –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б –±–∞—А.¬ї (was already working via HasQuantity) | unchanged |

### Tests

- 1 new e2e regression `world_core_list_summary_facts_present_for_kazakhstan` locking the data-layer floor (every list-summary fact must mention its category + representative members).
- 1 new cognitive scenario `kazakhstan_listing_question_routes_to_knowledge_path` (action_routing).
- 4 new REPL replay dialogs (`kazakhstan_oblast_list_v4_4_11`, `kazakhstan_lakes_list_v4_4_11`, `kazakhstan_mountains_list_v4_4_11`, `kazakhstan_deserts_list_v4_4_11`) running with the v4.4.10 runtime-artefact loader, asserting on the literal answer text.

Cognitive eval **57/57 вЖТ 58/58 canonical**. REPL replay **35/35 вЖТ 39/39 canonical**. Workspace **687 вЖТ 688**.

### Carry-forward to v4.4.12

`“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є?` (alternate phrasing using `-–і–∞“У—Л` compound suffix) still doesn't route correctly вАФ the FST stumbles on `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞“У—Л` and the topic extractor doesn't recover `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`. Tracked for an FST-coverage patch. The locative phrasing ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є —В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А –±–∞—А?¬ї works.

## [4.4.10] вАФ 2026-04-28 вАФ Kazakhstan administrative + physical geography expansion + `–Ґ–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–є—Л“Ы` intent + `“Ъ—Л—Б“Ы–∞—Б—Л` topic-marker guard

A real-REPL-driven release. User shared a 2026-04-28 transcript that surfaced **5 distinct issues** вАФ 3 knowledge gaps (oblast count, oblast list, rivers/lakes), 2 dialog issues (`–Ґ–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–є—Л“Ы` falling through to refusal, `“Ъ—Л—Б“Ы–∞—Б—Л` mispoarsing as topic-noun and triggering proverb misfire). All five addressed in one patch.

### Knowledge expansion вАФ 73 new world_core entries in `data/world_core/geography_kz.jsonl`

World Core grew **874 entries / 995 facts вЖТ 947 entries / 1116 facts**. Reasoner regenerated: extracted facts **15 521 вЖТ 15 642**, derived **21 415 вЖТ 22 387 (+972)** from new IsA-hub bridge facts. Lexical graph **3 562 вЖТ 3 604 nodes / 13 791 вЖТ 13 911 edges**.

Authored entries (geo_kz_031 through geo_kz_109):

- **9 IsA-hub bridge facts** for high R5/R1 leverage (`”©–Ј–µ–љ / –Ї”©–ї / —В–µ“£—Ц–Ј IsA —Б—Г –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц`, `—В–∞—Г / —И”©–ї / –Ї–∞–љ—М–Њ–љ IsA –ґ–µ—А –±–µ–і–µ—А—Ц`, `–Њ–±–ї—Л—Б IsA ”Щ–Ї—Ц–Љ—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –±”©–ї—Ц–Ї`, `“Ы–∞–ї–∞ / –∞—Г—Л–ї IsA –µ–ї–і—Ц –Љ–µ–Ї–µ–љ`). The bridge-fact pattern documented in `project_bridge_fact_leverage.md` paid off: +972 derivations on the new refresh.
- **3 republican-cities upgrade**: –Р—Б—В–∞–љ–∞ / –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л / –®—Л–Љ–Ї–µ–љ—В now `IsA —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞`.
- **17 oblast entries**: –Р–±–∞–є, –Р“Ы–Љ–Њ–ї–∞, –Р“Ы—В”©–±–µ, –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л, –Р—В—Л—А–∞—Г, –С–∞—В—Л—Б “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –Ц–∞–Љ–±—Л–ї, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г, “Ъ–∞—А–∞“У–∞–љ–і—Л, “Ъ–Њ—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–є, “Ъ—Л–Ј—Л–ї–Њ—А–і–∞, –Ь–∞“£“У—Л—Б—В–∞—Г, –Я–∞–≤–ї–Њ–і–∞—А, –°–Њ–ї—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –Ґ“ѓ—А–Ї—Ц—Б—В–∞–љ, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г, –®—Л“У—Л—Б “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ вАФ each as `IsA –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б` + `PartOf “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`.
- **4 new admin-center cities** previously absent (“Ъ–Њ–љ–∞–µ–≤, –Я–µ—В—А–Њ–њ–∞–≤–ї, –Ц–µ–Ј“Ы–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ, –Ґ“ѓ—А–Ї—Ц—Б—В–∞–љ-the-city).
- **17 oblast вЖТ admin-center mappings**: –°–µ–Љ–µ–є `PartOf` –Р–±–∞–є –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л, –Ъ”©–Ї—И–µ—В–∞—Г `PartOf` –Р“Ы–Љ–Њ–ї–∞ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л, вА¶, “Ъ–Њ–љ–∞–µ–≤ `PartOf` –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л (post-2022 reform), –Я–µ—В—А–Њ–њ–∞–≤–ї `PartOf` –°–Њ–ї—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л, –Ц–µ–Ј“Ы–∞–Ј“У–∞–љ `PartOf` “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л, –Ґ“ѓ—А–Ї—Ц—Б—В–∞–љ `PartOf` –Ґ“ѓ—А–Ї—Ц—Б—В–∞–љ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л. The other 14 are reflected in the existing city entries (–°–µ–Љ–µ–є already had `PartOf “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ`; v4.4.10 adds the more-specific `PartOf <oblast>` mapping).
- **6 quantity facts**: country-wide `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ has_quantity –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б` (17), `has_quantity —А–µ—Б–њ—Г–±–ї–Є–Ї–∞–ї—Л“Ы –Љ–∞“£—Л–Ј—Л –±–∞—А “Ы–∞–ї–∞` (3), `has_quantity —Е–∞–ї—Л“Ы` (~20 –Љ–ї–љ), plus per-republic-city populations (–Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л ~2 –Љ–ї–љ, –Р—Б—В–∞–љ–∞ ~1.5 –Љ–ї–љ, –®—Л–Љ–Ї–µ–љ—В ~1.2 –Љ–ї–љ).
- **6 new rivers**: –Ц–∞–є—Л“Ы, –Х—Б—Ц–ї, –Ґ–Њ–±—Л–ї, –®—Г, “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞–ї, –Ґ–∞–ї–∞—Б (existing 3: –Х—А—В—Ц—Б, –°—Л—А–і–∞—А–Є—П, –Ж–ї–µ).
- **4 new lakes**: –Ч–∞–є—Б–∞–љ, –Р–ї–∞–Ї”©–ї, –Ґ–µ–љ–≥—Ц–Ј, –Ь–∞—А–Ї–∞–Ї”©–ї (existing 1: –С–∞–ї“Ы–∞—И).
- **5 mountains / mountain ranges**: –Ґ—П–љ—М-–®–∞–љ—М, –Ц–µ—В—Ц—Б—Г –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г—Л, –•–∞–љ –Ґ”Щ“£—Ц—А—Ц (highest peak), “Ъ–∞—А–∞—В–∞—Г, “∞–ї—Л—В–∞—Г (existing 2: –Р–ї–∞—В–∞—Г, –Р–ї—В–∞–є).
- **4 deserts**: –С–µ—В–њ–∞“Ы–і–∞–ї–∞, “Ъ—Л–Ј—Л–ї“Ы“±–Љ, “Ѓ—Б—В—Ц—А—В, –Ь–Њ–є—Л–љ“Ы“±–Љ.
- **–®–∞—А—Л–љ –Ї–∞–љ—М–Њ–љ—Л** (canyon).
- **–С—Г—А–∞–±–∞–є** (`IsA —В–∞–±–Є“У–Є –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы`).
- **6 list-summary entries**: country-level enumerations of oblasts / rivers / lakes / mountains / deserts / regions, surface text written as readable Kazakh sentences for retrieval composition.

### Dialog layer вАФ `–Ґ–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–є—Л“Ы` intent + `“Ъ—Л—Б“Ы–∞—Б—Л` guard

- **New `GreetingKind::IntroProposal` variant** + extended `detect_greeting` matches ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–є—Л“Ы¬ї, ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л—Б–∞–ї—Л“Ы¬ї, ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л—Б—Л–њ –∞–ї–∞–є—Л“Ы¬ї, ¬Ђ—В–∞–љ—Л—Б—Л–њ –∞–ї—Л“£—Л–Ј¬ї. Was falling through every existing greeting branch and landing on the safe-fallback refusal `“Ы–∞–є—В–∞ –∞–є—В—Л“£—Л–Ј—И—Л`. New **`greeting.intro_proposal` template family** (4 variants) volunteers adam's name and asks for the user's. Template family count 49 вЖТ **50**.
- **NOT_A_TOPIC additions**: `“Ы—Л—Б“Ы–∞` (discourse adverbial вАФ pre-v4.4.10 the FST returned this as the root of `“Ъ—Л—Б“Ы–∞—Б—Л` and the topic extractor surfaced it, retrieval matched a tangential proverb). `–µ—И—В–µ“£–µ` / `–µ—И–Ї—Ц–Љ` / `–µ—И–±—Ц—А` / `–µ—И` (indefinite-quantifier pronouns вАФ same defect class). Mirror of v4.3.5 `–Ю–љ–і–∞ вЖТ –Њ–љ` and `–Ц–∞“£–∞ вЖТ –ґ–∞“£–∞` fixes.
- **MULTIWORD_ENTITIES sync** for the 25 new compound nouns introduced by the geography batch (oblast names, bridge nouns, peak/canyon names) plus 5 list-summary objects. The `world_core_multiword_coverage` contract test enforces this sync.

### REPL replay harness extended

`crates/adam-dialog/tests/repl_replay.rs` gained `load_runtime_artefacts` вАФ when `data/retrieval/{facts,derived_facts,morpheme_index}.json` are present, the harness builds the `Conversation` with the same retrieval / reasoning state production `adam_chat` carries, so retrieval-dependent dialogs (e.g. the new oblast-count question) reach the same code path as production. Pre-v4.4.10 the harness ran with empty retrieval, so any knowledge-query dialog defaulted to refusal regardless of fact-content.

### Tests

- 4 new e2e regressions in `crates/adam-dialog/tests/end_to_end.rs`: `intro_proposal_routes_to_greeting_intro_proposal_family`, `intro_proposal_variants_route_to_intro_proposal_family`, `qysqasy_does_not_get_extracted_as_topic`, `kazakhstan_world_core_carries_all_17_oblasts`.
- 2 new cognitive scenarios: `intro_proposal_routes_to_greeting_family` (action_routing), `qysqasy_discourse_particle_does_not_capture_topic` (parse_failure).
- 4 new REPL replay dialogs from the actual transcript: `intro_proposal_volunteers_self_intro_v4_4_10`, `kazakhstan_oblast_count_v4_4_10`, `qysqasy_does_not_misfire_to_proverb_v4_4_10`, `first_meeting_full_introduction_flow_v4_4_10`.

Cognitive eval **55/55 вЖТ 57/57 canonical**. REPL replay **31/31 вЖТ 35/35 canonical**. Workspace **683 вЖТ 687**.

### Known limitations carried forward

The user's transcript also asked `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –∞–є–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞—А—Л–љ—Л“£ –∞—В–∞—Г–ї–∞—А—Л–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?` and `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞ “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є ”©–Ј–µ–љ–і–µ—А –Љ–µ–љ –Ї”©–ї–і–µ—А –±–∞—А –µ–Ї–µ–љ—Ц–љ –±—Ц–ї–µ—Б—Ц–Ј –±–µ?` вАФ listing-style questions. v4.4.10 authored the answer-bearing list-summary facts (geo_kz_104вАУ108), but adam's retrieval picks the most-central fact about `“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ` (the basic IsA-–µ–ї fact) rather than the specific list-summary. This is a **retrieval-ranking limitation**, not a data gap вАФ the data is in place, surfacing it correctly is a v4.4.11+ retrieval-rerank concern. Documented; not blocking.

### State

| Cognitive eval | 55/55 canonical | **57/57 canonical** (+2 scenarios) |
| REPL replay | 31/31 canonical | **35/35 canonical** (+4 dialogs) |
| World Core | 874 entries / 995 facts | **947 entries / 1116 facts** (+73 entries / +121 facts) |
| Extracted runtime facts | 15 521 | **15 642** |
| Derived facts | 21 415 | **22 387** (+972 from bridge facts) |
| Template families | 49 | **50** (+`greeting.intro_proposal`) |
| Why patch | вАФ | per `feedback_versioning_post_1_0` v4.4.10 clarification: data-batch + dispatch-tier intent recogniser stay patch-tier regardless of fact count; magnitude of architectural change is the signal, not curation volume |

## [4.4.9] вАФ 2026-04-27 вАФ AskName 1sg self-recall + slot-echo aspirationals promoted

Two complementary patches that close the v4.4.6-surfaced backlog and tighten the test layer.

### Defect вАФ AskName 1sg self-recall (REPL-replay-surfaced, deferred from v4.4.6)

**Repro pre-v4.4.9:**
```
turn 1: ¬Ђ–Љ–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л–Љ –Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В¬ї  вЖТ  StatementOfName { name: "–Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В" }   вЬУ
turn 2: ¬Ђ–Љ–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л–Љ –Ї—Ц–Љ?¬ї     вЖТ  StatementOfName { name: "–Ъ—Ц–Љ" }     вЬЧ
                              вЖТ  belief: contested=2 conflicts=1 (–Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В vs –Ъ—Ц–Љ)
                              вЖТ  output: ¬Ђ—Б”Щ–ї —И–∞—В–∞—Б—В—Л–Љ вАФ —Б—Ц–Ј –Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В-–і–∞ –Љ–∞, ”Щ–ї–і–µ –Ъ—Ц–Љ-–і–∞ –Љ–∞?¬ї
```
The 1sg-possessive `–∞—В—Л–Љ` matched `detect_statement_of_name`'s pattern 1 (`–∞—В—Л–Љ X`), grabbed the question word `–Ъ—Ц–Љ` as the "name", logged a phantom `BeliefConflict`, and emitted a clarifying question naming both. **Worse than the v4.4.5 / v4.4.6 self-recall bugs**: belief got mutated, not just surface text. The REPL replay battery surfaced this on its v4.4.6 first run; deferred through v4.4.7 / v4.4.8.

**Fix.** Two complementary changes in `crates/adam-dialog/src/semantics.rs`:
1. **Interrogative-pronoun guard in `detect_statement_of_name`** вАФ refuses `–Ї—Ц–Љ / –љ–µ / “Ы–∞–љ–і–∞–є / “Ы–∞–є—Б—Л—Б—Л` as the candidate name across all three patterns (`–∞—В—Л–Љ X`, `–µ—Б—Ц–Љ—Ц–Љ X`, `–Љ–µ–љ—Ц X –і–µ–њ –∞—В–∞–є–і—Л`). Mirror of the v4.4.5 question-particle guard in `detect_statement_of_age`.
2. **`detect_ask_name` extended for 1sg** вАФ accepts `–∞—В—Л–Љ / –µ—Б—Ц–Љ—Ц–Љ + –Ї—Ц–Љ / –љ–µ` so the 1sg-self-recall question reaches `Intent::AskName` and the `ask_name.with_known_user` template family.

Post-fix: `intent = AskName`, `template_key = ask_name.with_known_user`, output ¬Ђ—Б—Ц–Ј–і—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л“£—Л–Ј –Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В¬ї, `belief.contradictions.len() = 0`.

### Promotion вАФ 3 v4.4.6 aspirational REPL replay dialogs to canonical

Pre-v4.4.9 the `statement_of_age`, `statement_of_location`, `statement_of_occupation` template families each carried 1вАУ2 bare acknowledgment variants (¬Ђ—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ¬ї, ¬Ђ–ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л –ґ–∞—Б¬ї, ¬Ђ“Ы—Г–∞—В—В—Л –Ї–µ–Ј–µ“£—Ц“£—Ц–Ј¬ї, ¬Ђ–µ“£–±–µ–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–≥–µ —Б”Щ—В—В—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї¬ї) that didn't interpolate the slot. Seed-0 routinely landed on these and the v4.4.6 REPL replay battery flagged the gap with three `expected_failing: true` aspirational dialogs.

**Fix.** Rewrote 5 bare variants in `data/dialog/templates/v1.toml` to prepend the slot, preserving the acknowledgment tone:
- `"—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ"` (location) вЖТ `"{city} –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ"`
- `"–ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л –ґ–∞—Б"` вЖТ `"{age} вАФ –ґ–∞“Ы—Б—Л –ґ–∞—Б"`
- `"“Ы—Г–∞—В—В—Л –Ї–µ–Ј–µ“£—Ц“£—Ц–Ј"` вЖТ `"{age} вАФ “Ы—Г–∞—В—В—Л –Ї–µ–Ј–µ“£—Ц“£—Ц–Ј"`
- `"—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ"` (occupation) вЖТ `"{occupation} –µ–Ї–µ–љ, —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–і—Ц–Љ"`
- `"–µ“£–±–µ–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–≥–µ —Б”Щ—В—В—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї"` вЖТ `"{occupation} –µ“£–±–µ–≥—Ц“£—Ц–Ј–≥–µ —Б”Щ—В—В—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї"`

All three aspirational dialogs (`city_statement_acknowledged`, `age_statement_acknowledged`, `occupation_statement_acknowledged`) flipped to canonical. Three multi-turn dependent dialogs (`city_recall_after_statement`, `age_self_recall_v4_4_5`, `contradiction_logged_renders_clarifying_question_v4_4_5`, `name_then_age_then_city_session_persists`) had their previously-removed setup-turn assertions restored. The existing `name_recall_after_introduction` dialog tightened with an `output_not_contains_lower: ["–Ї—Ц–Љ"]` assertion that locks the v4.4.9 fix in place.

Three e2e tests in `crates/adam-dialog/tests/end_to_end.rs` (`response_statement_of_age`, `response_statement_of_location`, `response_statement_of_occupation`) updated to match the new family contents вАФ those are exact-match tests on every variant.

### Tests

- 2 new e2e regressions: `ask_name_self_recall_returns_stored_value_no_phantom_conflict`, `ask_name_self_recall_with_empty_session_does_not_capture_kim`.
- 1 new cognitive scenario: `ask_name_self_recall_after_introduction` (in `direct_answer`) with `belief_contradictions_count: 0` assertion locking the no-phantom-conflict invariant.
- 1 new REPL replay regression dialog: `ask_name_self_recall_no_phantom_kim_v4_4_9`.

### Performance regression policy clarified

The post-v4.4.9 release-readiness rerun of `cargo bench -p adam-dialog --bench turn_latency` showed every scenario elevated by ~70 % (e.g. `social_greeting` 1.07 ms вЖТ 1.85 ms, `cold_start_conversation` 219 ns вЖТ 367 ns). Flagged by the > 20 % rule in `CONTRIBUTING.md` вАФ investigated via `git stash` of v4.4.9 code changes followed by re-bench from the same shell. **Same elevated numbers persisted with code reverted**, proving the slowdown was purely thermal throttling on the M2 8 GB after sustained `cargo` activity, not algorithmic. Documented in `docs/performance.md` "Thermal-state caveat" section + `CONTRIBUTING.md` regression policy gained a third clause: a regression that persists with code reverted is environmental, not a release blocker.

### State

| | v4.4.8 | v4.4.9 |
|---|---|---|
| Workspace tests | 681 | **683** (+2 e2e: AskName self-recall battery) |
| Cognitive eval | 54/54 canonical | **55/55 canonical** (+1 scenario) |
| REPL replay | 27/27 canonical + 3 aspirational | **31/31 canonical + 0 aspirational** (3 promotions + 1 new regression dialog) |
| Template families | 49 (some with bare variants) | 49 (every `statement_of_*` variant interpolates its slot) |
| Why patch | вАФ | small detector edits + 5 template-text rewrites + test additions; no new architectural layer, no new `Action` variant |

## [4.4.8] вАФ 2026-04-27 вАФ Doc currency sweep: stale-number scrub + claim-scope sharpenings (post-Codex audit)

A documentation-only release responding to Codex's 2026-04-27 doc-currency audit. The core was confirmed honest (`cargo test --workspace`: 681 / 0 / 4 ignored; foundation validation passes; bench numbers reproduced within ¬±5 % of v4.4.7 claims). What landed: every stale numeric claim refreshed against `cargo` / `jq` / `grep -c` re-runs, and five claim wordings tightened so they match the underlying scope rather than overstating it.

### Stale numbers refreshed against verified counts

All numbers below were verified in-tree before edit (commands shown so future audits can re-verify):

| File | Stale claim | Refreshed value | Verification |
|---|---|---|---|
| `README.md` (badges) | `repl replay 26/26 canonical` | `27/27 canonical` | `jq '.dialogs \| map(.expected_failing // false) \| ...' data/eval/repl_dialogs.json` |
| `README.md` (Why-adam follow-up line) | `26/26 canonical + 4 aspirational` | `27/27 canonical + 3 aspirational` | same |
| `README.md` (Current state block) | `v4.3.0 вАФ honest numbers ... 38/38 ... 827/923/29 ... 17 340 ... 15 449 ... 647 tests` | `v4.4.7 вАФ honest numbers, verified 2026-04-27 ... 54/54 ... 874/995/30 ... 21 415 ... 15 521 ... 681 tests` | `cargo test --workspace`, `jq` over world_core packs, `data/retrieval/{facts,derived_facts}.json` `.counts` blocks |
| `README.md` (Capabilities table) | `Template families 34+` | `49 families` | `grep -c '^\[\[families\]\]' data/dialog/templates/v1.toml` |
| `README.md` (RSS phrasing) | `~75 MB` | `~76вАУ80 MB depending on metric` (`maximum resident set size` вЙИ 80 MB vs `peak memory footprint` вЙИ 76 MB on the same `/usr/bin/time -l` run) | `/usr/bin/time -l ./target/release/adam_chat --once "—Б”Щ–ї–µ–Љ"` |
| `data/README.md` | v4.3.0 numbers | refreshed to v4.4.7 numbers | per-row recomputation |
| `data/world_core/README.md` | `827 / 923 / 29 domains` | `874 / 995 / 30` | `find data/world_core -name '*.jsonl' \| xargs cat \| jq -s 'length'` (entries) and `... \| jq -s 'map(.facts \| length) \| add'` (facts) |
| `data/dialog/README.md` | `34+ families` | `49 families` | grep above |
| `docs/foundation_scope.md` | `In scope (v1.0.0 вЖТ v4.3.0)` + v4.3.0-frozen numbers throughout | refreshed to `v4.4.7` + current numbers | per-row recomputation |
| `docs/repository_layout.md` | `Crates (10 total вАФ workspace at v4.3.0)` + stale dialog / retrieval / world_core / cognitive eval rows | refreshed to v4.4.7 + REPL replay + Criterion bench rows | per-row recomputation |
| `docs/architecture_v3.md` | v4.x continuity note frozen at v4.1.0 (`29 domains, 826 / 922 ... 22 / 22 canonical`) | refreshed to v4.4.7 (`30 domains, 874 / 995 ... 54 / 54 canonical`) + new lines for Language Core / quality audits / system identity / REPL replay / performance baseline | per-row recomputation |

### Five claim wordings sharpened to match scope

Codex flagged five places where the wording was technically defensible but invited misreading. Tightened in `README.md` and `docs/foundation_scope.md`:

1. **"100 % tokenizer"** вЖТ **"464 / 464 on the hand-authored segmentation eval"** (`data/eval/tokenizer_segmentation_eval_dataset.json`). Not a general "Kazakh tokenizer accuracy" benchmark вАФ that would require a held-out segmented corpus, which we do not yet have.
2. **"100 % training validation"** вЖТ **"15 / 15 next-token validation checks on the tiny clean prototype"** (`data/training/baseline_training_manifest.json`). Not an ML-model accuracy claim.
3. **`benchmark_manifest.json`** вЖТ reframed as **"coverage / contract benchmark manifest"** (4 task families + guards + layers), not a single AI-benchmark score.
4. **"Zero hallucination" / "Ungrounded generation: none by design"** вЖТ **"zero ungrounded generation inside the deterministic recognised / grounded runtime path"** (refusal or `unknown.tentative` outside the envelope). Not a general open-domain hallucination benchmark; it's a runtime-path contract enforced by `audit_response` + `audit_typed_faithfulness` + `audit_trace_faithfulness` + `audit_graph_admissibility`. Badge text updated correspondingly.
5. **Scaling report**: T5 tier targeted 1 M, scanned **940 288** before `status: "timed_out"`. Useful as a scaling artefact (per-tier `facts_per_10k_words`, `derivations_per_fact`, `predicate_coverage_pct`); **not** a "1 M benchmark completed without caveat".

### New: `Verified-on-2026-04-27` quick-reference table

The `README.md` Current-state section now carries a 13-row table with the verified value for every load-bearing numeric claim, paired with the exact `cargo` / `jq` / `grep` / `time` command that verifies it. Future audits run those commands and either match or surface a delta.
