```rust
    (FactStatus::Active, FactStatus::Superseded)
};
for idx in &prior_active_indices {
    self.facts[*idx].status = mark_prior_as;
}
```

### Semantic rules (post-fix)

| prior active state | new statement | outcome |
|---|---|---|
| none | any value | new fact Active |
| one with same value | same value | **old вЖТ Superseded**, new Active (was: both Active) |
| one with different value | different value | old вЖТ Contested, new Contested, conflict logged |
| `same вЖТ same вЖТ different` sequence | (as above) | **all three non-Active** after final turn, zero active facts |

The invariant вАФ "at most one `Active` fact per `(subject, predicate)` at any point" вАФ now holds by construction.

### Tests

**505 passing** (+2 from v4.0.27):

- Renamed + tightened `repeated_same_value_preserves_single_active_invariant` вАФ now asserts `fact[0] Superseded, fact[1] Active` (was: both Active, which was the buggy behaviour).
- New `same_same_different_leaves_no_active_fact` (unit, in `belief.rs`) вАФ Codex's exact repro path: asserts `active_fact() == None` + 0 active + 1 conflict + 1 pending after the sequence.
- New `same_same_different_city_leaves_no_active_fact_via_conversation` (integration, in `end_to_end.rs`) вАФ same scenario through the full `Conversation::turn` pipeline.

### Scope

One concern вАФ invariant correctness in the substrate. No new public API, no data changes. `active_fact()` and `digest()` signatures untouched.

### Next

With the invariant holding, Phase 2 (TaskState + Goal layer) can proceed on stable ground.

---

## [4.0.27] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ BeliefState foundation (Codex v4.0.26 roadmap Phase 1)

First architectural patch on Codex's v4.0.26 v5.0 roadmap. Begins the shift from "reactive answering" to "goal-directed cognition" by giving the dialog a structured belief state alongside the legacy flat session map. **Non-breaking** вАФ existing template-slot consumers keep reading from `self.session`; the new belief-aware paths read from `self.belief`.

### Why

Codex's v4.0.26 re-review concluded that `adam` is strong on answering but weak on goal-directed cognition. Phase 1 of the proposed roadmap вАФ **BeliefState with provenance and contradiction tracking** вАФ is the foundation every later phase (TaskState, ActionPlanner, Verifier, Uncertainty Policy, Tool Layer) depends on. Shipping Phase 1 first lets us measure traction before committing to the full 7-phase plan.

### What landed

**New module**: `crates/adam-dialog/src/belief.rs` (~540 lines incl. 6 unit tests). Public surface:

```rust
pub struct BeliefState {
    pub entities: BTreeMap<String, EntityMemory>,
    pub facts: Vec<BeliefFact>,
    pub pending_questions: Vec<PendingQuestion>,
    pub contradictions: Vec<BeliefConflict>,
}

pub struct BeliefFact {
    pub subject, pub predicate, pub object: String,
    pub confidence: ConfidenceBand,
    pub provenance: Provenance,
    pub status: FactStatus,
    pub recorded_at_turn: usize,
}

pub enum ConfidenceBand  { Confirmed, Derived, Retrieved, Hypothesized, Unknown }
pub enum Provenance      { UserStatement{turn_id}, Retrieval{pack,sample_id},
                           Reasoning{rule_id, derived_from}, Curated{pack, entry_id} }
pub enum FactStatus      { Active, Superseded, Contested }
pub enum EntityKind      { User, Person, Place, Occupation, Topic, Other }
pub enum QuestionNature  { NeedsClarification,
                           ContradictionToResolve{predicate, old_value, new_value},
                           MissingSlot{slot} }
```

Plus `BeliefConflict`, `EntityMemory`, `PendingQuestion`, and a sentinel `USER_SELF_KEY = "__self__"` for the interlocutor entity (won't collide with any real Kazakh name).

`BeliefState::record_user_fact(subject, predicate, object, turn_id) -> index` handles the three interesting cases deterministically:

- **New fact** вЖТ append with `Active` status + `UserStatement` provenance.
- **Repeated same value** вЖТ both copies stay `Active` (restatement вЙ† disagreement).
- **Contradicts prior active fact** вЖТ both copies flipped to `Contested`; a `BeliefConflict` is logged with `(fact_a_index, fact_b_index, detected_at_turn)`; a `PendingQuestion::ContradictionToResolve` is pushed so future phases can surface the disagreement.

`BeliefState::touch_entity`, `active_fact`, `facts_about`, and a compact `digest()` round out the API.

### Integration

`Conversation::absorb_entities` now **dual-writes** вАФ every `StatementOfName / Age / Location / Occupation` intent updates both the legacy `session: HashMap<String, String>` map AND the new `belief: BeliefState`. Turn id = `intent_history.len()` before the new intent is recorded вАФ monotone, stable, no extra plumbing.

`TurnTrace` gains `belief_digest: BeliefDigest` (6 counters, cheap to clone) and `belief_snapshot: BeliefState` (full picture for consumers who need it).

`adam_chat --trace` prints the digest line and every unresolved conflict:
```
вФЬвФА belief:   entities=2 facts=2 active=0 contested=2 pending=1 conflicts=1
вФЬвФА belief conflict: __self__ city: fact[0] vs fact[1] @ turn 1
```

`Conversation::reset()` clears the belief state too.

### Smoke-test

```
> –Љ–µ–љ—Ц“£ –∞—В—Л–Љ –Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В
–Ф”Щ—Г–ї–µ—В–њ–µ–љ —В–∞–љ—Л—Б“Ы–∞–љ—Л–Љ–∞ “Ы—Г–∞–љ—Л—И—В—Л–Љ—Л–љ
[belief: entities=1 facts=1 active=1 contested=0 pending=0 conflicts=0]

> –Љ–µ–љ –∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л–і–∞ —В“±—А–∞–Љ—Л–љ
—В–∞–Љ–∞—И–∞ ”©–ї–Ї–µ
[belief: entities=2 facts=2 active=2 ...]

> –Љ–µ–љ –∞—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–і–∞ —В“±—А–∞–Љ—Л–љ
—В–∞–Љ–∞—И–∞ ”©–ї–Ї–µ                      вЖР template-level response unchanged
[belief: entities=3 facts=3 active=1 contested=2 pending=1 conflicts=1]
[belief conflict: __self__ city: fact[1] vs fact[2] @ turn 2]
```

The **reply itself** stays identical to pre-v4.0.27 behaviour вАФ this patch is pure infrastructure. Later phases (Verifier, Uncertainty Policy) will actually *use* the belief state to change responses; v4.0.27 just builds the substrate and proves it holds up end-to-end.

### Scope

**Phase 1 only**. Explicitly out of scope (Codex roadmap Phases 2вАУ7 queued):
- Goal / TaskState layer
- Action planner (goal-directed, not template-choice)
- Verifier
- Uncertainty policy
- Tool layer
- Cognitive eval harness

Each will ship as an independent release with its own Codex review cycle. No commitment yet to do all seven вАФ we reassess after Phase 1 holds up in production.

### Tests

**503 passing** (+9 this patch: 6 unit tests in `belief.rs` covering each API path, 3 integration tests in `end_to_end.rs`).

---

## [4.0.26] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ `world_core_multiword_coverage` regression test (Codex v4.0.23 residual)

Third and final patch on Codex's v4.0.23 repeat review. Closes the residual maintenance trap.

### Problem

The v4.0.21 `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES` const in `semantics.rs` carried a docstring that said:

> Kept in sync with `data/world_core/` by audit (re-run `world_core_multiword_coverage_test` whenever a new compound entity enters the world_core set).

But that test **never actually existed**. The const was hand-maintained against the then-current 22 compound entities, and any future world_core batch adding a new multiword subject/object would silently fall out of sync вАФ ¬Ђ—В–∞“У—Л –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А / “Ы“±—А–∞–ї / ...¬ї in a future domain would tokenize to the first word and lose the referent, without any CI signal.

### Fix

Added `world_core_multiword_coverage` test in `semantics.rs::tests`. Mechanism:

1. Walk `../../data/world_core/*.jsonl`.
2. Parse each JSONL line as JSON, extract every `facts[*].subject` and `facts[*].object` string value.
3. Filter to those containing a space (compound entities).
4. Assert each observed compound is present in `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES`.

The test fails with a specific diff message pointing at the missing compounds, so adding a new multiword to world_core without updating the const is an immediate CI red.

Skips silently (with `eprintln!`) if the data directory is absent вАФ external crate consumers and trimmed CI checkouts continue to work; production CI runs from repo root where the data is always present.

### Smoke-test

Running against current world_core state: **22 observed compounds, all 22 in MULTIWORD_ENTITIES** вЖТ passes.

If I temporarily remove ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц¬ї from the const, the test fails with:
```
world_core has 1 compound entities not in MULTIWORD_ENTITIES;
add them to the const in semantics.rs: ["“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц"]
```

### Tests

**494 passing** (+1 coverage regression).

### Scope

One concern вАФ close the documentation-referenced maintenance trap. No data / reasoner / extractor / dialog logic changes.

### Codex v4.0.23 re-review вАФ 3/3 completed

| finding | fix | status |
|---|---|---|
| #1 Reranker tie-break | v4.0.24 | вЬЕ |
| #2 `--trace` mode divergence | v4.0.25 | вЬЕ |
| Residual: missing `world_core_multiword_coverage_test` | v4.0.26 | вЬЕ |

Review round 2 fully addressed.

---

## [4.0.25] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ `adam_chat --trace` reflects the real runtime path (Codex v4.0.23 re-review #2)

Second patch on Codex's repeat external review. Closes finding #2 вАФ the pre-v4.0.25 `--trace` mode was materially false for every feature added after v4.0.20.

### Problem

`adam_chat --trace` manually re-implemented `Conversation::turn` so it could surface intermediate state, but stopped BEFORE calling `inject_retrieval_example` + `inject_reasoning_chain`. Consequence: trace always printed `reasoning_chain: None`, `example: None`, and fell through to `unknown.with_noun`, even when the real runtime produced a reasoning chain. Since auditability is a core contract for this project, this was a visible integrity gap.

### Fix

New public API on `Conversation`:

```rust
pub struct TurnTrace {
    pub parses: Vec<Analysis>,
    pub intent_after_injection: Intent,
    pub session_snapshot: HashMap<String, String>,
    pub plan_trace: Vec<String>,
}

pub fn turn_with_trace(&mut self, input, lex, repo, seed)
    -> (String, TurnTrace)
```

`turn_with_trace` is the new canonical implementation вАФ it runs the full pipeline (follow-up resolution вЖТ retrieval injection вЖТ reasoning-chain injection вЖТ entity absorb вЖТ plan вЖТ realise) and returns the output **plus** the post-injection trace. The existing `turn` method is now a thin `let (out, _) = self.turn_with_trace(...); out` delegate вАФ no code duplication.

`adam_chat.rs --trace` now calls `turn_with_trace` directly and prints:
- FST parses
- `intent_after_injection` вАФ the real intent the planner saw (with `reasoning_chain` / `example` populated)
- session snapshot
- per-step `plan_trace`
- output

`TurnTrace` is re-exported from the dialog crate public surface so embedders can also consume it.

### Smoke-test

Pre-v4.0.25:
```
adam_chat --trace --once '“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л'
вЖТ intent: Unknown { ..., noun_hint: Some("“Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л"), reasoning_chain: None, ... }
вЖТ planner: template_key=unknown.with_noun
вЖТ output: –∞—Е, “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В–∞—Б—Л–Ј –±–∞
```

But the non-trace run produced: `output: “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –∞–љ—Л“Ы—В–∞–і—Л–Љ: –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї: “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј“У–∞ “Ы–∞—В—Л—Б—В—Л...`

Post-v4.0.25 (trace agrees with non-trace):
```
вФЬвФА intent:   Unknown { ..., noun_hint: Some("“Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л"),
вФВ                     example: Some("..."),
вФВ                     reasoning_chain: Some("–Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї: “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј“У–∞ “Ы–∞—В—Л—Б—В—Л...") }
вФЬвФА planner: template_key=unknown.with_derived_chain
вФФвФА output:   “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –∞–љ—Л“Ы—В–∞–і—Л–Љ: –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї: “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј“У–∞ “Ы–∞—В—Л—Б—В—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—Л –±–∞—А ...
```

Trace now matches real runtime output byte-for-byte.

### Cleanup

`adam_chat.rs` lost the now-unused `absorb_into` helper (~20 lines) and three stale imports (`interpret_text_with_lexicon`, `plan_response_with_session`, `realise`). The trace path is ~20 lines shorter and uses only the Conversation public API.

### Tests

**493 passing** (+1 regression `turn_with_trace_returns_post_injection_intent` вАФ asserts `reasoning_chain` is populated in the trace's intent).

### Scope

One concern вАФ trace auditability. No data / reasoner / extractor changes. `Conversation::turn` behaviour byte-identical (delegates to new `turn_with_trace`).

---

## [4.0.24] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Reranker tie-break fix (Codex v4.0.23 re-review #1)

First patch acting on Codex's v4.0.23 **repeat** external review. Closes finding #1 вАФ the v4.0.22 reranker still picked semantically weaker curated chains when multiple candidates tied at the top score.

### Problem

Codex re-review reproduced two cases where the v4.0.22 scorer produced a tied max-set:

- `adam_chat --once '–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л'` вЖТ ¬Ђ–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П“У–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Љ“ѓ—И–µ...¬ї instead of the expected ¬Ђ–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ вАФ –∞–і–∞–Љ¬ї. The tied set had IsA(–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ, –∞–і–∞–Љ) + InDomain(–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ, –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П) + IsA(–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ, –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А) + IsA(–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ, —Б“ѓ—В“Ы–Њ—А–µ–Ї—В—Ц) etc. The canonical-triple tie-break (`.reverse()` picks lowest) surfaced the InDomain branch because ¬ЂInDomain¬ї < ¬ЂIsA¬ї lexicographically.

- `adam_chat --safe --once '–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л'` вЖТ ¬Ђ–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ вАФ –±–∞–є–ї—Л“Ы¬ї (metaphor via proverb) instead of the expected ¬Ђ–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ вАФ –±—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ¬ї (direct parent). The tied set had 4 fully-curated R1 IsA derivations (вЖТ –±—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ / –±–∞–є–ї—Л“Ы / –Љ”Щ–ї—Ц–Љ–µ—В / “Ы–∞–Ј—Л–љ–∞). Canonical triple picked –±–∞–є–ї—Л“Ы because ¬Ђ–±¬ї < ¬Ђ–±¬ї ordered byte-wise first.

### Fix

Two new tie-break terms in `Conversation::inject_reasoning_chain`:

**1. IsA predicate bonus (+2) in `score_derivation`.** For "tell me about X" dialog queries an IsA answer (¬ЂX is a Y¬ї) is the most semantically direct shape. Applied per-derivation so R1 IsA wins over R10 InDomain / R2 Has / R5 RelatedTo at the score level before canonical-triple fallback even runs.

**2. IsA-chain graph-distance BFS tie-break.** For two tied IsA derivations `(a IsA X)` vs `(a IsA Y)`, compute BFS depth from `a` to `X` and from `a` to `Y` walking **only base IsA facts** from `extracted_facts`. Shorter path wins. Base-only is critical вАФ including derived facts would make R1 transitive closure report every reachable object at depth 1, collapsing the distinction the tie-break needs.

```rust
fn isa_chain_depth(&self, subject: &str, target: &str) -> usize {
    // BFS over extracted_facts IsA edges, MAX_DEPTH=8, base-only.
    // Returns usize::MAX when unreachable so canonical-triple falls through.
}
```

### Smoke-test: both Codex cases resolved

| query | pre-v4.0.24 | post-v4.0.24 |
|---|---|---|
| `–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л` | –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П / –Љ“ѓ—И–µ | **–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ вАФ –∞–і–∞–Љ** вЬУ |
| `–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л` (--safe) | —В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ / –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П | **–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ вАФ –∞–і–∞–Љ** вЬУ |
| `–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л` | –±–∞–є–ї—Л“Ы (proverb metaphor) | **–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ вАФ –±—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ** вЬУ |
| `–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л` (--safe) | –±–∞–є–ї—Л“Ы | **–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ вАФ –±—Ц–ї—Ц–Љ** вЬУ |

### Tests

**492 passing** (+2 regression tests):
- `reranker_prefers_is_a_over_other_predicates_on_tied_score` вАФ –љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ > InDomain –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П.
- `reranker_prefers_shorter_is_a_path_on_tied_curated` вАФ synthetic 4-node IsA graph confirms depth-3 object is dropped in favour of depth-2 objects.

### Scope

One concern вАФ tie-break within Codex recommendation #3. No data / reasoner / extractor changes. Reranker scoring signature unchanged.

### Out of scope for this patch (Codex v4.0.23 re-review remainder)

- **#2 `--trace` mode** вАФ adam_chat.rs `--trace` path manually rebuilds the turn and stops before `inject_reasoning_chain` / `inject_retrieval_example`. Trace output is materially false for v4.0.20вАУv4.0.24 features. Queued for v4.0.25.
- **Residual: missing `world_core_multiword_coverage_test`** вАФ docstring at `semantics.rs:268` references this regression test but it doesn't exist. Queued for v4.0.26.

---

## [4.0.23] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ R5 overbroad-hub guard (Codex v4.0.19 review #4) вАФ final Codex-review patch

Fourth and final patch acting on external Codex review. Addresses finding #4: "—И–Є—А–Њ–Ї–Є–µ —Е–∞–±—Л –≤—А–Њ–і–µ `–∞–і–∞–Љ`, `“У—Л–ї—Л–Љ`, `–ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А` –і–∞—О—В —Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞–ї—М–љ–Њ –і–Њ–њ—Г—Б—В–Є–Љ—Л–µ, –љ–Њ –њ—А–∞–≥–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є —Б–ї–∞–±—Л–µ –≤—Л–≤–Њ–і—Л". R5 shared-IsA through an abstract "everything-is-one" hub produces pairs that are true but cognitively weak вАФ ¬Ђ–Њ—В—Л–љ RelatedTo —Б—Г—Б—Л–љ¬ї because both IsA –Ј–∞—В, ¬Ђ–∞—И—Г RelatedTo –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В¬ї because both IsA —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ.

### Audit (pre-patch v4.0.22)

Data-driven classification of 15 621 R5 derivations by hub:

| hub | R5 pairs | verdict |
|---|---:|---|
| **–Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ** | 1 765 | information-bearing (profession cluster) вАФ keep |
| **“Ы“±—А–∞–ї** | 325 | information-bearing (tools) вАФ keep |
| —Б–∞–љ | 297 | numeric вАФ keep |
| **–ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А** | 183 | information-bearing (zoology) вАФ keep |
| —В“ѓ—Б | 170 | information-bearing (colors) вАФ keep |
| —В–∞“У–∞–Љ | 148 | information-bearing (food) вАФ keep |
| **—Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ** | 135 | emotions вАФ keep (designed axis at v4.0.12) |
| **“Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б** | **135** | overbroad вАФ **block** |
| —В—Г—Л—Б | 105 | information-bearing (kin) вАФ keep |
| –Ї”©–ї—Ц–Ї | 88 | information-bearing (transport) вАФ keep |
| –Љ“ѓ—И–µ | 77 | information-bearing (body parts) вАФ keep |
| —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В | 77 | information-bearing (materials) вАФ keep |
| “Ы“±—Б | 66 | information-bearing (birds) вАФ keep |
| **”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В** | **66** | overbroad вАФ **block** |
| —Л–і—Л—Б | 54 | information-bearing (vessels) вАФ keep |
| **–±–µ–ї–≥—Ц** | **45** | overbroad вАФ **block** |
| **–Ј–∞—В** | **20** | overbroad (most abstract "thing") вАФ **block** |
| вА¶ | вА¶ | вА¶ |
| **–∞–і–∞–Љ** | ~adjusted ~400 via cross-cluster bridges | overbroad per Codex вАФ **block** |

### Fix

New `is_overbroad_r5_hub(root)` guard in `reasoner.rs`. Blocks 5 semantically-abstract hubs: **–Ј–∞—В, –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц, ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В, “Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б, –∞–і–∞–Љ**. Applied at the R5 hub-iteration site вАФ skips the whole hub before enumerating incoming-IsA pairs.

```rust
fn is_overbroad_r5_hub(root: &str) -> bool {
    matches!(root, "–Ј–∞—В" | "–±–µ–ї–≥—Ц" | "”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В" | "“Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б" | "–∞–і–∞–Љ")
}
```

The –∞–і–∞–Љ inclusion is the biggest design call. Codex named it explicitly. The kin cluster (v4.0.19 batch) linked through ¬Ђ—В—Г—Л—Б IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ¬ї bridge, and R5 generated ~400 cross-cluster pairs like ¬Ђ–∞–љ–∞ RelatedTo –ґ–Њ–ї–∞—Г—И—Л¬ї (mother related to passenger вАФ weak). Blocking –∞–і–∞–Љ at R5 preserves touch-chain IsA knowledge but stops the combinatorial fan-out.

–Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ / –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А / “У—Л–ї—Л–Љ (which Codex also named) are **kept** вАФ those hubs do produce meaningful pairs. ¬Ђ–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ј RelatedTo –љ–∞—Г–±–∞–є—И—Л¬ї (cook вЖФ baker) is cognitively useful; ¬Ђ–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–љ–Њ–Љ–Є—П RelatedTo –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞¬ї is domain-adjacent. The distinction is information-bearing (–Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ = specific profession type) vs. overbroad (–∞–і–∞–Љ = "any human").

### Measured delta

| | v4.0.22 | v4.0.23 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| **R5 shared_is_a_target** | **15 621** | **13 566** | **вИТ2 055 (вИТ13.2 %)** |
| **derivations total** | 19 395 | **17 340** | **вИТ2 055** |
| R1вАУR4, R6вАУR11 | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| Graph nodes / edges | 3 515 / 13 725 | 3 515 / 13 725 | 0 (base facts unchanged) |

### Tests

**490 passing** (+2 regression tests: `r5_skips_overbroad_hubs` verifies all 5 blocked hubs, `r5_still_fires_for_information_bearing_hubs` verifies 5 preserved hubs вАФ –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ, –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А, “Ы“±—А–∞–ї, “У—Л–ї—Л–Љ, —В“ѓ—Б).

### Scope

One concern вАФ R5 source-level noise filter on 5 overbroad hubs. No extractor / data / rendering / reranker changes. Base fact graph unaffected.

## [4.0.22] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Reasoning chain reranker (Codex v4.0.19 review #3)

Third patch acting on external Codex review. Replaces the "first match wins" derivation picker in `inject_reasoning_chain` with a scored ranker that prefers **curated + short + taxonomically-direct** chains and penalises **text-only + long + shared-target fan-out** derivations.

### Problem

Per Codex's v4.0.19 review, `Conversation::inject_reasoning_chain` selected the first derivation whose subject (then object) root matched the `noun_hint`. This is deterministic but semantically arbitrary вАФ when multiple derivations exist for the same noun, the picker surfaced noisy ones:

- ¬Ђ–∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л –Ї“ѓ—И–Ї–µ “Ы–∞—В—Л—Б—В—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—Л –±–∞—А¬ї вАФ weak chain when cleaner curated alternatives available
- ¬Ђ–∞–±–∞–є вАФ —Е–∞–ї—Л“Ы¬ї (pre-v4.0.2) вАФ text-only IsA chain when world_core ¬Ђ–∞–±–∞–є вАФ –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ¬ї existed
- ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц вАФ –∞–є–љ–∞¬ї вАФ weak proverb chain when R1 ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц вАФ –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц¬ї (curated from language_features.jsonl) existed

### Fix вАФ `score_derivation` composite scoring

New `fn score_derivation(d, noun) -> i32` at `conversation.rs:525`. Composite score terms:

**Trust (source_chain provenance):**
- All sources `world_core/*`: **+4** (fully curated)
- Mixed world_core + text: +1
- All text-only: **вИТ2**
- Empty chain (defensive): вИТ2

**Chain length:**
- 0вАУ1 sources: +2
- 2 sources: +1
- 3+: 0 (long chains drift)

**Rule weight (Codex ordering):**
- `R1_is_a_transitivity`, `R10_in_domain_inheritance`: **+3** (clean taxonomic)
- `R2`, `R3`, `R6`, `R7`, `R8`, `R9`: +2 (mereological/temporal)
- `R5_shared_is_a_target`, `R11_in_domain_shared_target`: **+1** (combinatorial fan-out вАФ last resort)

**Subject-side preference** (preserves pre-v4.0.22 subject-first picking): +1 if subject root matches `noun`.

Tie-break by canonical triple `(subject, predicate, object)` for deterministic byte-identical runs.

### Selection flow

```
filter:   noun-match on either subject or object + passes_safety (curated_only_reasoning gate)
reduce:   max_by(score_derivation, then canonical-triple reverse tie-break)
render:   render_derivation_as_kazakh (unchanged)
```

Result: for the same noun, a fully-curated R1 chain (score вЙИ 10) always beats a mixed-source R5 chain (score вЙИ 4).

### Smoke-test with `adam_chat --safe`

All curated-only picks are now surfacing their strongest chain:

```
> –∞–±–∞–є —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: “Ы–Њ—А—Л—В—Л–љ–і—Л: –∞–±–∞–є вАФ –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ (–±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї –∞—А“Ы—Л–ї—Л).
> –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
–Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –∞–љ—Л“Ы—В–∞–і—Л–Љ: –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В –њ–µ–љ –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞–љ—Л—И –±—Ц—А-–±—Ц—А—Ц–љ–µ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ.
> –∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: –∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л –µ—Г—А–∞–Ј–Є—П“У–∞ “Ы“±—А–∞–Љ—Л–љ–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –±—Ц—А –±”©–ї—Ц–≥—Ц —А–µ—В—Ц–љ–і–µ —И—Л“Ы—В—Л.
> “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
–Р–є—В—Г—Л“£—Л–Ј –±–Њ–є—Л–љ—И–∞, –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є “Ы–Є—Б—Л–љ–і—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –±–∞—А: “Ы–Њ—А—Л—В—Л–љ–і—Л: “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц вАФ –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц (–±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї –∞—А“Ы—Л–ї—Л).
```

Before v4.0.22 the first query often produced ¬Ђ–∞–±–∞–є вАФ —Е–∞–ї—Л“Ы¬ї (text noise); the last query produced ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц вАФ –∞–є–љ–∞¬ї (proverb metaphor). Now both pick curated R1 chains.

### Tests

**488 passing** (+2 regression tests: `reranker_prefers_curated_over_text_only`, `reranker_prefers_shorter_chain`).

### Scope

One concern вАФ derivation-selection ranking. No reasoner/extractor/data changes. Rendering layer (`render_derivation_as_kazakh`) untouched.

## [4.0.21] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Multi-word entity linker (Codex v4.0.19 review #2)

Second release acting on Codex's v4.0.19 review. Addresses finding #2: multi-word concepts in world_core (¬Ђ“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л¬ї, ¬Ђ–Ъ“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц¬ї, ¬Ђ–Р—Б–њ–∞–љ –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц¬ї, ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц¬ї, вА¶) were losing their referent at the dialog layer because the FST tokenizer splits the compound and `first_noun_root` picks only the first single-word token вАФ so ¬Ђ“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л¬ї replied about ¬Ђ“Ы“±—Б¬ї (bird) instead of –Ь–ї–µ—З–љ—Л–є –њ—Г—В—М.

### Fix

Added `MULTIWORD_ENTITIES` const array in `crates/adam-dialog/src/semantics.rs` вАФ **22 compound entities** auto-extracted from `data/world_core/*.jsonl` subjects/objects that contain a space. Sorted longest-first at compile time so the matcher returns on the first substring hit:

```
“Ы“±–є—А—Л“Ы—В—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј, “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы ”Щ–і–µ–±–Є–µ—В—Ц, —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Є–µ—Б—Ц, –Њ—А—В–∞–ї—Л“Ы –∞–Ј–Є—П,
–ґ“ѓ–Ї –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–∞—Б—Л, –∞—Б–њ–∞–љ –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц, “Ы–∞—А–∞ —Б”©–Ј–і–µ—А, —В–∞“У—Л –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А, “Ы–Њ–Ј—Л –Ї”©—А–њ–µ—И,
“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц, —Б—Г “Ы–Њ–є–Љ–∞—Б—Л, –ґ–µ—А –±–µ–і–µ—А—Ц, –Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц, —В—Г“У–∞–љ –ґ–µ—А,
–∞–±–∞–є –ґ–Њ–ї—Л, —В–µ–Љ—Ц—А –ґ–Њ–ї, “Ы—Л–Ј –ґ—Ц–±–µ–Ї, –±–∞—Б –Ї–Є—Ц–Љ, “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л, –∞—П“Ы –Ї–Є—Ц–Љ,
—Б–∞—А—Л –Љ–∞–є, —В–∞—Б –ґ–Њ–ї
```

New helper `multiword_entity_hint(input: &str) -> Option<String>` does a longest-match substring scan over the lowercased raw input. Substring match handles Kazakh inflection on the compound tail вАФ e.g. ¬Ђ“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л–љ—Л“£ –±–µ–є–љ–µ—Б—Ц¬ї contains ¬Ђ“Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л¬ї as a prefix of the inflected form.

New `best_noun_hint(input, parses)` combines: **multi-word match first, then `first_noun_root` fallback**. Called from `interpret_text_with_lexicon` at both `Intent::Unknown` exit points. The legacy `interpret(parses)` function (no raw input available) keeps single-noun-only behaviour вАФ documented in-line.

### Smoke-test: compound entities now answer correctly

Pre-v4.0.21 вАФ all of these answered about "“Ы“±—Б" (bird) or generic:
```
> “Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л вЖТ ... about “Ы“±—Б (bird)
```

Post-v4.0.21:
```
> “Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї: “Ы“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј“У–∞ “Ы–∞—В—Л—Б—В—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—Л –±–∞—А (–Є–µ–ї—Ц–Ї –Љ“±—А–∞–≥–µ—А–ї—Ц–Ї).
> –Ъ“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц –ґ–∞–є–ї—Л
–Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –∞–љ—Л“Ы—В–∞–і—Л–Љ: –∞–є –Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц–≥–µ “Ы“±—А–∞–Љ—Л–љ–∞ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –±—Ц—А –±”©–ї—Ц–≥—Ц —А–µ—В—Ц–љ–і–µ —И—Л“Ы—В—Л.
> –Р—Б–њ–∞–љ –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц –і–µ–≥–µ–љ –љ–µ
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: –∞—Б–њ–∞–љ –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц –њ–µ–љ –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј –±—Ц—А-–±—Ц—А—Ц–љ–µ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ.
> “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц
–Р–є—В—Г—Л“£—Л–Ј –±–Њ–є—Л–љ—И–∞, –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є “Ы–Є—Б—Л–љ–і—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –±–∞—А: “Ы–Њ—А—Л—В—Л–љ–і—Л: “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц вАФ –∞–є–љ–∞ (–±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї –∞—А“Ы—Л–ї—Л).
```

¬Ђ“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л¬ї now correctly connects to stars (Milky Way contains stars). ¬Ђ–Ъ“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц¬ї produces the curated moon-as-part-of-solar-system chain. Only ¬Ђ“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы —В—Ц–ї—Ц¬ї still picks a weak proverb-chain вАФ that's **Codex recommendation #3** (reasoning reranker), explicitly out of scope for this patch.

### Tests

**486 passing** (+2 regression tests: `multiword_entity_hint_matches_compound_entities` + `multiword_entity_hint_returns_none_for_simple_input`).

### Scope

One concern вАФ multi-word entity resolution at the dialog layer. No reasoner / extractor changes, no data changes. The multi-word list is hand-maintained; future world_core compound additions must extend the const array (add a `world_core_multiword_coverage_test` regression in a future patch is queued).

## [4.0.20] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Lexicon sync with World Core (Codex v4.0.19 review #1)

First release acting on Codex's external review of v4.0.19. Codex's diagnosis was: **knowledge exists in the graph but doesn't reach the user through the dialog layer**. Root cause #1 вАФ many `world_core` subject/object roots are not in the Lexicon, so `first_noun_root` (dialog's entry point) returns None and the query falls through to ¬Ђ—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ¬ї.

### Audit findings

Cross-checking `data/world_core/*.jsonl` single-word subjects/objects against the Lexicon (curated `segmentation_roots.json` + Apertium import):

- **295 world_core roots missing from the Lexicon** вАФ including core vocabulary (–∞–є, —Б—Г, “Ы–∞–љ, “Ы—Л–Ј, “Ы–Њ–ї, –±–∞—Б, –±–µ—В вАФ surprisingly absent) and every recent v4.0.9+ domain-authored root (–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ, –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В, –і–Њ–Љ–±—Л—А–∞, –Љ–µ–і–±–Є–Ї–µ, –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞, –∞—Б–њ–∞–њ, –±–∞“У—Л—В, ”©–ї—И–µ–Љ, etc.).

### Fix вАФ one concern, with a caveat

Added **270 roots** to `data/tokenizer/segmentation_roots.json` with auto-classified vowel-harmony + final-sound-class via a heuristic script (Kazakh last-vowel harmony rule + final-char sound class). Roots all flagged with `v4020` id prefix for grep-ability of provenance.

**Filter вАФ 25 roots deferred**: first attempt added all 295, which broke 4 tokenizer-contract tests (seg_253 –∞–ї–∞–Љ—Л–љ, seg_282 “Ы—Л—Б“Ы–∞, seg_320 –±–∞—Б“Ы–∞ вАФ short-root collisions with existing affix parses). Reverted and filtered to **length вЙ• 4 chars + NOT in a homograph risk-list** (–∞–є, —Б—Г, –∞“Ы, –µ–љ, —В—Г, –∞–ї, “Ы–∞–љ, “Ы–Њ–ї, –±–∞—Б, –±–µ—В, –Љ–∞–ї, –Ї–µ—И, “Ы—Л—Б, –Њ“£, —Б–Њ–ї, –њ–µ—И, —Б”©–Ј, —В–∞–ї, —В“ѓ—Б, –Љ—Л—Б, “Ы–∞–Ј, “Ы–∞—А, “Ы—Л–Ј, –±–∞—Г, –∞–ї–∞). These 25 need per-root FST priority handling in a future patch вАФ one-concern discipline defers.

### Smoke-test: dialog now answers previously-silent queries

Pre-v4.0.20:
```
> –љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ
> –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ
> –і–Њ–Љ–±—Л—А–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ
> –Љ–µ–і–±–Є–Ї–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
—В“ѓ—Б—Ц–љ–±–µ–і—Ц–Љ
```

Post-v4.0.20 (all 4 now produce curated-derived answers):
```
> –љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: “Ы–Њ—А—Л—В—Л–љ–і—Л: –љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ вАФ –∞–і–∞–Љ (–±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї –∞—А“Ы—Л–ї—Л).
> –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
–Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –∞–љ—Л“Ы—В–∞–і—Л–Љ: –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В –њ–µ–љ –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞–љ—Л—И –±—Ц—А-–±—Ц—А—Ц–љ–µ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ.
> –і–Њ–Љ–±—Л—А–∞ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
“Ъ–Њ–ї–і–∞ –±–∞—А –і–µ—А–µ–Ї—В–µ—А–і–µ–љ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б “Ы“±—А–∞—Б—В—Л—А–і—Л–Љ: “Ы–Њ—А—Л—В—Л–љ–і—Л: –і–Њ–Љ–±—Л—А–∞ вАФ “Ы“±—А–∞–ї (–±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –Њ–є-—В—Ц–Ј–±–µ–Ї –∞—А“Ы—Л–ї—Л).
> –Љ–µ–і–±–Є–Ї–µ —В—Г—А–∞–ї—Л –∞–є—В—И—Л
–Р–є—В—Г—Л“£—Л–Ј –±–Њ–є—Л–љ—И–∞, –Љ—Л–љ–∞–і–∞–є “Ы–Є—Б—Л–љ–і—Л –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б –±–∞—А: –Љ–µ–і–±–Є–Ї–µ –њ–µ–љ –Љ–µ—А–≥–µ–љ –±—Ц—А-–±—Ц—А—Ц–љ–µ –±–∞–є–ї–∞–љ—Л—Б—В—Л –µ–Ї–µ–љ.
```

This is the **highest-impact single patch** of v4.0.x so far вАФ it converts existing knowledge into actually-reachable answers.

### Measured delta on T4_200k full re-extract

|---|---:|---:|---|

| text `does_to` | 8 987 | **9 942** | **+955** |

| text `goes_to` | 1 537 | **1 681** | +144 |

### Why such large extract jump (+1 739 text facts)

Kazakh sentences involving the 270 new roots were previously **parseable only partially** вАФ e.g. a sentence mentioning ¬Ђ–љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ –Ї–µ–ї–і—Ц¬ї would fail at the noun analysis, so downstream pattern matchers never fired. With the roots in Lexicon, every such sentence is now extractable. The +955 `does_to` gain is the largest вАФ agent_verb patterns are the most common sentence shape in the Wikipedia + textbook corpus, and they were blocked wherever the subject or object noun was one of the newly-added roots.

### Tests

**484 passing** (unchanged вАФ Lexicon addition didn't break any existing test after the filter was tightened).

- v4.0.22: Codex recommendation #3 вАФ reasoning chain reranker (curated-first, short-first, R1/R10-first).

- Deferred: 25 short / homograph-prone roots (–∞–є, —Б—Г, –∞“Ы, etc.) вАФ need per-root FST priority handling.

## [4.0.19] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ World Core batch #5: `kinship_extended.jsonl` + `constellations_kz.jsonl` + `measurements.jsonl` (R5 explodes via –∞–і–∞–Љ bridge)

Fifth data batch. **Highest single-batch leverage ever**: +67.6 derivations per curated fact (previous peak: v4.0.9's +47/fact via 40-entry professions.jsonl saturating –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub).

### Three new domains

1. **`kinship_extended.jsonl`** (18 entries) вАФ extended Kazakh family terms. Hub: `—В—Г—Л—Б IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ` (kin IsA human вАФ the load-bearing bridge). 17 —В—Г—Л—Б children: –∞—В–∞ / ”Щ–ґ–µ part_of –Њ—В–±–∞—Б—Л + IsA —В—Г—Л—Б, –∞“У–∞ / —Ц–љ—Ц / –∞–њ–∞ / “Ы–∞—А—Л–љ–і–∞—Б / —Б—Ц“£–ї—Ц / –љ–µ–Љ–µ—А–µ / —И”©–±–µ—А–µ / –ґ–Є–µ–љ / –±”©–ї–µ / –љ–∞“У–∞—И—Л / –∞–±—Л—Б—Л–љ / –Ї“ѓ–є–µ—Г / –Ї–µ–ї—Ц–љ IsA —В—Г—Л—Б, plus “±–ї / “Ы—Л–Ј IsA –±–∞–ї–∞. Standard Kazakh kinship lexicon, no loanwords.

2. **`constellations_kz.jsonl`** (6 entries) вАФ traditional Kazakh astronomy. `—И–Њ“Ы–ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј IsA –∞—Б–њ–∞–љ –і–µ–љ–µ—Б—Ц` hub + 4 constellation children: –Ц–µ—В—Ц“Ы–∞—А–∞“Ы—И—Л (Ursa Major вАФ "seven thieves"), “Ѓ—А–Ї–µ—А (Pleiades), –Ґ–µ–Љ—Ц—А“Ы–∞–Ј—Л“Ы (Polaris вАФ "iron stake", IsA –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј), “Ы“±–є—А—Л“Ы—В—Л –ґ“±–ї–і—Л–Ј (comet вАФ "tailed star"). Plus `“Ъ“±—Б –ґ–Њ–ї—Л IsA –≥–∞–ї–∞–Ї—В–Є–Ї–∞` (Milky Way вАФ confirms implicit usage in astro_022).

3. **`measurements.jsonl`** (10 entries) вАФ physical measurement concepts. `”©–ї—И–µ–Љ IsA –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц` hub + 9 measurement children IsA ”©–ї—И–µ–Љ: “±–Ј—Л–љ–і—Л“Ы, –Ї”©–ї–µ–Љ, —Б–∞–ї–Љ–∞“Ы, –±–Є—Ц–Ї—В—Ц–Ї, —В–µ—А–µ“£–і—Ц–Ї, –µ–љ, “Ы–∞—И—Л“Ы—В—Л“Ы, –ґ—Л–ї–і–∞–Љ–і—Л“Ы, –њ–∞–є—Л–Ј.

### Totals

|---|---:|---:|---|
| World Core domains | 26 | **29** | +3 |
| World Core entries | 792 | **826** | +34 |
| World Core facts | 886 | **922** | +36 (kin_002 / kin_003 produce 2 facts each: part_of –Њ—В–±–∞—Б—Л + IsA —В—Г—Л—Б) |

### Measured runtime delta (fast-path rebuild)

| rule | v4.0.18 | v4.0.19 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1 is_a_transitivity | 484 | **568** | **+84** |
| **R2 has_inheritance** | 450 | **707** | **+257** |
| R3 has_via_part_of | 51 | 51 | 0 |
| **R5 shared_is_a_target** | 13 414 | **15 477** | **+2 063** |

| R7 goes_to_via_part_of | 373 | 373 | 0 |
| R8 after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| R9 part_of_transitivity | 170 | **172** | +2 |
| **R10 in_domain_inheritance** | 102 | **124** | **+22** |
| R11 in_domain_shared_target | 146 | **151** | +5 |

| Graph edges | 12 325 | **12 360** | +35 |

### Effective leverage: +67.6 derivations per curated fact вАФ new peak

**2 433 new derivations / 36 new curated facts = +67.6/fact** вАФ exceeds v4.0.9's +47/fact peak. The combinatorial explosion is driven by one specific fact: `–Ї–Є–љ_001: —В—Г—Л—Б IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ`. This single bridge connects the entire 17-child kin cluster into the large –∞–і–∞–Љ IsA hub. Every kin child вЖТ IsA —В—Г—Л—Б вЖТ R1-transitively IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ вЖТ R5-related to every other IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ descendant (including all professions via –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ–Є—П, all animals, etc.).

### R5 explosion breakdown (rough)

- 17 kin children √Ч each becomes IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ via R1 transitive closure
- –∞–і–∞–Љ hub pre-batch already had ~60+ descendants (indirect via IsA chains through –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ, etc.)
- 17 √Ч 60 new R5 pairs вЙИ ~1 000 from cross-cluster pairs
- Plus C(17,2) = 136 intra-kin pairs
- Plus second-order cascades
- **Observed +2 063** вАФ consistent with bridge-fact multiplier effect

### R2 jump (+257) explanation

With kin cluster now IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ via R1, and `–∞–і–∞–Љ has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ` (from emotions.jsonl at v4.0.12), R2 derives ¬ЂX has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ¬ї for every kin child вАФ 17+ new Has-inheritance derivations. Plus `–∞–і–∞–Љ has –Ї”©–Ј / “Ы“±–ї–∞“Ы / –Љ–Є / –ґ“ѓ—А–µ–Ї / “Ы–∞–љ / ”©–Ї–њ–µ / –±–∞—Г—Л—А / –±“ѓ–є—А–µ–Ї / –∞—Б“Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ / —Б–∞—Г—Б–∞“Ы / –∞—П“Ы / “Ы–Њ–ї` (from body_parts.jsonl) вАФ each kin child inherits all these via R2. 17 √Ч ~12 body parts = ~200 R2 derivations. Rest from R1-chained —Ж–µ–њ–Њ—З–Ї–Є.

### Lesson: bridge facts multiply

This batch demonstrates the **highest-ROI authoring pattern**: a single `X IsA –±–Њ–ї—М—И–Њ–є_—Е–∞–±` bridge fact can multiply existing cluster connectivity by C(cluster_size, 2). v4.0.9's professions.jsonl did this via –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub; v4.0.19 does it via –∞–і–∞–Љ hub + kin cluster. Future high-leverage authoring: look for uncovered sub-hubs that could link into –∞–і–∞–Љ / –Ј–∞—В / –Љ“ѓ—И–µ / “Ы“±—А–∞–ї with minimal curation.

## [4.0.18] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ R11 InDomain shared-target (new reasoning rule) + v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised

Third rule-axis patch in v4.0.x. Reasoner roster **9 вЖТ 10**. Also materialises the v4.0.17 is_closed_class fragment expansion via full T4_200k re-extract.

### Pattern

`A InDomain D вИІ B InDomain D (A вЙ† B) вЯє RelatedTo(A, B)` вАФ identical structural shape to R5 (shared-IsA), applied to the InDomain predicate.

### Why InDomain-shared

After v4.0.14's R10 inheritance rule, the graph has rich InDomain coverage: 24 base + 102 R10-derived = **126 InDomain facts**. Each domain hub has multiple incoming InDomain edges:

- –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞: ~26 incoming вЖТ C(26,2) = 325 candidate pairs
- –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П: ~22 incoming вЖТ C(22,2) = 231
- ”Щ–і–µ–±–Є–µ—В: ~18 incoming вЖТ C(18,2) = 153
- –Њ—А–љ–Є—В–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П: ~13 incoming вЖТ C(13,2) = 78

Many of these candidate pairs are already dedup'd against R5-derived shared-IsA pairs (since domain children often share taxonomic parents), so R11's net contribution is the **cross-cluster pairs** that aren't reachable via IsA alone.

### Implementation

`rule_r11_in_domain_shared_target` in `reasoner.rs` вАФ ~40-line body, structurally identical to R5 but scans incoming InDomain edges. Guards:

- **Tautology**: A = B rejected (canonical pair after sort).
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R11_in_domain_shared_target"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Test coverage

5 new regression tests:

- `r11_derives_related_to_from_shared_domain` вАФ basic 2-child hub (“Ы–Њ—Б—Г/–±”©–ї—Г InDomain –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞).
- `r11_respects_tautology_guard` вАФ duplicate InDomain facts produce no self-related.
- `r11_does_not_fire_for_distinct_domains` вАФ A InDomain X + B InDomain Y produces nothing.
- `r11_produces_canonical_pair_once` вАФ C(3,2) = 3 unique canonical pairs.
- `r11_chains_through_r10_derived_in_domain` вАФ confirms R11 fires on R10-derived InDomain at fixpoint iter 2.

### Measured delta on T4_200k full re-extract + reasoner

| | v4.0.16 | v4.0.18 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 715 | **13 673** | **вИТ42** (v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised) |
| text `does_to` | 9 002 | **8 987** | вИТ15 |
| text `goes_to` | 1 544 | **1 537** | вИТ7 |
| text `lives_in` | 288 | **280** | вИТ8 |
| text `has` | 230 | **224** | вИТ6 |
| text `after` | 219 | **218** | вИТ1 |
| **derivations total** | 15 832 | **15 973** | **+141 (+0.89 %)** |
| R2 has_inheritance | 454 | **450** | вИТ4 (dedup cascade from fewer base has) |
| R7 goes_to_via_part_of | 374 | **373** | вИТ1 |
| **R11 in_domain_shared_target** | вАФ | **146** | **new** |
| R1 / R3 / R5 / R6 / R8 / R9 / R10 | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 456 | **3 452** | вИТ4 |
| Graph edges | 12 368 | **12 325** | вИТ43 |

### v4.0.17 fragment-fix materialised

Full re-extract applied v4.0.17's `is_closed_class` fragment expansion (–ґ–∞–ї–њ, –Љ“±–љ, –∞—Б—В–∞, —Е—Ц—Е) вАФ net **вИТ42 text-extracted facts** across 5 predicates, confirming v4.0.17's predicted "~32 facts cleaned" was accurate (slight under-prediction due to cascade through other matchers sharing the is_closed_class filter).

### R11 measured 146 net derivations

Pre-rule audit on v4.0.14 predicted R10+R11 stack would produce hundreds of shared-InDomain pairs. Observed net 146 вАФ well below the theoretical maximum because **most candidate pairs dedup against R5-derived shared-IsA pairs**. R5 already covers arithmetic/biology/literature sibling relations through shared taxonomic parents (e.g. `“Ы–∞—А“У–∞ IsA “Ы“±—Б + –∞“Ы“Ы—Г IsA “Ы“±—Б` вЯє R5 produces `“Ы–∞—А“У–∞ RelatedTo –∞“Ы“Ы—Г` before R11 can). R11's unique contribution is the **cross-cluster pairs** вАФ concepts sharing a domain but NOT a direct IsA parent (e.g. `–Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞` InDomain-children that aren't IsA-siblings: —Б–∞–љ vs “Ы–Њ—Б—Г vs –µ—Б–µ–њ вАФ each under different IsA parents but same domain).

### Tests

**484 passing** (+5 R11 regression from v4.0.17).

## [4.0.17] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Fragment roots in `is_closed_class` (code-only micro-patch)

Follow-up to v4.0.16's noise audit. While cleaning location-root GoesTo subjects, the audit also surfaced 4 fragment / tokenisation-artefact roots contaminating text-extracted facts:

| root | √Ч | origin |
|---|---:|---|
| `–ґ–∞–ї–њ` | 12 | fragment of ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л¬ї (generally) вАФ FST over-segments before —В–Њ“Ы—Л-reduction rule |
| `–Љ“±–љ` | 8 | demonstrative stem fragment (¬Ђ–Љ“±–љ—Л¬ї / ¬Ђ–Љ“±–љ–і–∞¬ї stripped to stem) |
| `–∞—Б—В–∞` | 7 | fragment of ¬Ђ–∞—Б—В–∞–Љ¬ї (more than) |
| `—Е—Ц—Е` | 5 | tokenised Roman numeral XIX |

v4.0.6 already blocked 3 fragment roots (`–ґ–∞—А—В`, `–∞—А–∞—Б—Л–љ–і–∞“У`, `—В–∞“У—Л`); v4.0.17 extends the same blocklist pattern to these 4. Total combined: ~32 base facts will be filtered on the next full re-extract.

### Code change

4-line extension to the `is_closed_class` match + 1 new regression test. Regression test also asserts non-collision with legitimate neighbours: ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л¬ї (full form), ¬Ђ–∞—Б—В–∞–љ–∞¬ї (city-root вАФ must not collide with fragment ¬Ђ–∞—Б—В–∞¬ї), ¬Ђ–Љ“±–љ–і–∞¬ї (full locative).

### Delivery discipline: code-only, no re-extract

v4.0.16 consumed a 26-minute full T4_200k re-extract to materialise its location-root fix. This patch is small enough (~32 expected base-fact reductions) that a dedicated re-extract is wasteful. **Committed `facts.json` retains the ~32 fragment facts until the next full re-extract** вАФ planned for v4.0.18 along with a new reasoning rule that'll also benefit from the cleaner base.

### Tests

**479 passing** (+1 regression `is_closed_class_covers_v4_0_17_fragments` from v4.0.16).

### Scope

One concern: expand `is_closed_class` with 4 fragments. No data changes, no other code changes.

## [4.0.16] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Noise audit #2: location-root subjects in `dative_goes_to` + `agent_verb`

Second noise-elimination audit of v4.0.x. Audit on fresh v4.0.15 derived_facts.json surfaced a major contamination class: **R7 GoesTo-via-PartOf had 385 of 388 derivations either fully text-only or mixed** вАФ traced back to text-extracted GoesTo base facts with country / city subjects.

### Audit findings

R7 provenance breakdown on v4.0.15 (388 derivations):

| provenance | count | share |
|---|---:|---:|
| fully world_core | 3 | 0.8 % |
| mixed | 338 | 87.1 % |
| fully text-only | 47 | 12.1 % |

**R7 is the most text-dependent rule in the reasoner** вАФ it needs both a GoesTo base and a PartOf base, and GoesTo is predominantly text-extracted.

Top text-extracted GoesTo subjects (all producing R7 cascade noise):

| root | √Ч | kind |
|---|---:|---|
| “Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы | 52 | ethnic noun / proper noun (homograph) |
| –∞–і–∞–Љ | 27 | generic subject (metaphorical usage) |
| **“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ** | **22** | **country вАФ location, not agent** |
| **–∞–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л** | **20** | **city вАФ location, not agent** |
| **—И—Л“У—Л—Б** | **12** | direction (now curated in directions.jsonl) |
| –ґ–∞–ї–њ | 12 | fragment of –ґ–∞–ї–њ—Л |
| **—Б–Њ–ї—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї** | **8** | direction (now curated) |
| **–∞“Ы—В”©–±–µ / –њ–∞–≤–ї–Њ–і–∞—А / –∞—А–∞–ї** | each **7** | **cities** |

Bolded rows total **~80 base facts** that are clearly locations appearing as kinetic-verb subjects вАФ from Wikipedia biographical patterns like ¬Ђ–Ю“£—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї “Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –Њ–±–ї—Л—Б—Л–љ–і–∞ –і“ѓ–љ–Є–µ–≥–µ –Ї–µ–ї–і—Ц¬ї ("was born in South Kazakhstan oblast") that the extractor takes as `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ goes_to –і“ѓ–љ–Є–µ`.

### Root cause (consistent with v4.0.10's pattern)

Four matchers produce predicates whose subjects should not be location nouns (`LivesIn`, `GoesTo`, `DoesTo`):

- `locative_lives_in` вЬУ (has `is_location_root` guard since v3.8.5)
- `dative_goes_to` вЬЧ **missing the guard**
- `agent_verb` (DoesTo) вЬЧ **missing the guard**
- `copula_is_a` вАФ N/A (IsA can legitimately have location subjects like `–ґ–µ—А IsA “У–∞–ї–∞–Љ—И–∞—А`)

v3.8.5 hardening identified location nouns as a noise class for `locative_lives_in` but didn't extend to the kinetic verb matchers вАФ the same oversight pattern that v4.0.10 fixed for `is_time_noun` on `copula_is_a`.

### Fix вАФ one concern

Added `is_location_root(&root.root)` guard after the existing `is_time_noun` / < 3-char filter in both:

1. **`dative_goes_to`** subject (line ~567 in patterns.rs)
2. **`agent_verb`** subject (line ~995 in patterns.rs)

Plus 2 new regression tests:

- `dative_goes_to_rejects_location_subject` вАФ 3 Wikipedia-style cases (“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –Р–ї–Љ–∞—В—Л, –Р“Ы—В”©–±–µ).
- `agent_verb_rejects_location_subject` вАФ 2 Wikipedia-style cases (“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ, –†–µ—Б–µ–є).

### Measured delta (full re-extract T4_200k + reasoner)

| | v4.0.15 | v4.0.16 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 925 | **13 715** | **вИТ210** |
| text-extracted `does_to` | ~9 171 | **9 002** | **вИТ169** (agent_verb location-subject guard) |
| text-extracted `goes_to` | ~1 590 | **1 544** | **вИТ46** (dative_goes_to location-subject guard) |
| **derivations total** | 15 846 | **15 832** | вИТ14 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 388 | **374** | **вИТ14** (primary R-rule target) |
| R1-R6, R8-R10 | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 461 | **3 456** | вИТ5 |
| Graph edges | 12 495 | **12 368** | **вИТ127** |
| R7 provenance split | 3 WC / 338 mixed / 47 text | 3 WC / 326 mixed / 45 text | mixed вИТ12, text вИТ2 |

**Noise-leverage discrepancy vs v4.0.10**: v4.0.10's `copula_is_a` time-noun guard produced **5.7 derivations eliminated per base fact** (63 base вЖТ 357 deriv). v4.0.16 produces only **0.065 deriv/base** (215 base вЖТ 14 deriv). Reason: location-subject `goes_to` / `does_to` base facts rarely fed R7 chains because their destinations (–і“ѓ–љ–Є–µ, “Ы–∞“У–∞–Ј, ”©—Б–µ–Ї, –Ї”©“£—Ц–ї, etc. вАФ Wikipedia biographical metonymy) lacked matching `part_of` targets in the graph. The primary win here is **direct base-fact precision** вАФ 215 categorically wrong text extractions ("“Ъ–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ –і“ѓ–љ–Є–µ–≥–µ –Ї–µ–ї–і—Ц" вЖТ `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы—Б—В–∞–љ goes_to –і“ѓ–љ–Є–µ`) removed вАФ not rule cascade reduction.

### Tests

**478 passing** (+2 regression tests from v4.0.15).

### Not in scope (queued)

- **¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы¬ї √Ч 52** text GoesTo вАФ ethnic-noun / homograph polysemy (Qazaq city in Azerbaijan). Same class as v4.0.10's ¬Ђ–∞–±–∞–є IsA –∞—Г—Л–ї¬ї deferral вАФ needs dialog-layer sense disambiguation, not extractor guard.
- **Fragment roots** ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–ї–њ / –Љ“±–љ / –∞—Б—В–∞ / —Е—Ц—Е¬ї √Ч 35 combined вАФ v4.0.6 closed-class expansion pattern; one-concern discipline defers to a future patch.
- **¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ¬ї √Ч 27**, **¬Ђ–±–∞–ї–∞¬ї √Ч 15** вАФ generic human subjects; often legitimate ("person goes to work"). Semantic filtering needed, not a blanket guard.

## [4.0.15] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ World Core batch #4: `language_features.jsonl` + `cooking_methods.jsonl` + `directions.jsonl`

Fourth data batch. Three more curated domains, chosen to exploit R9 (PartOf-transitivity, v4.0.13) and R10 (InDomain-inheritance, v4.0.14) by feeding them long part_of chains and populous IsA taxonomies.

### Three new domains

1. **`language_features.jsonl`** (18 entries) вАФ linguistic structure. 5-hop part_of backbone: `–і—Л–±—Л—Б вЖТ –±—Г—Л–љ вЖТ —Б”©–Ј вЖТ —Б”©–є–ї–µ–Љ вЖТ –Љ”Щ—В—Ц–љ вЖТ —В—Ц–ї`. Sub-chains: `”Щ—А—Ц–њ part_of –ґ–∞–Ј—Г part_of —В—Ц–ї`, `–Љ–∞“У—Л–љ–∞ part_of —Б”©–Ј`. Sound types: `–і–∞—Г—Л—Б—В—Л / –і–∞—Г—Л—Б—Б—Л–Ј IsA –і—Л–±—Л—Б` (vowels/consonants). Action verbs: `—Б”©–є–ї–µ—Г / –ґ–∞–Ј—Г IsA ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В`. 4 –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц children: `–±—Г—Л–љ / ”Щ—А—Ц–њ / —Б”©–є–ї–µ–Љ` IsA –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц.

2. **`cooking_methods.jsonl`** (10 entries) вАФ cooking verbs. `–њ—Ц—Б—Ц—А—Г IsA ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В` hub + 3 –њ—Ц—Б—Ц—А—Г children (`“Ы—Г—Л—А—Г / “Ы–∞–є–љ–∞—В—Г / “Ы–∞“Ы—В–∞—Г`). 6 more ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В siblings: —В“±–Ј–і–∞—Г / –∞—И—Л—В—Г / —В—Г—А–∞—Г / –∞—А–∞–ї–∞—Б—В—Л—А—Г / –і–∞–є—Л–љ–і–∞—Г. `“Ы–∞–Љ—Л—А part_of –љ–∞–љ`.

3. **`directions.jsonl`** (9 entries) вАФ cardinal + spatial orientation. `–±–∞“У—Л—В IsA –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц` hub + 8 direction children: —И—Л“У—Л—Б / –±–∞—В—Л—Б / —Б–Њ–ї—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї / –Њ“£—В“ѓ—Б—В—Ц–Ї / –ґ–Њ“У–∞—А—Л / —В”©–Љ–µ–љ / –Њ“£ / —Б–Њ–ї.

| R1_is_a_transitivity | 473 | **484** | +11 |

### R9 cascade payoff

The 5-hop `language_features` part_of chain (–і—Л–±—Л—Б вЖТ –±—Г—Л–љ вЖТ —Б”©–Ј вЖТ —Б”©–є–ї–µ–Љ вЖТ –Љ”Щ—В—Ц–љ вЖТ —В—Ц–ї) is exactly the kind of long mereological chain v4.0.13's R9 was designed for. R9 jumps from 117 вЖТ **170 (+53)** вАФ 10 new part_of entries produce **+5.3 R9 derivations per entry**. Plus cross-activation: R3/R6/R7 each gained ~8 derivations from R9's new part_of facts.

### R5 leverage

+623 R5 pairs from dense hubs: 8 new –±–∞“У—Л—В children (C(8,2) = 28), 3 new –њ—Ц—Б—Ц—А—Г children + 5 siblings under ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В, 4 –љ–Њ–≤—Л—Е –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц children cross-chain with existing (—Б–∞–љ, –∞“Ы—И–∞, —В—Ц–ї, –і—Л–±—Л—Б, –±—Г—Л–љ, ”Щ—А—Ц–њ, —Б”©–є–ї–µ–Љ now all IsA –±–µ–ї–≥—Ц, giving C(n,2) combinatorics).

### Effective leverage: +19.2 derivations per curated fact

**711 new derivations / 37 new curated facts = +19.2 derivations/fact.** Roughly matches v4.0.12's +19/fact baseline for multi-hub batches. Below v4.0.9's peak of +47/fact (single huge –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub) but consistent вАФ this was not a concentration batch.

## [4.0.14] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ R10 InDomain-inheritance via IsA (new reasoning rule)

Second consecutive rule-axis patch. Reasoner roster 8 вЖТ 9. Pattern: `A IsA B вИІ B InDomain D вЯє A InDomain D` вАФ identical shape to R2 (Has-inheritance), applied to the domain-membership predicate.

### Why InDomain-inheritance

InDomain has been the least-activated predicate вАФ only 24 base facts on v4.0.13 (14 in kz_literature, 4 math-ops, plus biology/anatomy/astronomy/color seeds). Yet IsA taxonomies are dense (587 distinct subjects). An inheritance rule unlocks coverage through existing taxonomy without new curation: every –±ird inheriting –Њ—А–љ–Є—В–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П from `“Ы“±—Б InDomain –Њ—А–љ–Є—В–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П`, every number inheriting –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ from `—Б–∞–љ InDomain –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞`.

### Pre-rule audit on v4.0.13

Direct 1-hop chains available (A IsA B вИІ B InDomain D, no trivial skip):

| domain | derivable count |
|---|---:|
| –Љ–∞—В–µ–Љ–∞—В–Є–Ї–∞ | 25 |
| –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П | 21 |
| –Њ—А–љ–Є—В–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П | 12 |
| ”Щ–і–µ–±–Є–µ—В | 4 |
| –∞—Б—В—А–Њ–љ–Њ–Љ–Є—П | 3 |
| –Ї”©—А—Г | 1 |
| **total 1-hop** | **66** |

Plus fixpoint chaining through R1-derived IsA facts (e.g. `–∞—А—Л—Б—В–∞–љ IsA –ґ—Л—А—В“Ы—Л—И IsA –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А` вЖТ R1 derives `–∞—А—Л—Б—В–∞–љ IsA –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А` вЖТ R10 derives `–∞—А—Л—Б—В–∞–љ InDomain –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П` at iter 2).

### Measured on committed v4.0.13 runtime

| rule | v4.0.13 | v4.0.14 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1-R9 rules | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| **R10_in_domain_inheritance** | вАФ | **102** | **new** |
| **derivations total** | 14 836 / 15 033 | **15 135** | **+102 (+0.68 %)** |
| Fixpoint passes | 5 | 5 | same |

**102 > 66 predicted** вАФ the 36-fact delta is R1-transitive chaining at iter 2. When `X IsA Y IsA Z` exists and `Z InDomain D`, R10 fires for both `(X, InDomain, D)` and `(Y, InDomain, D)` after R1 produces the `X IsA Z` shortcut. Classic fixpoint compounding.

### R10 is isolated (no cross-activation)

Unlike R9 which fed into R3/R6/R7 via PartOf, R10 produces InDomain facts that no current rule consumes. Future R11/R12 could extend (e.g. ¬ЂA InDomain D1 вИІ B InDomain D1 вЯє RelatedTo(A, B)¬ї вАФ the InDomain analogue of R5 shared-IsA), but that's scope for a later patch.

### Implementation

`rule_r10_in_domain_inheritance` in `reasoner.rs` вАФ same ~30-line structure as R2 Has-inheritance. Guards:

- **Tautology**: `A = D` rejected (defensive; would mean A categorized into itself via a taxonomy hop).
- **No cross-scale guard**: InDomain is not a scale concept.
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R10_in_domain_inheritance"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Test coverage

5 new regression tests:

- `r10_derives_in_domain_inheritance` вАФ basic 1-hop (“Ы–∞—Б“Ы—Л—А IsA –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А вЖТ InDomain –Ј–Њ–Њ–ї–Њ–≥–Є—П).
- `r10_respects_tautology_guard` вАФ synthetic A IsA B + B InDomain A rejection.
- `r10_does_not_fire_without_chain` вАФ isolated InDomain fact alone вЖТ no derivation.
- `r10_dedupes_against_existing_fact` вАФ explicit long-arc вЗТ R10 doesn't duplicate.
- `r10_chains_through_r1_derived_is_a` вАФ 3-level chain –∞—А—Л—Б—В–∞–љ IsA –ґ—Л—А—В“Ы—Л—И IsA –ґ–∞–љ—Г–∞—А, confirms R10 fires on R1-derived IsA at fixpoint iter 2.

### Tests

**476 passing** (+5 R10 regression tests from v4.0.13).

## [4.0.13] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ R9 PartOf-transitivity (new reasoning rule)

Rule-axis rotation after three consecutive data batches. The reasoner has been at 7 active rules since v4.0.4 (R8 added); v4.0.13 adds the 8th вАФ **R9 PartOf-transitivity**.

### Why PartOf-transitivity specifically

`PartOf` is a partial order. The transitive closure is **mathematically clean** вАФ no semantic overreach, unlike `Has`-transitivity which was rejected in v2.x because "car has wheel вИІ garage has car вЯє garage has wheel" is false. Mereological part-of chains do compose: ¬Ђ—И–∞—И part_of –±–∞—Б вИІ –±–∞—Б part_of –і–µ–љ–µ вЯє —И–∞—И part_of –і–µ–љ–µ¬ї is universally accepted.

### Why the timing makes sense

Three v4.0.x data batches (v4.0.7, v4.0.9, v4.0.11, v4.0.12) populated the `PartOf` base from 117 to 137 facts across plants / house_parts / body_parts / transport / astronomy. Pre-rule audit surfaced **103 ready 2-hop chains** on the committed graph вАФ enough for R9 to produce meaningful output on day one, unlike the v2.4.0 R1-activation (which fired 0 times until v2.5+ data landed).

### Implementation

New rule in `adam-reasoning/src/reasoner.rs` (~30-line body, same structure as R8). Guards:

- **Tautology**: `A = C` rejected (defensive; well-formed PartOf chains are acyclic).
- **Astronomical cross-scale**: inherited from the R6/R7 pattern вАФ if target `C` is an astronomical-scale object (`is_astronomical_object`) and subject `A` is not, reject. Prevents future ¬Ђ–ґ–∞–њ—Л—А–∞“Ы part_of –∞“У–∞—И part_of ... part_of –Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц¬ї leaks once intermediate forest / ecosystem entries land.
- Standard `source_chain` + `rule_id: "R9_part_of_transitivity"` + `ConfidenceKind::RuleInferred`.

### Measured delta on committed v4.0.12 runtime

| rule | v4.0.12 | v4.0.13 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 473 | 473 | 0 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 467 | 454 | **вИТ13** (dedup вАФ see below) |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 28 | **43** | **+15 (+54 %)** |
| R5_shared_is_a_target | 12 791 | 12 791 | 0 |
| R6_lives_in_via_part_of | 37 | **41** | +4 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 306 | **380** | **+74 (+24 %)** |
| R8_after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| **R9_part_of_transitivity** | вАФ | **117** | **new** |
| **derivations total** | 14 836 | **15 033** | **+197 (+1.3 %)** |
| Fixpoint passes | 6 | **5** | cleaner convergence |

### Cross-activation, not just direct derivation

The 117 direct R9 derivations are only ~60 % of the net gain. R9 creates new PartOf facts that **R3**, **R6**, **R7** can then chain through вАФ R7 alone gained +74 derivations (+24 %) as motion-through-parts chains deepened one hop. R3 Has-via-PartOf gained +15 (+54 % on a rule that was previously sparsely activated). This is a **rule-on-rule multiplier** вАФ the intended effect for a mereological primitive.

The R2 drop (вИТ13) is dedup: R9's new part_of derivations mean R2 convergence picks up facts at a different iteration, so some Has-inheritance derivations get consolidated earlier. Fixpoint in 5 passes (was 6) confirms cleaner convergence.

### Test coverage

Six new regression tests in `reasoner.rs`:

- `r9_derives_part_of_transitivity` вАФ basic 2-hop (—И–∞—И вЖТ –±–∞—Б вЖТ –і–µ–љ–µ).
- `r9_respects_tautology_guard` вАФ synthetic cyclic chain rejection.
- `r9_astronomy_same_scale_allowed` вАФ –ґ–µ—А вЖТ –Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц вЖТ –≥–∞–ї–∞–Ї—В–Є–Ї–∞ passes.
- `r9_astronomy_cross_scale_rejected` вАФ synthetic ¬Ђ–±–∞–ї–∞ part_of –ґ–µ—А part_of –Ї“ѓ–љ –ґ“ѓ–є–µ—Б—Ц¬ї blocked.
- `r9_chains_across_iterations` вАФ 4-node chain (—В—Ц—Б/–∞—Г—Л–Ј/–±–µ—В/–±–∞—Б/–і–µ–љ–µ) reaches full transitive closure (6 non-adjacent pairs).
- `r9_dedupes_against_existing_fact` вАФ explicit long-arc in input вЗТ R9 doesn't re-derive.

### Tests

**471 passing** (+6 R9 regression tests from v4.0.12).

### Noise propagation (honest baseline)

R9 propagates existing noise in the PartOf base вАФ e.g. ¬Ђ—В–µ“£—Ц–Ј part_of ”©—Б—Ц–Љ–і—Ц–Ї part_of –Ї”©–Ї”©–љ—Ц—Б¬ї (text-extraction chain, semantically absurd) will produce ¬Ђ—В–µ“£—Ц–Ј part_of –Ї”©–Ї”©–љ—Ц—Б¬ї as a derivation. This is **the same invariant all rules carry**: the reasoner doesn't validate base-fact semantics. The `derivation_is_fully_curated` helper (v4.0.3) remains the recommended filter for investor-safe surfaces.

|---|---:|---:|---|
| Active reasoning rules | 7 | **8** | +1 |
| World Core domains | 14 | 23 | +9 |
| World Core entries | 549 | 755 | +206 |
| Derivations | 7 866 | **15 033** | **+7 167 (+91.1 %)** |
| R5 shared-IsA | 5 940 | 12 791 | +6 851 |
| Workspace tests | 463 | **471** | +8 |

### Scope discipline

One new rule, one concern. 6 new tests, 30 lines of rule body, no other code changes, no data changes.

## [4.0.12] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ World Core batch #3: `emotions.jsonl` + `weather_phenomena.jsonl` + `materials.jsonl`

Third fast-path batch. Three new curated domains, ~3 s pipeline rebuild. **Plan substitution**: `drinks.jsonl` (originally queued) dropped after pre-batch audit вАФ `food.jsonl` already covers the `—Б—Г—Б—Л–љ` hub (—И–∞–є, —Б—Г IsA —Б—Г—Б—Л–љ) and the core milk derivatives (—Б“ѓ—В / “Ы—Л–Љ—Л–Ј / —И“±–±–∞—В / –∞–є—А–∞–љ as IsA —В–∞“У–∞–Љ). Substituted with `materials.jsonl` вАФ genuine gap (—И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В hub had zero world_core coverage).

### New domains

1. **`emotions.jsonl`** (18 entries) вАФ abstract-concept domain. Opens with `–∞–і–∞–Љ has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ` (activates R2 Has-inheritance through `X IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ` chains). 17 emotion types IsA —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ: “Ы—Г–∞–љ—Л—И, “Ы–∞–є“У—Л, –∞—И—Г, –Љ–∞—Е–∞–±–±–∞—В, “Ы–Њ—А“Ы—Л–љ—Л—И, —В–∞“£–і–∞–љ—Л—Б, “ѓ–Љ—Ц—В, ”©–Ї—Ц–љ—Ц—И, –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞–љ—Л—И, “±—П—В, —Л–Ј–∞, —Б–∞“У—Л–љ—Л—И, –Љ–µ–є—Ц—А—Ц–Љ, —Б–µ–љ—Ц–Љ, —А–Є–Ј–∞—И—Л–ї—Л“Ы, —А–µ–љ—Ц—И, –±–∞“Ы—Л—В. Pure native Kazakh, no loanwords (—Н–Љ–Њ—Ж–Є—П / –њ—Б–Є—Е–Є–Ї–∞ / —Б—В—А–µ—Б—Б all skipped).

2. **`weather_phenomena.jsonl`** (15 entries) вАФ natural phenomena under existing `“Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б` hub (was used by `bio_039: —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї IsA “Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б` and `color_029: –Ї–µ–Љ–њ—Ц—А“Ы–Њ—Б–∞“Ы IsA “Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б`). Adds 15 atmospheric + seismic phenomena: –ґ–∞“£–±—Л—А, “Ы–∞—А, –±“±—А—И–∞“Ы, —В“±–Љ–∞–љ, —И—Л“Ы, –ґ–µ–ї, –±–Њ—А–∞–љ, –і–∞—Г—Л–ї, –љ–∞–є–Ј–∞“У–∞–є, —Б–µ–ї, –Ј—Ц–ї–Ј–∞–ї–∞, “Ы—Г–∞“£, “Ы—Л—А–∞—Г, –∞—П–Ј, –±“±–ї—В. –Ъ–µ–Љ–њ—Ц—А“Ы–Њ—Б–∞“Ы deliberately NOT duplicated (already in colors.jsonl).

3. **`materials.jsonl`** (14 entries) вАФ new `—И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В IsA –Ј–∞—В` hub with 13 material children. Metals (—В–µ–Љ—Ц—А, –Љ—Л—Б, –∞–ї—В—Л–љ, –Ї“ѓ–Љ—Ц—Б, “Ы–Њ—А“У–∞—Б—Л–љ, —И–Њ–є—Л–љ, –±–Њ–ї–∞—В), minerals (—В–∞—Б, —Б–∞–Ј), organic materials (“Ы–∞–є—Л—Б, —В–µ—А—Ц, –Љ–∞—В–∞, –ґ—Ц–њ). Cross-chain designed-in: `–Љ–∞—В–∞ IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В` in this batch + existing `–ґ“ѓ–љ / –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞ / –ґ—Ц–±–µ–Ї IsA –Љ–∞—В–∞` from `clothing.jsonl` вЖТ R1 transitivity produces ¬Ђ–ґ“ѓ–љ IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В¬ї etc. without explicit statement.

| curated (HumanApproved) | 802 | **849** | +47 |
| extracted (Grammar, unchanged) | 13 039 | 13 039 | 0 |
| **derivations total** | 13 943 | **14 836** | **+893 (+6.4 %)** |

| R2_has_inheritance | 446 | **467** | +21 |

### Effective leverage: +19 derivations per added curated fact

Below v4.0.11's +27/fact and v4.0.9's peak of +47/fact. Explanation: this batch adds **three small isolated hubs** (—Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ with 17 children, —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В with 13, + 15 new “Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б children) rather than **one large cross-chain** into the existing –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub. R5 shared-IsA leverage scales as C(n,2) within a hub вАФ 17-child —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ gives C(17,2) = 136 pairs; 13-child —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В gives 78; 15 –љ–Њ–≤—Л—Е “Ы“±–±—Л–ї—Л—Б children + 2 pre-existing (—В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї, –Ї–µ–Љ–њ—Ц—А“Ы–Њ—Б–∞“Ы) = 17 total, giving C(17,2) = 136 pairs of which ~15√Ч2 = 30 are new from this batch. Total new R5: roughly 136 + 78 + 30 + cross-hub trickles + R1/R2 cascades вЙИ 851 вАФ matches observed.

### R2 activation via ¬Ђ–∞–і–∞–Љ has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ¬ї

New fact `–∞–і–∞–Љ has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ` triggers R2 Has-inheritance for every curated `X IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ` chain. Current state has few direct `IsA –∞–і–∞–Љ` entries; leverage will compound as future batches add human-category children.

### Cross-domain cross-chain designed-in

- `–Љ–∞—В–∞ IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В` (materials) + existing `–ґ“ѓ–љ / –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞ / –ґ—Ц–±–µ–Ї IsA –Љ–∞—В–∞` (clothing) вЖТ R1 transitive `–ґ“ѓ–љ IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В`, `–Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞ IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В`, `–ґ—Ц–±–µ–Ї IsA —И–Є–Ї—Ц–Ј–∞—В` emerge without explicit statement.
- `–∞–і–∞–Љ has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ` (emotions) + future `–∞–і–∞–Љ IsA X` entries will produce R2 `X has —Б–µ–Ј—Ц–Љ` inheritance.

### Pipeline cost

Full rebuild: ~3 s. Pre-v4.0.8 equivalent: ~135 min = **~2 700√Ч speedup** on 3-domain batch.

Forms (”Щ–љ, –Ї“ѓ–є, –ґ—Л—А, —В–µ—А–Љ–µ, —В–Њ–ї“У–∞—Г) deferred вАФ –ґ—Л—А already in kz_literature as IsA –ґ–∞–љ—А and a cleaner musical-composition hub decision is pending.

2. **`sports.jsonl`** (18 entries) вАФ traditional Kazakh games + general athletics. Hub chain: `–Њ–є—Л–љ IsA ”Щ—А–µ–Ї–µ—В`, `–ґ–∞—А—Л—Б IsA –Њ–є—Л–љ`. Contest children under –ґ–∞—А—Л—Б: –Ї”©–Ї–њ–∞—А, –∞—Г–і–∞—А—Л—Б–њ–∞“Ы, —Б–∞–є—Л—Б, –±”Щ–є–≥–µ, –Ї“ѓ—А–µ—Б (5 national horseback / wrestling traditions). Loanwords (—Д—Г—В–±–Њ–ї, —Е–Њ–Ї–Ї–µ–є, –±–Њ–Ї—Б, —В—А–µ–љ–µ—А) excluded per corpus purity directive.

Furniture sub-hub: –ґ–Є“ї–∞–Ј part_of “ѓ–є, then 5 IsA –ґ–Є“ї–∞–Ј children (“ѓ—Б—В–µ–ї, –Њ—А—Л–љ–і—Л“Ы, —В”©—Б–µ–Ї, —Б–∞–љ–і—Л“Ы, —Б”©—А–µ). –њ”Щ—В–µ—А IsA “ѓ–є (apartment-as-house).

A dedicated education.jsonl would duplicate ~10 of 15 core entries. Substituted with `house_parts.jsonl` вАФ genuine gap (“ѓ–є / –±”©–ї–Љ–µ / –ґ–Є“ї–∞–Ј had zero world_core coverage pre-v4.0.11).

## [4.0.10] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ Noise-elimination audit: time-noun subjects in `copula_is_a`

Audit on the fresh v4.0.9 `derived_facts.json` (12 849 derivations) surfaced one dominant text-only noise class that had persisted through v4.0.x: Wikipedia timeline entries extracted as IsA facts with month / day / year subjects.

### Audit findings

R5 provenance breakdown on v4.0.9 (10 827 shared-IsA derivations):

| provenance | count | share |
|---|---:|---:|
| both sources world_core | 9 293 | 85.8 % |
| mixed (1 world_core + 1 text) | 1 421 | 13.1 % |
| both sources text | 113 | 1.0 % |

**R5 is already safe.** 85.8 % fully curated; the mixed path is filtered by `derivation_is_fully_curated` in the dialog layer (v4.0.2 / v4.0.3).

**R1 is_a-transitivity** told a different story вАФ 19 of 449 derivations were **fully text-only**. Inspecting those, every single one traced back to one of three noise classes:

1. **Month-name subjects from Wikipedia timelines** вАФ "8 “Ы–∞“£—В–∞—А вАФ –Р“Ы—В”©–±–µ–і–µ –Ъ–µ“£–µ—Б ”©–Ї—Ц–Љ–µ—В—Ц –Њ—А–љ–∞–і—Л" вЖТ `“Ы–∞“£—В–∞—А IsA ”©–Ї—Ц–Љ–µ—В—Ц`. Classes: `“Ы–∞“£—В–∞—А√Ч4`, `–∞“Ы–њ–∞–љ√Ч1`, `—Б”Щ—Г—Ц—А√Ч2`, `“Ы—Л—А–Ї“ѓ–є–µ–Ї√Ч1`, `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ√Ч3`, `–ґ–µ–ї—В–Њ“Ы—Б–∞–љ√Ч2` вАФ 13 base IsA facts.
2. **Year subject `–ґ—Л–ї`** вАФ "1791 –ґ—Л–ї вАФ –Ч—Л—А—П–љ –Ї–µ–љ—Ц—И—В–µ—А—Ц –ґ“±–Љ—Л—Б—Л–љ—Л“£ –±–∞—Б—В–∞–ї—Г—Л" вЖТ `–ґ—Л–ї IsA –ґ“±–Љ—Л—Б—Л–љ`. 15+ base facts from date-prefixed timeline entries.
3. **Month-to-month ranges in parens** вАФ "(“Ы—Л—А–Ї“ѓ–є–µ–Ї 1955 вАФ —Б”Щ—Г—Ц—А 1963) –С–Њ–±–Є—А –Э." вЖТ `“Ы—Л—А–Ї“ѓ–є–µ–Ї IsA —Б”Щ—Г—Ц—А`, `—Б”Щ—Г—Ц—А IsA “Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ`, etc.

### Root cause

Of the four v2.x-era IsA-producing matchers (`copula_is_a`, `locative_lives_in`, `dative_goes_to`, `agent_verb`), three already applied an `is_time_noun` subject guard. **`copula_is_a` did not.** It was the only matcher whose subject path went through `resolve_bare_noun` without any time-noun filter. Every other matcher had the guard added in v3.8.5 when time nouns were identified as a noise class for `LivesIn`/`GoesTo`/`DoesTo`; the `copula_is_a` oversight was missed.

### Fix вАФ one-concern patch

1. **Expanded `is_time_noun`** with 19 new entries вАФ 12 months (“Ы–∞“£—В–∞—А, –∞“Ы–њ–∞–љ, –љ–∞—Г—А—Л–Ј, —Б”Щ—Г—Ц—А, –Љ–∞–Љ—Л—А, –Љ–∞—Г—Б—Л–Љ, —И—Ц–ї–і–µ, —В–∞–Љ—Л–Ј, “Ы—Л—А–Ї“ѓ–є–µ–Ї, “Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ, “Ы–∞—А–∞—И–∞, –ґ–µ–ї—В–Њ“Ы—Б–∞–љ) + 7 days (–і“ѓ–є—Б–µ–љ–±—Ц, —Б–µ–є—Б–µ–љ–±—Ц, —Б”Щ—А—Б–µ–љ–±—Ц, –±–µ–є—Б–µ–љ–±—Ц, –ґ“±–Љ–∞, —Б–µ–љ–±—Ц, –ґ–µ–Ї—Б–µ–љ–±—Ц). Seasons deliberately excluded: –Ї”©–Ї—В–µ–Љ / –ґ–∞–Ј / –Ї“ѓ–Ј / “Ы—Л—Б are curated in world_core.time.jsonl as legitimate IsA subjects (e.g. `–ґ–∞–Ј IsA –Љ–µ–Ј–≥—Ц–ї`) and never appeared as text-extraction noise.
2. **Added `is_time_noun(&subj.root)` guard** to `copula_is_a` after `resolve_bare_noun`.
3. **Two new regression tests**: `is_time_noun_covers_v4_0_10_months_and_days` (31 assertions) and `copula_is_a_refuses_time_noun_subject` (5 Wikipedia-style negative cases).

### Homograph handling

Three of the month names are homographs with other Kazakh words: `“Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ` (October / cauldron), `–Љ–∞–Љ—Л—А` (May / peace), `–љ–∞—Г—А—Л–Ј` (March / Nauryz holiday). **World_core curation takes precedence** вАФ `tool_026: “Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ IsA —Л–і—Л—Б` is unaffected (world_core loader bypasses pattern matchers). Any text-pack extraction of these homographs as IsA subjects is dropped; the cost is a handful of rare correct extractions in exchange for eliminating an entire noise class.

### Measured delta

Full re-extract on T4_200k (`--bench-order --max-total 200000`), re-run reasoner + graph:

| | v4.0.9 | v4.0.10 | delta |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| facts.json total | 13 850 | **13 787** | **вИТ63** |
| extracted (Grammar) | 13 102 | 13 039 | вИТ63 |
| curated (HumanApproved) | 748 | 748 | 0 |
| `is_a` facts | 659 | **623** | **вИТ36** (primary target) |
| `does_to` facts | 9 192 | 9 171 | вИТ21 |
| `goes_to` facts | 1 597 | 1 590 | вИТ7 |
| `lives_in` facts | 289 | 288 | вИТ1 |
| Other predicates | unchanged | unchanged | 0 |
| **derivations total** | **12 849** | **12 492** | **вИТ357 (вИТ2.8 %)** |
| R1_is_a_transitivity | 449 | **426** | вИТ23 |
| R2_has_inheritance | 474 | **436** | вИТ38 |
| R3_has_inheritance_via_part_of | 26 | 26 | 0 |
| **R5_shared_is_a_target** | 10 827 | **10 537** | **вИТ290** |
| R6_lives_in_via_part_of | 36 | 36 | 0 |
| R7_goes_to_via_part_of | 303 | 297 | вИТ6 |
| R8_after_transitivity | 734 | 734 | 0 |
| Graph nodes | 3 375 | 3 374 | вИТ1 |
| Graph edges | 12 449 | 12 394 | вИТ55 |

### Bonus multi-matcher propagation

Because `is_time_noun` is also applied in `locative_lives_in`, `dative_goes_to`, and `agent_verb` subject filters, expanding the set with months + days tightened **all four** matchers simultaneously. The v4.0.10 diff-in-one-function produced вИТ36 IsA (the explicit target) **plus** вИТ29 across the other three matchers (does_to вИТ21, goes_to вИТ7, lives_in вИТ1) вАФ 29 "free" precision wins the audit hadn't predicted. Noise leverage: **63 base facts eliminated вЖТ 357 derivations eliminated = 5.7 derivations per base fact**.

### Visible confirmation

Most-connected content nouns on the graph rotated: v4.0.9 had ¬Ђ–ґ—Л–ї (151)¬ї in the top-5 вАФ the January/February/2011 noise that made "year" artificially central. v4.0.10 drops ¬Ђ–ґ—Л–ї¬ї entirely from the top-5 and promotes ¬Ђ–∞—В (horse, degree 148)¬ї in its place. The fix is observable in graph-level centrality, not just aggregate counts.

### Tests

**465 passing** (+2 from v4.0.9).

### Scope discipline

One concern: close the last time-noun extractor gap. No new predicates, no new rules, no data changes, no schema changes. The fix is a ~35-line diff in one function.

**Not in scope** for v4.0.10 (queued for future audits):
- **Proper-name homograph noise** вАФ ¬Ђ–∞–±–∞–є IsA –∞—Г—Л–ї¬ї (19 times вАФ there are many villages named Abai), ¬Ђ“Ы–∞–Ј–∞“Ы IsA “Ы–∞–ї–∞¬ї (city in Azerbaijan). These are factually correct but collide with famous-referent senses (Abai the poet, Kazakh the people). Needs a dialog-layer sense-disambiguation pass, not an extractor guard.
- **Metaphorical proverbs** вАФ ¬Ђ–Х“£–±–µ–Ї вАФ —В–∞–±—Л—Б—В—Л“£ “Ы–∞–є–љ–∞—А—Л¬ї вЖТ `–µ“£–±–µ–Ї IsA “Ы–∞–є–љ–∞—А`. FST extraction is structurally correct; the metaphor is lost only at the semantic level. Addressing this would need a metaphor detector (out of scope for patch-size work).

## [4.0.9] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ World Core batch: `plants.jsonl` + `professions.jsonl` + `tools_household.jsonl` (first fast-path batch release)

First release to exploit the v4.0.8 fast-path. Three new domains added in one patch; full data pipeline rebuild took <3 seconds instead of ~45 minutes under the old per-domain workflow. At the user's direction ("–љ–µ–Њ–±—Е–Њ–і–Є–Љ–Њ –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–ї—П—В—М –Њ—В —В—А–µ—Е –і–Њ –њ—П—В–Є, —З—В–Њ–±—Л –≤—Б–µ —Б—А–∞–Ј—Г —В–µ—Б—В–Є—А–Њ–≤–∞—В—М"), this lands the first multi-domain batch вАФ targeting gap-fill + highest-leverage hubs.

### Three new domains вАФ rationale per domain

1. **`plants.jsonl`** (35 entries / 35 facts) вАФ **symmetry gap filler**. The v4.0.6 World Core had `animals.jsonl` (40 entries) but no flora counterpart. Adds `–∞“У–∞—И` children (“Ы–∞–є—Л“£, –µ–Љ–µ–љ, —В–µ—А–µ–Ї, —В–∞–ї, “Ы–∞—А–∞“У–∞–є, —И—Л—А—И–∞, –∞—А—И–∞, “ѓ–є–µ“£–Ї—Ц, –ґ–Є–і–µ), `–≥“ѓ–ї` children (—А–∞—Г—И–∞–љ, “Ы—Л–Ј“У–∞–ї–і–∞“Ы, –±”Щ–є—И–µ—И–µ–Ї, –ї–∞–ї–∞, “Ы–∞–ї–∞–Љ–њ—Л—А), `–±“±—В–∞` sub-hub (—В–Њ–±—Л–ї“У—Л, –Є—В–Љ“±—А—Л–љ), `—И”©–њ` children (–ґ—Г—Б–∞–љ, “Ы–∞–Љ—Л—Б), 7 new `–і–∞“Ы—Л–ї` species (–∞—А–њ–∞, —Б“±–ї—Л, —В–∞—А—Л, –ґ“ѓ–≥–µ—А—Ц, –Ї“ѓ–љ–±–∞“У—Л—Б, –Ј—Л“У—Л—А, –Љ–∞“Ы—В–∞ вАФ existing `–і–∞“Ы—Л–ї` parent in food.jsonl), and 6 `part_of` relations (–ґ–∞–њ—Л—А–∞“Ы/—В–∞–Љ—Л—А/–±“±—В–∞“Ы/—Б–∞–±–∞“Ы/–±“ѓ—А—И—Ц–Ї/—В“±“Ы—Л–Љ part_of –∞“У–∞—И/”©—Б—Ц–Љ–і—Ц–Ї). Cross-domain leverage: parents `–∞“У–∞—И`/`–≥“ѓ–ї`/`—И”©–њ`/`–і–∞“Ы—Л–ї` already in biology_basic + food, so each new child immediately gets R1 transitivity (e.g. `“Ы–∞–є—Л“£ вЖТ –∞“У–∞—И вЖТ ”©—Б—Ц–Љ–і—Ц–Ї вЖТ —В—Ц—А—И—Ц–ї—Ц–Ї –Є–µ—Б—Ц`) and R5 shared-IsA at both levels.

2. **`professions.jsonl`** (40 entries / 40 facts) вАФ **highest-leverage R5 hub**. Pre-v4.0.9 `–Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ` hub had ~10 children scattered across transport (–њ–Є–ї–Њ—В, –Ї–∞–њ–Є—В–∞–љ, –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–Є—Б—В, –ґ“ѓ—А–≥—Ц–Ј—Г—И—Ц), clothing (–Ј–µ—А–≥–µ—А, —В—Ц–≥—Ц–љ—И—Ц), kz_literature (–∞“Ы—Л–љ, –ґ–∞–Ј—Г—И—Л), proverbs (“±—Б—В–∞–Ј). Added **40 new professions** all native Kazakh: –Љ“±“У–∞–ї—Ц–Љ, –Њ“Ы—Л—В—Г—И—Л, —В”Щ—А–±–Є–µ—И—Ц, –і”Щ—А—Ц–≥–µ—А, –Љ–µ–і–±–Є–Ї–µ, “У–∞–ї—Л–Љ, —Б—Г—А–µ—В—И—Ц, —Б–∞–Ј–≥–µ—А, ”Щ–љ—И—Ц, –±–Є—И—Ц, –Ї“ѓ–є—И—Ц, –ґ—Л—А—И—Л, —Б–∞—В—Г—И—Л, —Б–∞—Г–і–∞–≥–µ—А, –∞—Б–њ–∞–Ј, –љ–∞—Г–±–∞–є—И—Л, –µ–≥—Ц–љ—И—Ц, –Љ–∞–ї—И—Л, —И–Њ–њ–∞–љ, –ґ—Л–ї“Ы—Л—И—Л, –∞“£—И—Л, –±–∞–ї—Л“Ы—И—Л, “±—Б—В–∞, –µ—В—Ц–Ї—И—Ц, –і–∞—А“Ы–∞–љ, –±–∞“Ы–±–∞–љ, “Ы“±—А—Л–ї—Л—Б—И—Л, –ґ“±–Љ—Л—Б—И—Л, –ґ”©–љ–і–µ—Г—И—Ц, –Ј–∞“£–≥–µ—А, —Е–∞—В—И—Л, —В”©—А–∞“У–∞, –±–∞—Б—В—Л“Ы, —Б–∞—А–±–∞–Ј, –ґ–∞—Г—Л–љ–≥–µ—А, —В—Ц–ї–Љ–∞—И, –∞—Г–і–∞—А–Љ–∞—И—Л, —В—Ц–ї—И—Ц, –µ–Љ—И—Ц, –ґ–∞—В—В—Л“Ы—В—Л—А—Г—И—Л. Avoided loanwords (–Љ–µ–љ–µ–і–ґ–µ—А, –Є–љ–ґ–µ–љ–µ—А, –њ—А–Њ–≥—А–∞–Љ–Љ–Є—Б—В, –∞–Ї—В–µ—А вАФ all skipped). **Expected R5 leverage**: –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub now has ~50 children вЖТ C(50,2) = 1 225 RelatedTo pairs vs pre-batch C(10,2) = 45, **27√Ч increase**.

3. **`tools_household.jsonl`** (30 entries / 30 facts) вАФ **“Ы“±—А–∞–ї + —Л–і—Л—Б dual hub**. `“Ы“±—А–∞–ї` hub children: 18 concrete tools (–њ—Л—И–∞“Ы, –±–∞–ї—В–∞, –±–∞–ї“У–∞, –∞—А–∞, “Ы–∞–є—И—Л, –Є–љ–µ, –Ї“ѓ—А–µ–Ї, —В—Л—А–Љ–∞, –Њ—А–∞“Ы, —И–∞–ї“У—Л, –∞—А“Ы–∞–љ, “Ы–∞–ї–∞–Љ, “Ы–∞—А—Л–љ–і–∞—И, –і”Щ–њ—В–µ—А, —Б–∞–±—Л–љ, —И“ѓ–±–µ—А–µ–Ї, —Б—Л–њ—Л—А“У—Л—И, –њ—Ц—Б–њ–µ–Ї). New `—Л–і—Л—Б` sub-hub under “Ы“±—А–∞–ї: 11 vessels (—В–∞–±–∞“Ы, –Ї–µ—Б–µ, “Ы–∞—Б—Л“Ы, —И–∞–љ—Л—И“Ы—Л, —И”Щ–є–љ–µ–Ї, —Б–∞–Љ–∞—Г—Л—А, “Ы–∞–Ј–∞–љ, “Ы“±–Љ—Л—А–∞, —И–µ–ї–µ–Ї, –Њ–ґ–∞—Г, —В–Њ—Б—В–∞“У–∞–љ). `–њ—Ц—Б–њ–µ–Ї` and `—В–Њ—А—Б—Л“Ы`-style traditional Kazakh items included to keep the domain culturally grounded.

**4 983 new derivations / 105 new curated facts = +47 derivations per fact** вАФ **3.6√Ч higher leverage than v4.0.7's +13/fact**. Concentrating on the –Љ–∞–Љ–∞–љ hub paid off: R5 shared-IsA alone gained **+4 887** (the dense profession cluster cross-chaining with existing —В—А–∞–љ—Б–њ–Њ—А—В / –∞—Г—Л–ї—И–∞—А—Г–∞—И—Л–ї—Л“Ы / –Њ–±—А–∞–Ј clusters). v4.0.7 had no equivalent hub concentration вАФ 42 transport entries spread across 3 sub-clusters (vehicles, infrastructure, professions) each gave ~C(13,2) at most.

- run_reasoner: 2 s

**~2 000√Ч pipeline speedup on a 3-domain batch**. Confirms the v4.0.8 infrastructure thesis empirically.

Next v4.0.10: could batch another 3 domains (music_kz, sports, education are the queued candidates) вАФ or rotate axes back to rules / noise-elimination depending on where Codex review surfaces the highest-value target next.

## [4.0.8] вАФ 2026-04-24 вАФ `extract_facts --world-core-only` fast-path (throughput infrastructure)

Axis rotation toward **tooling throughput**. The previous five patches (v4.0.3 вЖТ v4.0.7) spent ~2 hours each, of which ~45 min was a full re-extract over 200 k text samples that produced the same text-facts every time and only differed in the `world_core/` slice. At the user's explicit concern ("—В—А–∞—В–Є—В—М 2 —З–∞—Б–∞ –љ–∞ –Њ–і–Є–љ –њ–∞—В—З —Б–Є–ї—М–љ–Њ —А–∞—Б—В–Њ—З–Є—В–µ–ї—М–љ–Њ"), v4.0.8 lands a one-time infrastructure patch that turns that 45-minute step into a ~1-second re-merge for any world_core-only change.

### Design

New `--world-core-only` flag on `extract_facts`:

1. Read the committed `data/retrieval/facts.json`.
2. `retain` every fact whose `source.pack` does **not** start with `world_core/`.
3. Re-load `data/world_core/*.jsonl` via the existing `load_world_core_facts` loader.
4. Merge the fresh curated facts, recompute `by_predicate` / `by_pack` / `facts_total` from scratch.
5. Stamp `version = CARGO_PKG_VERSION`, `status = "world_core_refresh"` (new sentinel value вАФ downstream consumers treat any `status` as first-class per the v3.1.0 iteration contract), rewrite.

Text-extraction state (`built_from`, `packs_completed`, `packs_total`, `samples_scanned`, `samples_with_facts`) is preserved verbatim вАФ the fast-path makes no claim about the text corpus, so it inherits those fields from the source artifact. A regression to those numbers requires a full `extract_facts` run (with `--bench-order --max-total 200000` for the canonical T4_200k tier).

Mutually exclusive with `--full`, `--bench-order`, `--max-total` вАФ the binary fails fast if combined.

### Measured equivalence

Baseline: committed `facts.json` @ v4.0.7 (status `"completed"`, 2 476 s elapsed). Ran `--world-core-only` and diffed byte-for-byte:

```
diff /tmp/facts_baseline.json data/retrieval/facts.json
3,4c3,4
<   "status": "completed",
<   "elapsed_s": 2476,
---
>   "status": "world_core_refresh",
>   "elapsed_s": 0,
```

**Only `status` + `elapsed_s` differ** вАФ both intentional markers. Every one of 13 745 facts, every `by_predicate` / `by_pack` count, every source chain, byte-identical. The fast-path is provably equivalent to a full re-extract when only `data/world_core/*.jsonl` has changed.

### Measured throughput win

| | full extract | fast-path |
|---|---:|---:|
| wall-clock (M2, release) | ~41 min (2 476 s) | **<1 s** (2.5 s including cargo startup) |
| text packs scanned | 9 (6 completed under the 200 k cap) | 0 |
| FST parses | ~3 M | 0 |

**~1 500√Ч speedup** on the dominant cost of a world_core-only patch. The next 3вАУ4 curated-knowledge patches alone recoup the ~30 min invested in this infrastructure change.

### Impact on release rhythm

Data-only patches (the axis rotation tracked in `project_v4_direction`: `world_core`, `domains`) drop from ~2 h вЖТ ~30 min end-to-end вАФ cargo test + bump + docs + tag become the dominant cost, not extraction. This unblocks the "batch 3вАУ5 domains per patch" direction the user flagged at v4.0.7: with the fast-path in place, adding 5 domains now rebuilds in seconds instead of 4 √Ч 45 min = 3 h of serial re-extraction.

### Scope discipline

Single-concern patch: one new flag, one new helper function, zero changes to extractor logic, zero new predicates, zero test-count change (463 passing, unchanged from v4.0.7 вАФ correctness baseline preserved). Exactly the one-concern-per-patch rhythm the v4.x cadence was set up for.

**Guardrail**: the fast-path is **only** correct when text-extraction output is unchanged. Any patch that touches pattern matchers, the lexicon, or the corpus MUST still run a full extract. This is documented in the binary's help output and the `status = "world_core_refresh"` sentinel makes the provenance trivially greppable.

---

## [4.0.7] вАФ 2026-04-23 вАФ World Core expansion: new `transport.jsonl` domain

Axis rotation. Two consecutive patches (v4.0.5, v4.0.6) cleaned noise; time to grow clean knowledge. v4.0.7 adds a **14th World Core domain** вАФ `transport.jsonl` вАФ along the "domains" axis of the knowledge-first direction (`project_v4_direction`).

### New domain вАФ `transport.jsonl`

**42 entries / 42 facts**. Classic transport taxonomy centred on the `–Ї”©–ї—Ц–Ї` (transport / vehicle) hub:

- **Vehicle hierarchy** (13 direct IsA –Ї”©–ї—Ц–Ї): –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–∞, –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–Њ–±–Є–ї—М, –њ–Њ–є—Л–Ј, “±—И–∞“Ы, –Ї–µ–Љ–µ, –≤–µ–ї–Њ—Б–Є–њ–µ–і, –Љ–Њ—В–Њ—Ж–Є–Ї–ї, –∞–≤—В–Њ–±—Г—Б, —В—А–∞–Љ–≤–∞–є, –Љ–µ—В—А–Њ, —В—А–Њ–ї–ї–µ–є–±—Г—Б, —В–∞–Ї—Б–Є, —В—Ц–Ї“±—И–∞“Ы, –ґ“ѓ–Ї –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–∞—Б—Л.
- **Infrastructure**: –ґ–Њ–ї + subclasses (–Ї”©—И–µ, –і–∞“£“У—Л–ї, —В–∞—Б –ґ–Њ–ї, —В–µ–Љ—Ц—А –ґ–Њ–ї, –Ї”©–њ—Ц—А), facilities (–∞—Н—А–Њ–њ–Њ—А—В, –≤–Њ–Ї–Ј–∞–ї, –њ–Њ—А—В, –∞—П–ї–і–∞–Љ–∞, –±–µ–Ї–µ—В).
- **Professions**: –ґ“ѓ—А–≥—Ц–Ј—Г—И—Ц, –њ–Є–ї–Њ—В, –Ї–∞–њ–Є—В–∞–љ, –Љ–∞—И–Є–љ–Є—Б—В, –ґ–Њ–ї–∞—Г—И—Л.
- **Substances / parts**: –Њ—В—Л–љ (+ –±–µ–љ–Ј–Є–љ, –і–Є–Ј–µ–ї—М, –Ї–µ—А–Њ—Б–Є–љ), –і”©“£–≥–µ–ї–µ–Ї, –Љ–Њ—В–Њ—А.
- **Actions / events**: “Ы–Њ–Ј“У–∞–ї—Л—Б, –Ї–µ–Љ–µ вЖТ —В–µ“£—Ц–Ј, “±—И–∞“Ы вЖТ –∞—Н—А–Њ–њ–Њ—А—В.

### Shared-IsA leverage

The 13 vehicles as direct children of `–Ї”©–ї—Ц–Ї` give R5 shared-IsA up to **C(13,2) = 78** RelatedTo pairs on one hub alone. Professions cluster (4 direct ma–Љ–∞–љ children) вЖТ C(4,2)=6 more. Road hierarchy gives subclass R1 transitivity through ¬Ђ–Ї”©—И–µ IsA –ґ–Њ–ї¬ї, ¬Ђ–і–∞“£“У—Л–ї IsA –Ї”©—И–µ¬ї, ¬Ђ—В–µ–Љ—Ц—А –ґ–Њ–ї IsA –ґ–Њ–ї¬ї, etc.
